title: Bookkeeper and Finance Admin (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We run a small media agency and are hiring a reliable Bookkeeper and

Finance Admin to own our weekly money process. This is a long-term,

full-time seat.



What you do every week:

- Prepare and send client invoices

- Process team contractor payments through Airtable, Google Sheets,

  and Airwallex

- Record incoming payments and send confirmations

- Follow up on slow payments

- Record vendor and software expenses

- Reconcile invoiced vs received vs bank

- Update our daily financial report and flag issues early



What you do occasionally:

- Help collect tax documents and coordinate with CPAs

- Research new payment or banking setups when asked

- Call US banks or vendors in English when an issue needs a real person



Requirements:

- Solid bookkeeping basics (invoicing, reconciliation, payment tracking)

- Strong Google Sheets skills and comfort with Airtable

- Clear written English and confident on a call with a US bank

- Proactive with deadlines: if you are blocked, you update early,

  propose the next step, and keep driving the task, you do not

  wait silently

- Full-time availability with at least four hours overlap with US

  business hours

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace



Nice to have: Airwallex, Wise, or PayPal Business experience,

or past work with a US-based owner.



Pay: USD 600 to 900 per month, paid weekly via PayPal or Wise.

Performance raises after the first sixty days.

title: Facebook Launcher for E-commerce / Dropshipping Brand
description:
We are looking for a
 Launcher to join our team and handle the setup and launch of
 ad campaigns for our e-commerce brands.



This role is focused on execution, accuracy, speed, and consistency. We need someone who can follow campaign launch systems properly, check details carefully, and make sure campaigns go live correctly without errors.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Launch
 ad campaigns based on our internal process and naming conventions

- Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads correctly inside Meta Ads Manager

- Make sure the correct pixel, country, budget, copy, creatives, and links are used

- Check that tracking is working properly before launch

- Verify landing pages, product pages, and checkout links before campaigns go live

- Coordinate with the team if there are missing assets, wrong links, or setup issues

- Monitor newly launched campaigns and flag any immediate problems

- Help keep campaign tracking sheets and launch records updated

- Follow clear SOPs and execute with minimal mistakes

- Manage and maintain
 advertising assets, including profiles, Business Managers, ad accounts, pages, and pixels

- Set up and replace profiles when needed, and ensure all assets are connected correctly inside the
 ecosystem

- Check that Business Managers, ad accounts, pages, and pixels are properly linked and ready before launch

- Monitor asset availability and flag early when new profiles or additional setup will be needed for scaling

- Help prepare accounts and supporting assets in advance so launches are not delayed by access or setup issues





What We’re Looking For

- Experience launching
 ads for e-commerce or dropshipping brands

- Strong attention to detail

- Able to follow systems and instructions exactly

- Familiar with campaign structure, ad sets, scaling basics, and launch workflows

- Understands pixels, tracking, URL checking, and basic funnel checks

- Organized, reliable, and fast

- Good English communication

- Able to work independently and update the team clearly





Bonus If You Have Experience With

- Product testing campaigns

- Funnelish, Shopify, or similar landing page/checkouts

- WeTrack or tracking tools

- Creative testing workflows

- Launching across multiple countries or markets



Important for This Role

We are not just looking for someone who knows how to click buttons inside Ads Manager. We want someone who is careful, dependable, and operationally sharp — someone who can launch campaigns properly and catch mistakes before they become expensive problems.

title: Virtual Bookkeeper / QuickBooks Specialist
description:
Master Seal Craft is a startup company offering specialized services across the West Coast of the United States. We help commercial kitchens and grocers stay compliant and fully operational by servicing the refrigeration seals and hardware that most people don’t think about — until they fail a health inspection.

Our customers include restaurants, grocers, hospitals, schools, stadiums, and fast-food service operators.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Bookkeeper with strong QuickBooks experience to handle our monthly accounting tasks. This is a long-term remote position for someone who can work independently, meet deadlines, and keep our books accurate and up to date.



Key Responsibilities:

-Monthly bookkeeping and closing of books on the 15th of the following month

-Maintaining Divvy corporate cards and spending limits (significantly reduced workload compared to before)

-Preparing and delivering monthly P&L, Cash Flow, and Balance Sheet reports

-Maintaining an up-to-date list of outstanding customer receivables and sending polite payment reminders

-Paying accounts payable using Divvy cards

-Full management of QuickBooks (inventory tracking, estimates, invoices, and purchase orders)



Requirements:

-Proven bookkeeping/accounting experience

-Strong expertise in QuickBooks — especially inventory, estimates, invoices, and purchase orders (this is very important)

-Experience with Divvy cards (or similar corporate spend management tools) is a big advantage

-Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills

-Ability to work independently and consistently meet the 15th deadline every month

-Good English communication skills

-Reliable internet and quiet workspace



What We Offer:

-Competitive monthly rate (based on experience)

-Flexible remote work (work from anywhere in the Philippines)

-Long-term opportunity with a growing team



How to Apply (VERY IMPORTANT):

To be considered for this position, you MUST complete our short Google Form screening: 

Only applicants who fully submit the form will be reviewed. Applications sent without completing the form will not be considered.

If you are a QuickBooks expert who loves clean books and accurate reporting, we would love to hear from you!

title: Marketing and Sales Manager

This role is responsible for overseeing client acquisition systems, sales support, operational organization, CRM/automation infrastructure, offer management, and internal platform administration.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, growth-minded, tech-savvy, and experienced in scaling service-based businesses—preferably within credit repair, funding, coaching, consulting, or high-ticket service industries.

Make 20–50 offers daily through DMs, outreach, and lead follow-up

title: Customer Experience Agent
description:
About Javvy Coffee

Javvy Coffee is a fast-growing DTC brand committed to delivering exceptional coffee experiences. Our mission is to upgrade daily coffee routines with ultra-convenient, better-for-you products that don’t compromise on flavor. From our signature concentrates to innovative, functional add-ons, we believe in making great coffee effortless.

We’re looking for people who are passionate about creating memorable customer experiences and who thrive in a fast-paced, supportive team environment. If you care deeply about people, quality, and thoughtful problem-solving—you’ll fit right in.



About the Role

The Customer Experience Agent is the frontline of Javvy’s customer experience. In this role, you’ll support customers across multiple channels, helping them navigate orders, subscriptions, and product questions with clarity and care.

You’ll be responsible for delivering fast, accurate, and on-brand responses while ensuring each customer feels heard and supported. Whether resolving an issue, answering a product question, or guiding someone through their account, you play a key role in building trust and loyalty with every interaction.

This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, adaptable, and motivated to grow within a high-performing CX team.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Support: Respond to customer inquiries across
, chat, SMS, and other support channels with clear, helpful, and on-brand communication.

Order Management: Assist customers with order updates, subscription changes, and general account support.

Issue Resolution: Identify customer concerns, determine root causes, and provide effective, timely solutions.

Follow-Up: Ensure customer issues are fully resolved by following up when needed and confirming satisfaction.

Product Knowledge: Maintain a strong understanding of Javvy products and policies to provide accurate guidance and recommendations.

Team Collaboration: Work closely with team leads and peers to escalate issues, share feedback, and improve the overall customer experience.

Process Adherence: Follow established SOPs and workflows to ensure consistency, accuracy, and efficiency in all interactions.



What We’re Looking For

Customer support experience, preferably in ecommerce or a fast-paced environment

Strong written communication that is clear, conversational, and aligned with Javvy’s brand voice

Familiarity with tools like Gorgias, Shopify, or similar platforms

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively in a remote setting

Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills

A positive, team-first attitude and willingness to learn

Proficiency in G-suite

Ability to work standard 9-5 EST hours including weekends and holidays

mbers.

YOU SHOULD HAVE:

The availability to work 40 hours per week from 9:00 am to 6:00 pm PST.

A reliable space to work remotely with a fast computer, quality internet, camera, microphone, and speakers.

This is a position with a high opportunity for the right candidate to grow! Our successful office assistants have seen fast growth and promotion, both within the Accounting team and to other teams.



We are looking for talented and diligent candidates who excel in our skills tests, and will consider these candidates even if past experience or educational background criteria aren't met. Submission of a valid NBI Clearance is required after passing the initial interview and assessment.



California, New York, Washington, and Colorado: starting base pay for this position ranges between $15 - $25 per hour. Compensation may vary based on factors such as experience, qualifications, skills test performance, geographic location, and seniority of the position offered. Outside of California, New York, Washington, and Colorado compensation may fall outside the above ranges.

title: SEO / GEO Specialist
description:
FULL-TIME REMOTE: SEO/GEO Specialist for US-Based Marketing Team



Company: Drivers 1st (Remote)



About the Role:



Drivers 1st is seeking an experienced, detail-oriented SEO/GEO (Search Engine Optimization/Answer Engine Optimization) Specialist to join our remote Marketing Team on a full-time basis. You will be responsible for developing and implementing strategies to dramatically improve our organic search visibility and maximize the effectiveness of our content across all digital platforms. This is a critical role focused on optimizing our web content for both traditional SEO and modern Answer Engine Optimization (GEO) features, such as featured snippets, voice search, and knowledge panels, to capture high-intent users in the competitive driver recruitment market.



Key Responsibilities:



Strategy and Optimization

• Develop and execute comprehensive SEO/GEO strategies, including keyword research, content gap analysis, competitive auditing, and technical optimizations.

• Perform regular technical SEO audits on 
 and related sites, identifying and resolving issues related to crawlability, indexation, site speed, and structured data.

• Conduct in-depth keyword research tailored to recruitment, carrier opportunities, and hiring maps to capture driver-specific search intent.

• Optimize website content, meta tags, headers, images, and internal linking structures to enhance organic rankings.



Content and Performance

• Collaborate with the content team to ensure all new recruiting scripts, job descriptions, and web pages are created with SEO/GEO best practices in mind.

• Monitor, track, and report on key KPIs (organic traffic, rankings, CTR, conversions) using Google Analytics, Google Search • • • • Console, and proprietary SEO software.

• Analyze search query data to identify opportunities for achieving "Position Zero" (featured snippets) and better serving voice search queries.

• Proactively stay current with search engine algorithm updates, industry trends, and new GEO features.



Technical and Link Building

• Develop and manage strategies for acquiring high-quality backlinks and improving overall site authority.

• Ensure proper implementation of schema markup and other structured data formats.

• Manage and monitor all website redirects and error pages.



Required Qualifications and Skills:

• Experience: Minimum of 5 years of proven experience specifically managing and executing successful SEO and GEO campaigns with a proven track record of growing site traffic, backlinks, and ranking keywords.

• Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field preferred.

• Technical Proficiency: Expert-level proficiency with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog).

• Extensive experience with web analytics platforms (Google Analytics 4) and search console tools (Google Search Console).

• Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript as they relate to SEO best practices and site performance.

• Hands-on experience implementing and troubleshooting various forms of Structured Data (Schema Markup).

• GoHighLevel experience a plus

• Core Competencies: Exceptional analytical thinking, strong problem-solving ability for technical SEO issues, excellent communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail.

• Adaptability: Must be able to quickly adjust strategies in response to algorithm changes.



Work Environment Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

• Internet: Fast and reliable internet (minimum 100mbps) and a backup internet solution.

• Power: Backup generator capable of powering computer equipment for 8 hours in case of power outage.

• Workstation: Quiet, professional workspace free from background noise.

• Equipment: Noise-canceling microphone/headset, camera capabilities for internal meetings, and a capable smartphone.

• Availability: Candidates must be available to work during company working hours 7:30AM - 4:30PM CST Monday - Friday and be present at all company meetings.



How to Apply:

Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply by submitting their resume to 
 include "SEO/GEO Specialist Application" in the subject line. If you have project examples or screenshots of websites you've helped grow traffic for, we would love to see them!

title: Marketing & CRM Specialist
description:
**Please communicate through this website on not
**



Taking Care of Our Customers-

You ensure Maple Ag & Outdoor’s story reaches the right people, with a clear and consistent brand message that builds trust and generates leads.

Every campaign, video, and post connects customers to the experience and reliability Maple is known for.



Taking Care of Your Teammates-

You collaborate with the Dealer Principal, sales, rentals, and service teams to tell our story effectively.

You coordinate and communicate in advance — sending out a monthly video content schedule so the team knows what’s coming and can prepare accordingly.

You encourage creativity while protecting brand standards and consistency.



Taking Care of Your Workload and Tasks-

-Conduct regular interviews and strategy sessions with the Dealer Principal to align the marketing roadmap with Maple’s goals.

-Develop and maintain a quarterly and annual marketing plan with measurable results.

-Manage and optimize our CRM system (PipeDrive or equivalent) — automating reminders, workflows, and follow-ups.

-Send daily CRM reminders to ensure team accountability, and provide a weekly CRM report to the Dealer Principal and management team.

-Circulate a monthly video schedule outlining the themes, staff participants, and target dates for content creation.

-Oversee execution of all marketing campaigns including social media, digital advertising, print, signage, events, and community involvement.

-Assist in event coordination, community partnerships, and promotions that align with Maple’s values.

-Measure, analyze, and improve marketing performance using clear data.



High-Level Expectations

-Maintain strong alignment between storytelling and measurable outcomes.

-Ensure all marketing materials are accurate, professional, and brand consistent.

-Use automation and analytics to continuously improve lead management and conversion.

-Maintain forward visibility through a clear content plan shared in advance.



How You’ll Be Measured

-Quality and timeliness of campaigns and content.

-CRM accuracy, automation, and lead conversion rate.

-Consistency of monthly marketing plans and communication with the team.

-Growth in customer engagement, inquiries, and brand visibility.



Fit Statement-

You’re both creative and analytical — a marketer who loves connecting ideas to results.

You thrive where storytelling meets systems, and you enjoy planning ahead so the team is always prepared.

You bring energy, curiosity, and discipline to every campaign — a natural blend of creativity (high I), accountability (high C), and balanced drive (moderate D).

description:
Customer Service Representative – Women's Fashion | Remote | Long-Term

Full-Time | Remote



We run a women's fashion dropshipping business and we're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our team for the long haul. We have clear systems, SOPs, and templates in place — we just need the right person to execute them consistently and professionally.

If you love helping people, take pride in clean communication, and want stable long-term work with a team that supports your growth, read on.



What You'll Be Doing

Responding to customer
s regarding orders, tracking, refunds, replacements, and sizing — within a 24-hour window

Following our pre-written templates and SOPs precisely and consistently

Managing and resolving customer complaints in a polite, professional manner

Logging refunds, complaints, and replacements accurately in Google Sheets

Generating weekly reports per store

Flagging recurring issues to the team lead

Contributing to improving our support documentation over time

 (team communication)

Someone who is organized, reliable, and consistent — we have zero tolerance for duplicate
s, vague answers, or off-topic replies

Available to start immediately

Someone who communicates well

$3.00/hour 

Full-time, long-term role (starting with a 2-week paid trial)

Video training, SOPs,
 templates, and worksheets provided

title: Business Development Manager
description:
****** MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED ******



We are a provider of advanced network communications and technology solutions for consumers, small businesses, enterprise organizations, and carrier partners across the U.S.



About the Role:

The Major Account Development Manager will focus on business development, by selling our full suite of strategic products and services to an assigned geographic base of customers. Our goal is to increase wallet share, increase customer satisfaction with us, reduce churn, and increase our customer base utilization of strategic next-gen services. The Major Account Development Manager will leverage a full support team consisting of an Sales Director and Project Management team



What You’ll Do:



Develop and maintain a comprehensive understanding of our sales process, products, and solutions to ensure customers are under contract with the most strategic product set.

Develop a deep understanding of a customer’s business, corporate priorities, and industry to effectively identify solutions that align with the customer’s strategy and needs.

Develop, own, and document the multi-faceted account plan and growth strategy for each customer;

manage priorities and eco-system partners to meet established milestones and achieve sales growth objectives. A

ct with a sense of urgency and work in close partnership with the Customer Success organization, to assure customer issues are resolved quickly.

Develop and implement plans to create additional opportunities to cross-sell and up-sell accounts and increase overall total customer spend.

Manage a pipeline of opportunities in Upgrade to see actual info including generation of accurate forecasts and attainment of assigned quotas.

Participate in, and successfully complete, all required training; participate in teaUpgrade to see actual infoetings and activities as required



Do You Have?

Verifiable record of success in enterprise-level sales, owning a customer base, and driving full life-cycle management of sales, conversions, and renewals.

Prior strategic account management and consultative sales experience selling multiple products and solutions to medium and large businesses.

Strong interpersonal skills, organization skills, time management skills, listening skills, presentation skills, verbal, and written communication skills.

Ability to confidently network, build rapport, and develop trusted relationships overtime to execute mid to long-term account plans.

Excellent presentation skills and ability to speak with business professionals at all levels in an organization and across multiple lines of business.

Strong PC skills, including expertise in MS Office.

Experience in building account plans and leading customer business reviews (MBRs and QBRs).

Experience driving strategic consulting services into new accounts while consistently achieving or exceeding sales goals by generating and maintaining a qualified pipeline.

Even Better:

Strong business, financial and technical acumen with negotiation and closing proficiency.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Professional Video Editor Needed – Long Term (Social Media Agency)



We are a growing social media marketing agency looking for highly skilled video editors for long term collaboration.



You will be editing content for a variety of industries including beauty, commercial brands, construction companies, automotive, lifestyle businesses, and high end service brands.



We will provide raw footage, references, and creative direction, and we are looking for editors who can transform this into high quality, engaging, and visually impressive content.



Requirements:



• Edit Instagram Reels, TikTok, and short/long form content

• Advanced transitions synced to music beats

• Motion graphics and dynamic text animations

• Subtitles and engaging captions

• Ability to create high-end cinematic edits

• Experience with AI tools, CGI elements, and creative visual effects is highly valued

• Strong understanding of viral social media editing styles

• Fast turnaround time (24–48 hours preferred)



What we are looking for:

• Reliable long term editor

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow creative direction

• Someone who can produce engaging edits that perform well on social media



Opportunity:

• Long term position

• Consistent weekly work

• Potential to grow into a full-time role as we scale



To apply:

Start your application with the word “DELUX” so we know you read the full job description.



Send 3 of your best video edits (preferably short form content such as Reels, TikTok, or Shorts).



Briefly tell us what software you use and your experience level.



Important:

We work on a per video basis (not hourly) to keep workflow clear and scalable.

We will start with a small number of videos per week (3–5) and increase volume over time for the right editor.



We work with premium clients who expect high quality edits, so we are looking for editors who are passionate about creating visually impressive and engaging content.

title: Executive VA with Content Creation / Social Media Management Experience
description:
Hi,



First, thank you for taking time to check out this invitation to join our team.



Watch this quick video message I made for you:

==> 



Our company is growing, and we’re looking for a talented, detail-oriented, and creative tea
mber to help us with real estate and mortgage marketing projects.



After 20+ years in small business, I’ve learned that the right people are everything. Our team’s loyalty, dedication, and passion are what fuel our growth — so choosing the right co-worker (that’s you ????) matters a lot.



YOUR ROLE

You’ll work closely with the team leader to:

- Create short and long-form content for our social media

- Create evergreen content & lead magnets to attract leads

- Manage and engage our online communities

- Handle CRM communication with customers and prospects

- Create flyers, social posts, and other marketing materials

- Learn and take on new responsibilities over time



WE’RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO:

- Has great attention to detail (if you’re the type who spots typos or misaligned text, we’ll get along well!)

- Has an eye for good design. You don’t have to be a pro designer, but you know what looks “off” and how to fix it

- Can learn new tools and systems independently. We value problem solvers who figure things out

- Enjoys consistency and clear communication





Has at least:

- 1 year minimum experience as Content Creator

- 1 year minimum experience managing social media channels



DETAILS

- Schedule: Monday–Friday

- Hours: US Eastern Time, Part time or Full time

- Location: Remote (team based in Boston, MA)





HOW TO APPLY

- Please complete the VA Hiring Questionnaire below.

title: Maintenance Coordinator for Property Management
description:
Altus Property Partners is a leading property management and real estate investment firm specializing in residential and multifamily properties. We are committed to maintaining high standards in property management by ensuring effective maintenance and prompt resolution of tenant, owners issues. We seek a dedicated Maintenance Coordinator to join our team and contribute to our mission of enhancing property value and tenant satisfaction. 



 Responsibilities: 



 Maintenance Coordination: 



- Oversee general maintenance and coordinate specialized vendor services as required. 

- Troubleshoot minor maintenance issues to determine if in-house staff or third-party vendors should be deployed. 

- Manage and schedule repairs, ensuring efficient resolution and high-quality service. 

- Utilize Property Meld to communicate directly with tenants and vendors, facilitating transparent and direct interaction. 



 Vendor and Project Management: 



- Source and evaluate vendors, obtaining estimates and adding new vendors to our systems. 

- Negotiate pricing where applicable, aiming to optimize costs while maintaining service quality. 

- Coordinate with in-house maintenance teams and external contractors to ensure timely completion of work. 



 Reporting and Performance Monitoring: 



- Monitor and report on key performance indicators such as speed of repair, tenant satisfaction ratings, response times, and cost management through Property Meld. 



 Tenant Relations: 



- Manage tenant interactions primarily through Property Meld to ensure all communications are logged and actionable. 

- Provide exceptional customer service, addressing tenant needs and ensuring satisfaction with maintenance efforts. 



 Emergency Management: 



- Handle maintenance emergencies during business hours, with management taking over after hours. 

- Develop protocols to ensure quick response and effective resolution of emergency maintenance issues. 

3

 Essential Qualifications: 



- Experience: Prior experience as a Maintenance Coordinator, preferably within a property management or real estate setting. Familiarity with general maintenance tasks and vendor management is essential. 

- Technical Skills: Proficiency in using property management software such as Buildium, Property Meld, and GoHighLevel CRM. 

- Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly convey repair needs and coordinate effectively between tenants, vendors, and management. 

- Problem-Solving Skills: Strong analytical abilities and problem-solving skills to handle maintenance issues efficiently and devise effective solutions. 

- Organizational Skills: Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, capable of managing multiple tasks simultaneously under tight deadlines. 



 Working Conditions: 



- This position is fully remote and requires the Maintenance Coordinator to be available during US Central Time hours. The role includes standard working hours with potential for occasional weekend and evening work to address urgent maintenance issues. 

  

 Compensation and Benefits: 



- Competitive salary based on experience 

- Opportunities for professional development and career growth 

- Supportive work environment focused on innovation and efficiency 



This is a full-time job.



US Central Standard Time Working Hours



Application Process: 



To get an interview, please send an
 to 
 (Exact
 subject: Altus Maintenance Coordinator) the following:

1. Summary of your work experience. Please highlight your executive/admin assistant experience.

2. PDF copy of your Resume/CV.

3. A screenshot of your internet speed. 
/

4. A voice recording of a quick introduction of yourself.

5. PDF copy of DISC test results. Use this link for the test - 
/disc/



Please include your favorite color in your submission.

title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.

title: CREATIVE PROJECT MANAGER (META ADS & VIDEO CONTENT) – FULL-TIME
description:
IMPORTANT: A 1-minute video introduction is REQUIRED to be considered for this role. Applications submitted without a video will not be reviewed.



About the Role

We are a performance-driven Meta ads agency producing high volumes of short-form video ads for service-based businesses. We are hiring a Creative Project Manager to own creative workflows, timelines, and delivery across multiple client accounts. This role is focused on execution, organization, and accountability, not creative direction.



Key Responsibilities

You will manage creative production timelines from script to video to final ad delivery. You will track deliverables across multiple clients, assign and follow up on tasks, coordinate with copywriters, editors, and internal tea
mbers, and ensure deadlines are consistently met. You will maintain organized project boards and documentation, identify bottlenecks early, and keep projects moving without constant supervision. You will perform basic quality control to ensure assets are complete and ready before moving to the next stage.



What This Role Does Not Include

This role does not include writing ad copy, creating offers, client strategy calls, media buying, video editing, or graphic design.



Required Skills & Experience

You must have experience managing projects, workflows, or operations in a creative, marketing, or agency environment. Strong organizational skills, clear written and verbal English communication, attention to detail, and comfort holding tea
mbers accountable are required. You must be reliable, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities at once.



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience working with marketing agencies, familiarity with video or ad production workflows, and experience using tools such as Notion, Slack, Google Drive, 
, ClickUp, Trello, or Asana.



Work Expectations

You must be available full-time during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST, have a reliable internet connection, communicate daily with the team, follow SOPs, and take ownership of timelines and execution.



Compensation & Growth

Starting pay is $700/month USD, with performance-based increases and long-term growth opportunities as the agency scales.



Application Instructions

To be considered, you MUST submit a 1-minute video introduction. In the video, explain your experience managing creative or marketing projects, the tools you’ve used, and why you’re a strong fit for this role. Upload the video via Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



Written Questions

Please answer: What tools have you used to manage projects or workflows? Have you worked with creative or marketing teams before? Are you able to work full-time from 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (night shift in the Philippines)?



Final Note

This role requires ownership, organization, and follow-through. Applications without a 1-minute video will not be considered.

description:

Write ad scripts for Meta 
 & Instagram), and



Manage creative flow and execution to ensure scripts, videos, and ads move smoothly through production.



This is a hybrid role that combines hands-on ad writing with ownership of creative workflow.



Ad Copy & Script Writing Responsibilities

You will write short-for
ta ad scripts designed to be spoken on camera for
 and Instagram. You will create modular ad scripts that include multiple hook variations, multiple pain or problem openings, and multiple call-to-action or offer endings. Scripts must sound natural, conversational, and clear when spoken, not like traditional marketing copy. You will follow defined frameworks, tone, and structure, and revise scripts quickly based on feedback and performance.



Creative Project Management Responsibilities

You will manage the creative production flow from script to video to final ad. This includes tracking deliverables across multiple clients, coordinating with editors, videographers, and internal tea
mbers, ensuring deadlines are met, identifying bottlenecks, and keeping projects moving without constant supervision. You will maintain organized project boards and documentation, ensure creative assets are complete and accurate, and perform basic quality control before assets move forward.



What This Role Does Not Include

This role does not include client strategy calls, offer creation or pricing decisions, media buying, ad account management, graphic design, or video editing.



Required Skills & Experience

You must have experience writing Meta or paid social ad copy and experience writing scripts meant to be spoken on camera. You should have a strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and short-form ad structure. Experience managing tasks, timelines, or creative workflows is required. Strong written and verbal English skills, high attention to detail, organization, and comfort following up with tea
mbers to maintain accountability are essential.



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience working in a marketing or advertising agency, familiarity with service-based business advertising, and experience using tools such as Notion, Slack, Google Drive, 
, ClickUp, Trello, or Asana are a plus.



Work Expectations

You must be available full-time during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST, have a reliable internet connection, manage multiple priorities independently, take feedback well, and operate with a strong ownership mindset by proactively identifying and solving problems.



Compensation & Growth

Starting pay is $700/month USD, with performance-based increases available over time and long-term growth opportunities as the agency scales.



Application Instructions (Read Carefully)

To be considered, you MUST submit a 1-minute video introduction. In the video, explain your experience writing Meta ads or short-form video scripts, your experience managing creative tasks or workflows, and why you are a strong fit for this hybrid role. Upload the video via Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



Written Questions

Please answer the following in your application: Have you written scripts specifically for Meta ads before? If yes, briefly describe. Have you managed creative projects or deadlines before? Are you able to work full-time from 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (night shift in the Philippines)?



Final Note

This role requires both execution and ownership. You will be writing ads and ensuring creative production stays organized and on schedule. Applications without a 1-minute video will not be considered.

title: Social Media Content Producer *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Producer to own the daily execution, publishing, and production operations behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the hands-on execution role on the social team. You take creative direction and turn it into finished, polished, published content - fast, clean, and on-brand, every single day.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You report to the Content Strategist who sets the creative direction and generates the ideas. Your job is to bring those ideas to life - editing, designing, scheduling, publishing, tracking performance, and keeping the entire production machine running smoothly.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented executor who can produce high-quality short-form content at volume, manage publishing workflows across multiple platforms, and actively use AI tools to increase speed and output. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Produce 2 to 3 short-form videos and supporting graphics per day, including editing, trimming, captioning, and polishing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Execute on creative briefs and direction provided by the Content Strategist, turning concepts into finished, platform-ready assets.

- Design on-brand visuals such as carousels, text graphics, thumbnails, and infographics that support the creator's style and messaging.

- Plan, schedule, and publish short-form content across all platforms while maintaining a balanced mix of educational, inspirational, and trend-based formats.

- Follow short-form trends including audio, hooks, captions, and editing styles, and flag relevant opportunities to the Content Strategist.

- Monitor performance metrics weekly and provide insights, recommendations, and data summaries based on watch time, retention, views, and engagement.

- Source and organize trending sounds, audio, and reference content to support the Content Strategist's ideation process.

- Coordinate collaboration posts and identify smart opportunities for creator crossovers and partnership content.

- Keep systems clean in Asana and Google Drive, ensuring clear task ownership, file naming, version control, and a predictable content runway.

- Use AI tools to streamline editing, captioning, clipping, and repurposing workflows to increase daily output and reduce turnaround time.

- Continuously improve and document production workflows to increase the efficiency and scalability of the content system.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience creating and publishing short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube Shorts with proven results.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and have an eye for what looks premium.

- Editing and design expertise in short-form video editing using Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut, and strong design ability using Canva or Photoshop, including thumbnails, carousels, text graphics, and supporting visuals.

- Strong ability to take creative direction and execute it accurately and quickly with minimal revision cycles.

- Deep platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats, with a clear understanding of distribution mechanics and platform culture.

- Experience managing posting schedules and publishing workflows across multiple platforms, with strong attention to detail, file organization, and systems management.

- Ability to track and interpret performance metrics such as watch time, retention, views, and engagement, and surface insights to inform strategy.

- AI-forward operator who actively uses AI tools in editing and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with the Content Strategist, editors, and cross-functional teams.

- Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively while operating in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating editing, design, and creative execution across multiple short-form formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- Social content consistently published within 24 to 48 hours of long-form production wrap.

- Sustained growth in high-quality engagement including shares, saves, retention, and audience sentiment.

- A cohesive, premium social presence that reinforces and amplifies the creator's broader ecosystem.

- Clean, organized production systems with predictable output and minimal missed deadlines.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of video editing.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Salary range

- Php 50,000 - Php 70,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Shortform Editor - Meta Ads
description:
About CONKA:

CONKA is a brain-performance company on a mission to advance human potential. Born from a first-hand experience with the cognitive toll of repeated concussions, CONKA was founded by Humphrey Bodington and Harry Glover — two former rugby players who identified a glaring gap: physical performance gets all the attention, while brain performance gets none.

CONKA is built to change that.

At its core, CONKA is a daily brain-performance system — not a supplement, not a nootropic pill, not a quick fix. The system combines functional liquid shots (CONKA Flow & CONKA Clear), a cognition-tracking mobile app, and an ongoing commitment to scientific research and trials. Every element is built around one philosophy: small, consistent daily inputs lead to measurable cognitive improvements that compound over time.





The Role:

As a Video Editor at CONKA, you'll work directly within our content pipeline — cutting and assembling raw footage from UGC creators and our Founders into polished Meta Ads. Every edit comes with a creative brief from our team, giving you clear direction on objective, format, and feel. Once delivered, CONKA reviews your edit and provides structured feedback. Your job is to take that input and produce work that's ready to run.

This is a per-task role — you get paid for every edit you successfully deliver. The more you take on, the more you earn. Compensation per task is TBC and will be confirmed during onboarding.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Editing raw UGC and Founder footage into Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) using provided creative briefs

- Producing content that reflects CONKA's positioning — clean, confident, research-led, and human

- Incorporating CONKA review feedback and delivering revisions promptly

- Maintaining consistent quality and fast turnaround across your task queue





What We're Looking For:

- Solid video editing skills

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro

- A strong instinct for short-form content — pacing, hooks, captions, and what makes someone stop scrolling

- An understanding of Meta ad formats and best practices

- The ability to follow a creative brief closely and act on feedback without losing 
ntum

- A portfolio or showreel of previous edits — short-form or social content preferred





How It Works

1. Apply — Submit your application with a short intro and a link to your portfolio or previous work

2. Trial Task — Shortlisted applicants will be given a trial edit to complete — raw footage, a brief, and a deadline (CONKA will pay you for your time if trial task is accepted)

3. Review — CONKA evaluates your edit against our quality standards

4. Onboarding — Pass the trial and you're in. We'll get you briefed, set up, and ready to go





Perks & Incentives

We believe in rewarding people who show up and perform consistently. Editors who hit and exceed quality KPIs will unlock performance bonuses — additional monetary rewards on top of per-task pay. The better your work, the more you earn.

title: Visual Storytelling Video Editor (Typography-Focused)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a visual-first Video Editor who can turn ideas into clear, compelling, authority-building short-form content.



This is not about flashy edits — it’s about communicating ideas visually. You’ll use typography, pacing, and structure to simplify complex concepts, highlight key insights, and keep viewers engaged from start to finish.



If you think in visual hierarchy, text rhythm, and clarity, this role is for you.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

• Review and cull raw footage, identifying the most insightful 
nts

• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) focused on education and authority

• Structure content for clarity and retention (hook ? insight ? reinforcement ? takeaway)

• Use typography as a primary storytelling tool — headlines, emphasis, pacing, and flow

• Design edits with strong visual hierarchy and readability

• Apply AI tools (e.g. Google Gemini, Google Flow) for enhancement and efficiency

• Refine pacing to ensure ideas land clearly and keep attention

• Enhance videos with intentional motion design, clean transitions, and minimal but effective effects

• Deliver content that is clear, sharp, and high-performing



_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Output & Turnaround Expectations

• Produce approximately 40 short-form videos per month (10 reels per week)

• Typical turnaround: 1–2 days per video

• Maintain clarity and consistency at speed

• Stay responsive, communicative, and efficient with revisions

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



What We’re Looking For

• 2–5 years editing short-form educational or talking-head content

• Strong instinct for clarity, structure, and audience retention

• Excellent use of typography for emphasis, pacing, and storytelling

• Ability to simplify ideas through visual hierarchy and editing choices

• Solid fundamentals in color, sound, and clean editing

• Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar

• Strong communication in spoken and written English

• Reliable, independent, and fast-moving

• A thinking editor — someone who shapes the message, not just assembles clips



_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Examples













***Only Apply if you can match this editing style with precision and consistency.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



This Role May Not Be the Best Fit If…

• You rely heavily on templates without shaping the message

• You treat text as basic captions instead of a storytelling layer

• You prefer aesthetic edits over clear communication

• You need step-by-step direction for every edit

• Fast turnaround and feedback cycles feel overwhelming

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



How to Apply



Please send to 



Your portfolio / showreel (short-form content)

HIGHLIGHT 2–3 examples that demonstrate clear, engaging educational storytelling with showcasing strong typography use 



Feel free to include a short Loom video introducing your approach.

Shortlisted candidates will go through a short interview, followed by a paid trial work $20 usd / reel

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Rouge Care



Rouge Care is a fast-growing Canadian wellness brand specializing in red light therapy equipment. We ship to customers across Canada, the United States, Australia, and the United Kingdom. Our team is small, tight-knit, and serious about giving customers an exceptional experience — from their first question to long after their panel arrives.



We’re building out a 24/7 support team and looking for sharp, empathetic people to join us.



Customer Support Representative (1)



Shift 1: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM PHT

Days off: Saturday & Sunday



What you’ll be doing:



1. Responding to customer tickets and live chat through our helpdesk (Gorgias)

2. Handling order status inquiries, shipping questions, and delivery issues

3. Processing return and exchange requests following our standard procedures

4. Escalating complex issues to senior tea
mbers when needed

5. Handing off open tickets at shift end with clear notes for the next agent

6. Maintaining accurate records in our helpdesk system



What we’re looking for:



* At least 1 year of customer service experience, ideally in e-commerce or retail

* Strong written English — clear, friendly, and professional

* Comfortable working independently without close supervision

* Reliable home office setup: stable internet connection, quiet workspace, headset

* Experience with Gorgias, Zendesk, or a similar helpdesk is a plus

* Experience with Shopify is a plus but not required



Customer Support Representative (2)



Shift 2: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM PHT

Days off: Saturday & Sunday



What you’ll be doing:



1. Managing the overnight ticket queue — responding to
s and chats that come in during low-volume hours

2. Clearing the backlog so the Eastern team starts each morning with a clean inbox

3. Handling order status inquiries, shipping questions, and delivery issues

4. Processing return and exchange requests following our standard procedures

5. Escalating urgent issues (lost shipments, damaged goods) with clear documentation

6. Preparing a brief handoff summary for the morning Eastern shift each day



What we’re looking for:



* At least 1 year of customer service experience, ideally in e-commerce or retail

* Strong written English — clear, accurate, and efficient

* Comfortable working in a low-supervision environment and managing your own queue

* Reliable home office setup: stable internet, quiet workspace, headset

* Detail-oriented — you’ll be the last person touching tickets before the daytime team picks up

* Experience with Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk is a plus



Customer Support Representative (3)



Shift 3: Mixed — two weekday shifts and two weekend shifts

Days off: Monday, Thursday, and Sunday



What you’ll be doing:



1. Owning weekend support — you’re the primary CSR on duty for Rouge Care customers on Saturdays and Sundays (ET)

2. Handling the full range of customer inquiries: order status, shipping, returns, product questions

3. Managing live chat and
 tickets during high-activity weekend hours

4. Covering two weekday morning shifts to support the Eastern team during peak hours

5. Escalating complex issues with thorough documentation so nothing falls through the cracks



What we’re looking for:



* At least 1–2 years of customer service experience in e-commerce, retail, or a high-volume support environment

* Excellent written English — fast, clear, and warm

* Comfortable with longer shifts (two 12-hour weekend shifts per week — see schedule)

* Reliable and self-directed: on weekends you’re running the show, so we need someone who takes ownership

* Reliable home office setup: stable internet, quiet workspace, headset

* Experience with Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk is a plus



Schedule for Shift 3:

Tuesday: 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT

Wednesday: 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT

Friday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM PHT

Saturday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM PHT



Kindly send your resume and answer the questions below.



1. Describe a time you handled a frustrated customer. What did you do?

2. What helpdesk software have you used? (Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk, etc.)

3. Do you have a dedicated workspace at home with a stable internet connection?

3. This role includes two 12-hour shifts on weekends. Are you comfortable with this schedule?

4. What is your expected monthly salary in PHP?

title: Virtual Periodontal Insurance Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Periodontal Dental Insurance Coordinator

About Our Practice



At Firewheel Dental Implants and Periodontics, we are dedicated to providing exceptional dental care in a welcoming, patient-centered environment. Our team is passionate about creating healthy, confident smiles while delivering outstanding service and compassionate care. We value teamwork, integrity, and attention to detail and we’re looking for an Insurance Coordinator who shares our commitment to excellence and efficiency.



Position Summary



The Dental Insurance Coordinator is responsible for managing all aspects of dental insurance processing to ensure accurate and timely reimbursement for services rendered. This position plays a vital role in maintaining the financial health of the practice through efficient claims management, payment posting, and communication with patients and insurance carriers.



Key Responsibilities



Post recurring payments accurately and reconcile patient accounts.



Review Remote Lite for rejected claims and resolve discrepancies promptly.



Follow up on 2-week post-op claims daily to ensure timely payment processing.



Work the 60/90-day aging report to address outstanding claims and overdue balances.



Scan Explanation of Benefits (EOBs) and attach payments to the corresponding patient records.



Distribute pre-authorizations (Preds) to treatment coordinators efficiently.



Verify dental insurance eligibility, benefits, and coverage details prior to treatment.



Prepare and submit insurance claims, ensuring all procedures and documentation are accurate.



Monitor and follow up on unpaid or denied claims, including appeals when necessary.



Communicate effectively with patients and treatment coordinators regarding insurance coverage, estimates, and balances.



Stay up to date with insurance policies, dental coding, and industry standards. Please include #Periorocks! in message to be considered.



Qualifications



High school diploma or equivalent required; dental billing or office administration certification preferred.



1–2 years of experience in a dental office setting with a focus on insurance coordination or billing.



Proficiency with dental practice management software (e.g., Dentrix).



Strong knowledge of dental terminology, procedure codes (CDT), and insurance claim processes.



Excellent organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills.



Detail-oriented, dependable, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

title: Creative Strategist (Ecommerce / fulltime)
description:
About Us

We are building a high-performance ecommerce operation focused on problem-solving products. Our growth is driven by a strong creative engine where testing, iteration, and speed are everything. We work with structured systems, clear KPIs, and a constant flow of new ad concepts.



Role Overview

We are looking for a Creative Strategist who understands how to generate winning ad concepts at scale. You will be responsible for ideation, analyzing winning creatives, and translating insights into high-converting ad angles, hooks, and scripts.



This is not a basic content role. You need to deeply understand what makes ads convert and how to systematically produce new winners. A key part of this role is also experience with AI tools, especially for generating static creatives through strong prompting.



What You’ll Do



- Create high-quality creative batches across:

    • Iterations (improving existing winners)

    • Imitations (replicating competitor ads)

    • Ideation (new concepts from scratch)

- Research competitors daily using ad libraries and swipe winning creatives

- Extract insights from Reddit, Amazon reviews, and customer pain points

- Develop clear angles, hooks, and concepts based on proven data

- Brief creatives in a structured way so they can execute fast and accurately

- Generate or guide the creation of static ads using AI tools and prompting

- Work closely with media buyers to double down on what’s working

- Continuously improve concepts based on performance data



What We’re Looking For



- Strong experience in dropshipping or ecommerce advertising

- Deep understanding of:

    • Hooks that stop scroll

    • Emotional triggers and pain points

    • Direct response marketing

- Ability to break down why an ad works and replicate that success

- Experience with:

    • VSLs, UGC ads, advertorial angles

    •
 Ads ecosystem

    • AI tools for generating creatives (especially statics via prompting)

- Comfortable working with structured systems like:

    • Winner trackers

    • Creative briefs

    • Concept sheets

- Fluent in English



How We Work



- Everything is data-driven

- Winning creatives are tracked and iterated fast

- We prioritize speed, clarity, and execution

- No guessing, everything is based on proven angles and patterns



You Are a Good Fit If



- You can look at an ad and instantly understand why it works

- You know how to turn one winning concept into multiple variations

- You actively study competitors and trends

- You understand how to use AI to speed up and improve creative output

- You think in angles, not just visuals

- You move fast and take ownership



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive compensation based on experience and performance

- Paid leave

- Health costs reimbursement

- Strong upside for the right person



How to Apply



- Examples of ads or concepts you created

- Breakdown of at least one winning ad and why it worked

- Your experience with ecommerce or dropshipping



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to build and scale with us.

Upload, clean, and manage data in Google Sheets integrated with ClickUp/Make

Document all systems clearly for long-term maintenance

title: PHP 150K-200K+ | Remote High-Performance Closer (US Client)
description:
****PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!! THOSE WHO APPLY THROUGH OLJ, WE WILL NOT SHORTLIST. PLEASE APPLY ON THE LINK BELOW THIS JD******



PMHOA Pro Is Hiring a High-Performance Closer (Full Cycle – Call - Meet - Close)

Remote • Full-Time Contractor • Competitive Compensation + Growth



**APPLY HERE: 
/careers/51



PMHOA Pro is the leading outsourced business development partner helping home service providers (roofers, remediation, HVAC, cleaning, plumbing, landscaping, etc.) win relationships with Property Managers and HOAs across the U.S.



We are expanding our elite sales team and looking for a full-cycle Closer who can call inbound/warm opportunities, meet with them on Zoom, and close deals confidently.



If you thrive in a fast-moving sales environment and have the numbers to back up your performance, we want to talk.





// What You’ll Be Doing



You will own the full sales cycle:

- Calling qualified prospects already in our CRM or sourcing your own leads

- Running booked and self-scheduled meetings via Zoom (as needed)

- Conducting structured discovery conversations

- Presenting services, pricing, and territory options

- Handling objections with confidence

- Negotiating and finalizing agreements

- Handing off closed deals to onboarding and fulfillment



Additional responsibilities include:

- Managing and updating pipeline stages in HubSpot

- Calling unworked and follow-up leads in the queue

- Collaborating with sales team to increase show-up rates

- Reporting weekly numbers and deal progress



// Role Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Proven experience closing warm B2B leads

- Strong phone presence and comfort calling prospects directly

- Excellent discovery skills and active listening

- Ability to control the call without sounding pushy

- Confidence running full discovery ? offer ? objection ? close

- Organized, reliable, and process-driven with strong CRM discipline

- Data-focused mindset (show-up rate, close rate, revenue tracked)

- Ability to commit to consistent weekly availability



[!] This is not cold calling strangers. Every contact is warm, pre-educated, and entered by Setters, Webinars, or our Research team [!]



// Bonus Points (We Can Train These)

- Experience selling to home service companies

- HubSpot or similar CRM familiarity

- Prior remote sales or BDR roles

- Understanding of property management relationships



You don’t need to know our industry — but you must already know how to close.



// Must Submit to Be Considered

- We don’t accept guesses — only performance. Please provide:

- Past 6–12 months closing metrics, including:

--- Show-up rate

--- Close rate

--- Average deal size

--- Total revenue closed

--- Industry sold into

--- 3–5 recorded closing calls (highly preferred)

- Short Loom or video introduction

- Brief outline of your closing method or call flow



// What You Get

- High volume of warm, qualified opportunities

- Proven scripts, call flows, and presentation frameworks

- Continuous training, coaching, and leadership development

- Fast-moving team with significant growth potential

- Flexible remote work with performance-based earnings



// Do Not Apply If You Are

- Trying to “get into closing” without a track record

- Easily discouraged or unwilling to make outbound calls

- Avoidant of CRM usage or data updates

- Dependent on high-pressure sales tactics

- Uncomfortable being measured on performance



// PAY RATE:

- Pay: PHP80K-120K/month DOE + Commission

- Commission: Paid per signed contract [uncapped]

- Earning Potential: High-performers hit PHP200,000+ per month

- Commission is uncapped — show us you can close and you’ll write your own paycheck.



// How to Apply

- Send the following:

- Résumé

- Verified sales statistics

- Loom or video introduction (strongly recommended)

- Call recordings (if available)



**APPLY HERE: 
/careers/51

title: Social Media Content Creator & Designer
description:
JOB SUMMARY

High Cotton Stays is a hospitality & property management company and we need help marketing our Boutique Inn properties.  One rated #1 on Trip Advisor (Caroline House Nashville Historic Inn - Nashville, TN), and the newest Inn a brand new start-up with stellar views located in the mountains, ready to launch (Firefly Cowboy Inn - Gatlinburg, TN). We also have a Beach property in Florida which will be third priority on the project list.  We are seeking a highly creative and organized Social Media Content Creator & Designer to join our team. You will be responsible for conceptualizing, designing, and producing engaging social media content (posts, Reels, and ads), managing paid advertising on Meta platforms, contributing to website design, and executing
 marketing campaigns. All social media content must be created, approved, and scheduled at least two weeks in advance. You will collaborate closely with the marketing team during strategy calls and play a key role in driving brand visibility, engagement, and conversions across social media, the website, and
. 



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Social Media Content Creation

o Design and produce high-quality, on-brand posts, Reels, Stories, and other content for Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other platforms.

o Create compelling ad creatives (static, video, and carousel) optimized for performance.

o Ensure all content is fully approved and scheduled at least one week in advance using the platform’s content calendar.



Meta Advertising Management

o Manage, optimize, and monitor paid ad campaigns across Meta platforms 
 & Instagram) using the Meta Business Suite.

o Track performance metrics, A/B test creatives, and adjust campaigns in real time to meet KPIs.



Team Collaboration

o Actively participate in weekly team video meetings / conference calls with CEO and our third-party consultant  to strategize, brainstorm, and align on ad campaigns, content themes, and overall marketing goals. Execute action items resulting from those meetings.



Website Design Support

o Apply strong design expertise to create and update website visuals, landing pages, banners, and user-facing elements.



 Marketing Campaigns

o Design, create, and manage all creative assets for
 campaigns using Mailchimp.

o Build visually appealing
 templates, promotional graphics, and sequences that align with social media and website branding.

o Monitor
 performance and recommend improvements.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPERIENCE

• Proven 3-5 years of professional experience as a Social Media Content Creator, Designer, or similar role.

• Strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in creating posts, Reels, and ad creatives (must be provided during application).

• Hands-on experience managing Meta ads using the Meta Business Suite (including campaign setup, budgeting, audience targeting, and optimization).

• Advanced design skills with proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects), Canva Pro, Figma, or equivalent tools.

• Experience with website design (WordPress, Squarespace, Shopify, or similar platforms) and creating visual assets for web.

• Demonstrated experience designing and managing
 campaigns in Mailchimp (template creation, segmentation, and performance analysis).

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills; ability to work independently while collaborating in a team environment.

• Strong understanding of social media trends, best practices, and platform algorithms.

• Ability and willingness to join recurring team conference calls (schedule will be coordinated).



PREFFERRED SKILLS

• Experience with tools: CapCut, Hootsuite, Later, or Buffer for scheduling.

• Knowledge of analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager insights, Mailchimp).

• Basic understanding of SEO and conversion-focused design.

• Video editing and motion graphics experience.



WHAT WE OFFER

• Competitive compensation, including opportunities for bonuses in addition to the wage/salary.

• Flexible remote work schedule working with a U.S. team that loves to work hard & play hard so we will make it fun!

• Creative freedom and ownership of projects.  Also opportunities to learn as we have a third party consultant on our team who is an expert at successfully launching new hospitality properties, and you will have the opportunity to engage with them on team calls.

• WE ARE GROWING! - Opportunities for new responsibilities and projects, for professional growth in a fast-paced marketing environment



Our newest property is rooted in storytelling galore, and we need your help conveying it!  If you’re a creative powerhouse who thrives on producing scroll-stopping content, managing high-performing ads, and delivering polished designs across social, web, and
, we’d love to hear from you!



How to Apply: Please submit your resume, portfolio (must include social media, ad, website, and
 examples), compensation requirements, and a short introduction explaining why you’re the perfect fit for this role.
