title: Shopify Fulfillment Coordinator & Customer Support Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



We are operating a fast-growing e-commerce home decor brand and are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented E-Commerce Order & Fulfillment Coordinator to support daily operations.



This role is focused on execution, organization, and problem-solving across customer service, supplier coordination, and backend business operations.



You will be responsible for keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes — ensuring customers are supported, orders are handled properly, and internal systems are accurate and up to date.



This is not a casual or entry-level role.

We are looking for someone reliable, proactive, and extremely detail-focused.



If you are highly organized, communicate clearly, and can follow systems exactly, you will thrive in this position.



RESPONSIBILITIES



• Respond to customer
s in a professional, timely manner

• Handle customer orders, tracking, concerns, complaints, and disputes - mitigating profit loss

• Reduce refund/chargeback requests and maintain customer satisfaction

• Track and manage chargebacks and disputes

• Communicate with suppliers regarding orders and fulfillment

• Source products and request quotes from suppliers

• Send order invoices and assist with order processing

• Track refunds, replacements, and resolutions

• Update and maintain Profit & Loss spreadsheet daily

• Organize business data using Google Sheets

• Follow SOPs and internal workflows exactly

• Identify issues and escalate when needed



WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



• No unprofessional or careless communication with customers

• No delayed responses without reason

• No disorganized tracking of data or orders



Our focus is organized, accurate, and professional execution.





TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



•Must have fulfillment operations experience - quoting products, gathering invoices, managing orders with suppliers (REQUIRED)

• Experience with Google Sheets (REQUIRED)

• Ability to create and organize spreadsheets (REQUIRED)

• Experience with Shopify (REQUIRED)

• Ability to learn tools and systems quickly

• Ability to create streamlined SOPs as necessary





DAILY TASKS INCLUDE



• Managing customer support inbox

• Updating order and refund tracking sheets

• Working with suppliers for product quotes, invoices, & fulfillment management

• Monitoring order fulfillment progress

• Logging daily business data (P&L tracking)

• Assisting with operational tasks as needed



IDEAL CANDIDATE



You are:



• Extremely organized 

• Detail-oriented - Not overwhelmed by numbers, multiple tasks and multiple spreadsheets

• Fast but accurate

• Reliable and consistent

• Comfortable handling customer issues

• Able to work independently without constant supervision



PAY



$4–$6/hour depending on experience



If performance is strong, long-term position available.





When applying, please begin your application with the keyword: Cozy



CORE SKILLS REQUIRED



• Strong written English (clear, professional communication)

• Experience with customer service (Shopify e-commerce preferred)

• Experience handling disputes and difficult customers

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to stay organized across multiple tasks

• Ability to follow instructions exactly

title: Real Estate Lead Manager / Appointment Setter
description:
Our company Build to Scale Real Estate specializes in real estate marketing, training, and acquisitions. We serve investor clients as a consultation and coaching company in addition to managing marketing campaigns. We are in constant need of talented virtual assistants and we are seeking a highly organized, proactive Lead Manager to take full ownership of our CRM and ensure no opportunity is left behind.



This is not a basic admin role — you will act as the quarterback of our leads, responsible for nurturing conversations, presenting offers, and helping convert prospects into signed contracts.



Your Core Mission

To manage, nurture, and convert leads inside our CRM into signed contracts through consistent follow-up, speed, and attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities

* Own the CRM completely

    * Ensure every lead is organized, updated, and actively followed up with

    * No lead gets ignored or forgotten

* Speed to Lead

    * Respond to new leads quickly (minutes, not hours)

    * Engage prospects and move conversations forward

* Lead Nurturing & Follow-Up

    * Consistent follow-up via calls, texts, and CRM systems

    * Build rapport and maintain long-term communication with prospects

* Offer Management

    * Generate and present offers to sellers

    * Follow up on all offers until a clear outcome is reached

* Basic Comping (Property Analysis)

    * Pull comparable sales (comps)

    * Assist in determining offer prices

* Assist with Acquisitions

    * Support deal flow and help push leads toward contract

    * Identify motivated sellers and escalate hot opportunities



Performance Expectations

* Minimum 1 signed contract per month generated through follow-up

* Maintain clean, accurate, and up-to-date CRM at all times

* Fast response time and consistent communication with all leads



Ideal Candidate

* Has real estate experience (REI preferred)

* Has worked in lead management or acquisitions before

* Strong English communication skills (written & verbal)

* Confident speaking with U.S.-based sellers

* Detail-oriented and highly organized

* Naturally proactive — does not wait to be told what to do

* Comfortable working inside CRMs and learning new systems quickly



Tools You May Use

* CRM systems (InvestorFuse, REI Reply, or similar)

* Dialers, texting platforms, and

* Zillow, Redfin, or similar for comps



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT – Read Carefully)



To be considered, you must complete ALL steps below:



1. Submit a short voice recording (1–2 minutes)

    * Introduce yourself

    * Describe your real estate experience

    * Explain how you handle follow-up with leads



2. Include your 16Personalities (MBTI) result?(Example: INTP, ESFJ, etc.)



3. Complete this application form:?



Applications that do not follow ALL instructions will NOT be considered.



Why This Role Matters

This position is critical to our business.?We don’t believe in letting leads go cold — every conversation matters, and every lead has potential.

If you take pride in staying organized, following up relentlessly, and turning conversations into deals, this role is for you.

title: Short-Form Video Editor with Social Media Management Expertise (Part-Time to Full-Time Potential)
description:
Hi guys! ????  My name is Mackenzie, I am from the USA! I am currently a travel content creator... one day I want to visit the Philippines! I am also creating a social media management company!



I am currently managing my own socials and building my client base and need help with editing and hopefully in the future (if we are a good fit) I want someone to help me with the management aspects and eventually managing my own social medias.



I am currently handling one client and expanding to up to three, right now we are posting on Instagram, TikTok, and
. And I am seeking a highly skilled short-form video editor (bonus if you can also do long form!). This role starts part-time but has strong potential to evolve into a full-time position as I scale.



As our editor, you'll focus on creating engaging, high-quality reels and short videos that drive engagement (I will give you guidance on the vibes I want to go for). I prioritize professionalism, organization, attention to detail, and the ability to follow instructions precisely. If you have a keen eye for selecting the best takes and can deliver polished content ahead of schedule, this is the opportunity for you.



The current workload begins at 3 reels per week (I will do the posting), with expectations to increase as we onboard more clients and my videos too. In addition to editing, I am looking for someone with a solid grasp of social media management, including strategy (super important), SEO optimization, posting schedules, and running ads. 





Responsibilities:



-Edit short-form videos (reels, TikToks, etc.) using Capcut Pro and Canva (I am also familiar with DaVinci Resolve) ensuring high production quality, smooth transitions, engaging effects, and alignment with client branding.



-Select and incorporate the best takes from raw footage to create compelling narratives.



-Enhance videos with audio editing (mixing music, effects, royalty-free sourcing), motion graphics/basic animations (e.g., text pops, keyframes, etc), and graphic design elements (overlays, text animations)



-Create custom thumbnails and visuals using tools like Canva or Photoshop to boost click-through rates.



- Deliver 3 edited reels (with simple thumbnails) per week initially, with the ability to get ahead of schedule and handle increasing volume (up to daily posts as we grow)



-Assist with social media tasks, including content strategy, SEO for captions/hashtags, scheduling posts on Instagram, TikTok, and
, running ads, managing content calendars, analyzing performance metrics (e.g., engagement insights), and researching trends/hashtags for viral potential.



- Have a good read on AI to make our lives easier! If you are using AI at all, I am not against it, Capcut's AI is great for removing spaces. Incorporate AI tools to streamline workflows and add creative effects. I would love to have someone who is able to bring AI ideas to the business to help us be more effective, but still quality.



Requirements:



Must-Haves:

- Proven expertise in short-form video editing; portfolio or samples required (focus on reels/TikToks).



- Must have access to CapCut Pro



- Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken) for clear instructions and feedback.



- Strong understanding of social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok,
), including trends, algorithms, SEO best practices, posting strategies, and ad campaigns.



-Professional demeanor: reliable, deadline-oriented, proactive in suggesting improvements, and adaptable with strong time management.



- At least 2 years of experience in video editing or social media management; agency experience is a plus.



-Available for part-time work (10-20 hours/week to start)



- Reliable internet, computer setup, and access to necessary software/tools.



Please submit your application with (please read)



A short description explaining why you're a great fit, including your experience with editing reels and social media management (mention any preferred/bonus skills you have)



Your portfolio or links to 3-5 edited short-form videos (reels preferred), including examples of thumbnails, audio edits, or animations if applicable. I can't wait to see your style!



Your hourly rate expectation and availability.



References or testimonials from past clients/employers.



Thanks guys!



Mackenzie ??

nts

title: YouTube Video Editor — Senior Health and Wellness Channel (Long-Term, Part-Time)
description:
YouTube Video Editor — Health & Wellness Channel (Long-Term, Part-Time)

Job Type: Part-Time (with a full-time launch sprint)

Rate: $4–$7/hour (negotiable based on experience)

Hours: 20–25 hrs/week for first 2 weeks ? 10–15 hrs/week ongoing

Schedule: Flexible — async, deadline-based

Start: ASAP



About Us

We will start YouTube channel helping seniors aged 60–80 live healthier, more energetic lives. Our content covers exercises, nutrition, brain health, and sleep — delivered in an uplifting, authoritative style. Think: empowerment, not fear.



We are launching aggressively and need a reliable editor who can hit the ground running from day one.



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Edit 8–12 minute YouTube videos from AI-generated voiceover + stock/AI footage (Runway, Kling)

 • Sync audio (ElevenLabs voiceover) with visuals cleanly

 • Add captions (SRT or auto-styled), lower thirds, and on-screen text

 • Insert B-roll, transitions, and background music at the right pacing

 • Export files to YouTube-ready specs (1080p, correct aspect ratio)

 • Optionally: assist with Canva thumbnail production using provided templates



Important — Please Read Before Applying

We publish daily for the first two weeks at launch. This means approximately 20–25 hours per week during weeks 1 and 2. Each video takes roughly 2.5–3.5 hours to edit.

After the launch sprint, we drop to 3–5 videos per week (~10–18 hrs/week) as our ongoing cadence.



We are telling you this upfront because we want someone who is prepared and excited for the sprint — not surprised by it. If you have other clients and cannot commit to this schedule in the first two weeks, this role is not the right fit right now.



You’re a Great Fit If You…

 • Have at least 1 year of YouTube video editing experience (health, lifestyle, or education niche is a big plus)

 • Are proficient in CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or similar

 • Understand YouTube pacing — you know how to keep a senior audience engaged

 • Are organised, meet deadlines without being chased, and communicate proactively

 • Are comfortable working with AI-generated footage and voiceover (not live talking head)

 • Can take written brand guidelines and apply them consistently without hand-holding



Nice to Have (Bonus Points)

 • Experience editing for a faceless YouTube channel

 • Canva Pro skills for thumbnail creation

 • Familiar with ElevenLabs or similar AI voice tools

 • Basic understanding of YouTube SEO (thumbnail clickability, retention hooks)



What We Offer

 • A clear, exciting launch plan — you’ll know exactly what’s coming

 • Consistent recurring work after launch at a stable 3–5 videos/week

 • Clear briefs and scripts provided every time — no guesswork

 • Room to grow into a Lead Editor role as the channel scales

 • Flexible hours — work when it suits you, deliver by deadline

 • Prompt weekly payment via Wise or PayPal



How to Apply

Please apply through this listing:

 1. 2–3 sample YouTube videos you have edited (links, not files)

 2. A one-paragraph note telling us which software you use and your experience with health or lifestyle content

 3. Your availability during the first two weeks and your desired rate



Applications without sample work will not be reviewed.

We respond to every complete application within 3 business days.



We’re building something long-term. The first two weeks are intense by design — after that, you’ll have stable, well-organised, recurring work with a team that communicates clearly.

title: Client Success Manager – Amazon
description:
Blueco is looking for a proactive, organised, and client-facing Junior Account Manager to support a portfolio of Amazon clients. This role is ideal for someone who understands the Amazon ecosystem, enjoys building strong client relationships, and can confidently manage multiple projects at once.



About the role:

We’re looking for a Junior Account Manager who is confident, personable, and thrives in a client-facing role. Ideal for someone who enjoys building relationships, leading conversations, and becoming a trusted partner to clients.



You’ll be the face of Blueco, managing multiple accounts as the day-to-day contact. You’ll run calls, guide clients through their Amazon journey, and keep them supported and informed—from onboarding and launches to weekly reports and monthly updates. You’ll also work with internal teams to ensure delivery is on track, communication is clear, and accounts progress smoothly.



What you’ll do:

• Manage multiple client accounts and keep workstreams organised.

•  Lead client onboarding and support new launches.

•  Prepare weekly reports and monthly account updates.

•  Communicate with clients clearly and professionally across calls,
, Notion, and Slack.

•  Coordinate with internal teams to keep tasks, deadlines, and deliverables moving.

•  Support Amazon account activity across Seller Central and FBA.

•  Spot issues early and help resolve them quickly.

•  Maintain accurate notes, actions, and follow-ups for each account.



What we’re looking for:

•  Friendly, professional, client-facing manner.

•  Experience or strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central & FBA operations 

•  Strong organisational skills and the ability to manage several clients at once.

•  Confident written and verbal communication.

• Comfortable using Notion and Slack for collaboration and task management.

• A proactive mindset and willingness to learn fast.



Why Blueco:

At Blueco, you’ll work in a fast-moving ecommerce environment where client service, clear communication, and execution matter. You’ll gain exposure to a range of Amazon accounts and develop practical experience across onboarding, launch planning, reporting, and account support.



Ideal candidate:

This role suits someone early in their Amazon or account management career who wants to grow quickly in a hands-on environment. You’ll thrive if you’re methodical, people-friendly, and able to keep lots of moving parts under control without losing the client experience.

 (not just a high-level summary sheet).

4. At the top of your message write not more than 2-3 sentences on why you want this role + why you are a fit.

5. Beneath your 2-3 sentences, please put the answers to the following questions, and include the numbers and the questions to make it easy for us to read.



Please do not write more than what we request below. 

1) Briefly describe your main work experience. What types of tasks have you done?

2) What is your Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets level (5 = Expert, 4 = Advanced, 3 = Intermediate, 2 = Beginner, 1 = None)?

3) On a scale of 1-5, how good is your English?

4) Would you be able to manage PPC leveraging Ai tools (claude)?

5) Which part of this job (which skill) are you best at?

6) Do you have a proper home office setup, and can you work eight consecutive hours (approximately 8am – 5pm) without family interruptions?

title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Starting Rate: $6.00/hour (Increase after 90-day performance review)



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to join our growing team. If you have real experience with US tax preparation and QuickBooks bookkeeping and enjoy working in an organized, systems-driven environment, we encourage you to apply.



Overview

We are looking for a dedicated US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper to support our accounting and tax operations. In this role, you will prepare individual and business tax returns, maintain accurate financial records, and help ensure clients’ books are clean and tax-ready year-round.

This position is ideal for someone who is accurate, dependable, and proactive, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Job Details

As a US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper, you will manage tax preparation and bookkeeping tasks for multiple clients, maintain organized documentation, and support efficient workflows. Your work will play a key role in ensuring compliance, accuracy, and a smooth tax process for our clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Tax Preparation & Compliance

Prepare Individual Tax Returns (Form 1040) and related schedules

Prepare Business Tax Returns (1120, 1120S, 1065)

Handle State and Franchise Tax filings

Review financial records to ensure accuracy and tax readiness

Identify missing information and communicate with the team as needed

Maintain organized digital tax workpapers and documentation



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Perform bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Clean up and correct incomplete or messy books when necessary

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

Ensure books remain accurate and ready for tax filing



Data Entry & Administrative Support

Perform accurate data entry and document management

Upload and organize client files using consistent naming and folder structures

Track tasks and meet internal deadlines

Assist with administrative support related to tax and accounting operations



Systems & Process Improvement

Follow and help improve internal workflows and checklists

Create SOPs and process documentation when needed

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency or reduce errors



What You Bring to the Role

Proven experience preparing US individual and business tax returns

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Experience with TaxSlayer or similar US tax software

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience handling Franchise Taxes

Previous experience working with a US accounting or tax firm



What You Can Expect

Starting rate of $6.00/hour

Performance review after 90 days with opportunity for a pay increase

Long-term position with growth potential

Stable workload and supportive team environment

Opportunity to expand responsibilities based on performance



About the Company

We are a growing accounting and tax services company focused on providing accurate, reliable, and efficient support to our clients. Our goal is to build a strong remote team that values integrity, accountability, and continuous improvement. We believe in long-term relationships and creating opportunities for team members to grow with the company.

If you have real US tax preparation experience and are looking for a long-term remote opportunity, we encourage you to apply.



Application Link: https://forms.gle/n3MHgVGeinh3B2Zg9

title: Apointment Setter - Land Investing
description:
Company: BT Land Group

Position: Appointment Setter

Location: Remote 

Job Type: ~20 Hours/Week



BT Land Group specializes in the acquisition and development of vacant land across the country. Our mission is to transform underutilized properties into valuable assets that benefit communities and stakeholders alike. We are seeking a dedicated and detail-oriented Appointment Setter to join our small but mighty team.



The Appointment Setter will play a crucial role in our land acquisition process by making initial contact with potential sellers, gathering pertinent property information, and setting appointments for further discussions with our owners. This role requires excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to build rapport with potential sellers.



Responsibilities Include-

Review and understand the list of warm leads to identify potential sellers who have shown some interest in selling their vacant land.

Make initial contact with leads through phone calls, introducing yourself and the purpose of your call

Ask specific questions to gather detailed information about the property, including its location, size, zoning, current use, and any other relevant characteristics.

Confirm the ownership status and obtain information about any co-owners or other stakeholders involved in the property.

Determine the lead's level of interest in selling their land by asking about their motivations, timeline, and any conditions they might have for selling.

Discuss the lead’s price expectations and any flexibility they might have in terms of negotiations.

Build rapport and trust with the lead by actively listening to their needs and concerns, and providing relevant information about BT land Group and the acquisition process.

Schedule follow-up calls or meetings as necessary to keep the lead engaged and maintain the relationship.

Update the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system or other databases with the information gathered during calls, including notes on the property details, seller motivations, and any follow-up actions required.

Track the status of each lead, categorizing them based on their level of interest and readiness to proceed with a sale.

Collaborate with the acquisitions team and other relevant departments to provide them with the information gathered and to strategize on the next steps for interested leads.

Prepare regular reports on the progress of calls, including the number of leads contacted, responses received, and the current status of potential deals.

Address any objections or concerns the leads might have about selling their property, providing clear and concise information to alleviate their doubts.

Supply leads with any additional information they request, such as details about the acquisition process, company credentials, or market trends.

If a lead shows strong interest, set up appointments for site evaluations, further discussions, or meetings with senior acquisition tea
mbers.

Ensure that all interactions and agreements are well-documented and communicated to the relevant parties within the organization.



Qualifications-

Proven experience in a customer service, telemarketing, or appointment setting role.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Ability to build rapport and trust with potential sellers.

Familiarity with CRM software and data entry.

Basic understanding of real estate transactions.

Prior experience in land sales, acquisitions or customer service is a plus. 



Interested candidates should submit their resume and a cover letter detailing their relevant experience and interest in the position. 



**BT Land Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.**



Join our team and help us transform vacant land into valuable community assets!

title: Are you our next Head of Social Media Marketing?
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: Operations Manager (of PH & European Team)
description:
Operations Manager

Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH

Location: Remote

Working Hours: CET hours

Reports to: Managing Director



Purpose in One Sentence

To ensure Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH operates in a structured, efficient, and scalable way by overseeing all operational areas of the business and taking full responsibility for creating order, accountability, and delivery across the company.



Role Summary

Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH is seeking a highly capable, experienced, and accountable Operations Manager to oversee the full operational running of the company.



This role is responsible for bringing structure, control, accountability, and order across every key function of the business, including Sourcing, Service, Finance, Logistics, Marketing, Sales, and On the Ground Personnel.



The role is fully remote, but the successful candidate must work to Central European Time hours and remain fully available during the company’s required working window. Due to the nature of the role, flexibility outside normal hours is also essential where needed to maintain order and ensure operational delivery.



The successful candidate must be experienced enough to step into an active operational environment with minimal training. Training will be provided on internal systems and current company processes only. Beyond that, the expectation is that the individual already has strong operational management experience and is able to take ownership of the role within the first couple of weeks.



Core Purpose of the Role

To oversee and manage all aspects of company operations, ensuring that every department functions effectively, deadlines are met, service standards are maintained, communication is clear, logistics are fully controlled, and the business operates in an organised, professional, and commercially effective manner.



Main Areas of Responsibility

1. Full Company Operations Oversight

The Operations Manager will oversee the day to day running of the company across all major operational functions, ensuring alignment, accountability, and efficiency throughout the business.



This includes responsibility for:



Sourcing

Service

Finance coordination

Logistics

Marketing coordination

Sales coordination

On the Ground Personnel and field activity

Internal systems, processes, and reporting

Communication and accountability across all departments

The Operations Manager is expected to create order, visibility, and structure across the company and to ensure that no area is being neglected, delayed, or handled below standard.



2. Sourcing Oversight

Monitor incoming accommodation requests and allocation of work.

Ensure sourcing is carried out thoroughly and within required timeframes.

Oversee property searches, negotiations, approvals, and offer progression.

Ensure client requirements, locations, parking, budgets, and move in dates are properly understood and executed.

Maintain visibility over open opportunities and sourcing conversion.

Ensure all sourcing systems and trackers are updated correctly.

Ensure the sourcing function operates with urgency, structure, and commercial awareness at all times.



3. Service Oversight

Oversee the service department to ensure residents and clients receive a high standard of support throughout the full stay period.

Ensure move in readiness and resident communication are handled properly.

Monitor maintenance issues, complaints, extensions, replacements, and move out coordination.

Create accountability around response times, issue resolution, and internal communication.

Maintain a consistent service standard across all properties and clients.

Ensure issues are escalated quickly and resolved professionally.



4. Finance Coordination Oversight

Ensure supplier costs, operational charges, and supporting documentation are captured accurately.

Coordinate with finance to ensure invoices and cost information are submitted correctly and on time.

Monitor cost control across operations.

Identify inefficiencies, unnecessary spend, and financial risks within operations.

Ensure operational teams follow required financial procedures.

Maintain discipline around approvals, records, and reporting to support accurate financial control.



5. Full Responsibility for Logistics

Coordinate furniture delivery, collections, installations, removals, and storage.

Manage key logistics, access arrangements, apartment readiness, and deadlines.

Coordinate suppliers, movers, installers, and internal teams.

Ensure apartments are ready on time and to the Kassoe standard.

Manage urgent logistics issues quickly and effectively.

Keep full visibility and control over all logistical activity.

Reduce disruption, delays, and avoidable costs through strong planning and follow through.

Take full ownership of logistics as a critical part of the operational success of the company.



6. Marketing Oversight

Ensure marketing tasks are planned, executed, and followed through.

Coordinate with internal or external marketing support.

Maintain visibility over campaigns, content, and lead generation activity.

Ensure marketing supports sales and wider business goals.

Help create accountability and regular reporting around marketing performance.

Ensure marketing activity is aligned with company priorities and delivered consistently.



7. Sales Oversight

Maintain order and visibility across the sales pipeline.

Ensure opportunities are followed up properly and in a timely manner.

Support coordination between sales and operations.

Ensure proposals, client requirements, and internal actions are followed through.

Help improve consistency, accountability, and conversion across sales activity.

Support the wider business in maintaining a professional and commercially effective sales process.



8. On the Ground Personnel Oversight

Coordinate tasks and priorities for on the ground personnel.

Ensure field teams understand their responsibilities clearly.

Monitor performance, communication, and reliability.

Make sure on site activity supports the wider operation smoothly.

Escalate and resolve issues quickly where standards are not met.

Ensure field based activity reflects company standards and expectations at all times.



9. Systems, Process, and Accountability

Manage work through company systems and trackers.

Use Time Doctor as part of operational oversight and accountability.

Ensure tasks are clearly assigned, monitored, and completed.

Improve workflows, checklists, templates, and operational procedures.

Identify gaps, bottlenecks, and recurring problems, then fix them.

Hold departments and individuals accountable for delivery and standards.

Report clearly to management on performance, issues, and solutions.

Build a culture of structure, follow through, ownership, and operational discipline across the company.



Experience Required

Applicants must have:

Proven experience managing operations across multiple functions within a business.

Strong experience creating order, systems, and accountability.

Experience managing teams, suppliers, deadlines, and operational pressure.

Experience overseeing logistics and coordinating moving parts across departments.

The ability to step into an active business quickly with minimal hand holding.

A strong track record of taking ownership and solving problems independently.

Demonstrable experience and references that Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH can contact directly.

Candidates without clear operational management experience should not be considered.



Essential Candidate Requirements

The successful candidate must:

Have strong operational leadership experience.

Be highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities at once.

Be proactive, accountable, and solution focused.

Be comfortable taking full ownership of responsibility.

Be capable of working with minimal training.

Be ready to take over the role within the first couple of weeks.

Be willing to work outside normal office hours when required to maintain order and delivery.

Treat this as their only job, strictly.

Be comfortable using company systems, including Time Doctor.

Be comfortable using the company phone system app provided.

Be able to work remotely while maintaining full availability during CET hours.

Communicate clearly and professionally.

Maintain high standards under pressure.

Be confident overseeing all operational aspects of the company, not just one department.



Working Hours

This is a full time remote role.

Minimum guaranteed working hours are 40 hours per week.

Normal working hours are 09:00 to 17:30 CET.

The successful candidate must be fully available and working during CET hours regardless of their country of residence.

Due to the nature of the role, the Operations Manager must also be willing to work outside normal working hours whenever reasonably required to maintain order, support delivery, and ensure operational standards are met.



This role is not suitable for someone seeking a strictly fixed hours position.



Employment Conditions

This role is remote.

This role must be the employee’s only job, strictly.

Paid holiday entitlement is 20 days per year, available after successful completion of the three month probation period.

A sickness pay plan will apply after successful completion of probation.

Time Doctor software is used by the company.

A phone system app will be provided for business communication.

Training will be limited to company systems and current processes, as the successful candidate is expected to already be experienced in managing operations.



Performance Expectations

The successful candidate will be expected to:

Learn the company’s systems and current processes quickly.

Take meaningful ownership within the first couple of weeks.

Improve order, communication, and follow through across all functions.

Reduce inefficiencies, missed actions, and operational confusion.

Ensure all departments are working in a coordinated and disciplined way.

Bring a high level of professionalism, responsibility, and control to the business.

Maintain standards across sourcing, service, finance coordination, logistics, marketing, sales, and on the ground operations.

title: Vacation Rental (STR) Operations Specialist (30–40 hrs/week)
description:
We're Hiring a Rockstar Virtual Assistant!

Join our growing business as a long-term, part-time to full time (with growth potential!) Virtual Assistant focused on Short-Term Rental (STR) operations. You’ll support a small U.S.-based husband-wife team managing a portfolio of vacation rentals and long-term rentals.



We’re looking for someone smart, reliable, and experienced — ideally with a background supporting STR companies or real estate operations.



The Opportunity:

Kozi Stay is a fast-growing vacation rental company managed by a husband-and-wife team. We are looking for a dedicated, long-term tea
mber to play a key role in our operations. We are not looking for a temporary freelancer; we are looking for a core tea
mber who wants to grow their career as we grow our portfolio.



Our Working Style:

We are a busy team and we don't like to micromanage. We are looking for a "Self-Starter" who provides daily updates without being asked. If you are someone who waits for instructions for every small task, this isn't the role for you. We value a 'Yes, I will take care of that' attitude paired with the critical thinking to ask, 'Can we make this process better?' We want someone who respects our vision but takes ownership of the execution.



***Key Responsibilities:



Develop and implement SOPs for all company operations - cleaners, maintenance, property management, revenue management (pricing), etc.



Manage STR guest registrations - using OwnerRez, Docusign,
s, HOA registration platforms and more.



Manage guest communication and scheduling (using tools like Airbnb, OwnerRez)



Be comfortable and proactive in making outbound calls to U.S.-based cleaners and vendors to ensure schedules are met



Coordinate turnovers and vendors (cleaners, maintenance, etc.)



Update pricing calendars (using PriceLabs)



Monitor listing performance and rankings (using Rankbreeze)



Reconcile monthly expenses, categorize receipts, and assist with reporting



Prepare simple financial summaries and owner statements





*** You Must Have:

Prior experience supporting short-term rental (STR) operations or real estate companies



Excellent written English (you’ll message guests!)



Strong organizational skills and attention to detail



Ability to work independently and efficiently



Experience with tools like Airbnb, OwnerRez, Google Drive, Excel/Sheets



A commitment to Daily End-of-Shift Reporting (What was done, what is pending, and any issues encountered). We shouldn't have to ask for an update; it should be waiting for us when we wake up



***Nice to Have (but not required):

Experience with PriceLabs, Rankbreeze, StayFi, or STR data tools



Experience working with U.S.-based clients



Familiarity with Hubstaff or other time-tracking tools



*** Role Details:

Start: Part-time (25 hrs/week) to full-time (50 hrs/week) with flexibility of hours - 5-6 days per week.



Time Zone: Must be available in part during US (EST) time  



Pay: $3–7/hr depending on experience (pay will increase with performance over time)



Contract Type: Long-term independent contractor (not agency). This has the potential to become a long-term career position with growth in pay and responsibilities along with educational opportunities.



Bonuses & Raises: Yes, based on performance and reliability



***How to Apply

Submit your resume and a short introduction video (2 mins or less) telling us:



Who you are



Why you’re a great fit for this role



What STR or real estate tools you’ve worked with



Include the word "HORIZON" in the subject line or first sentence so we know you read the full post.



Share your OnlineJobs.ph profile link and your internet speed screenshot (https://www.speedtest.net)



We’re excited to bring on someone who’s sharp, proactive, and ready to grow with us over the long term. If that’s you — we’d love to meet you!

title: Long-Form Video Editor Youtube
description:
We are looking for a professional and experienced video editor to handle the full video creation process, producing high-quality YouTube content (approximately 20 minutes per video, 30 videos per month).



Please read carefully before applying.



The ideal candidate or team will have:



A proven track record producing successful faceless or narration-based YouTube content

Strong knowledge of YouTube community guidelines, copyright rules, and fair use policies

Advanced editing skills and access to licensed stock footage platforms

Experience using VidIQ or TubeBuddy for optimization

The ability to consistently produce monetization-compliant videos





We want to work with you if:



You have experience creating bingeable, high-retention YouTube content

You understand pacing, transitions, and engagement mechanics that keep viewers watching

You thrive under deadlines and deliver consistently without excessive revisions

You are organized, communicative, and have reliable turnaround times

You can deliver assets via Google Drive, 
, or Trello

You have a sense of humor and can bring personality to the content





Video Requirements:



Workflow: 10-second hook intro ? channel intro ? subscribe/IG call-to-action overlays ? engaging body content ? channel end screen

Content edited in a fun, entertaining style with strong pacing and humor where appropriate

Copyright-free sound effects and background music added tastefully throughout

Source and use only copyright-free or properly licensed footage (stock footage access required)

Edit in a high-retention style with CTR and watch time in mind

1080p HD minimum; use of lower-thirds, text overlays, and transitions where applicable

Professional software only: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro





Why work with us:



Build your portfolio with a consistent stream of professional, varied content

High standards mean real skill development — you'll grow quickly

Fully remote — work from anywhere, as long as you're reachable

No cap on volume — there is plenty of work available

We recognize quality and reward it; internal growth opportunities available

Performance bonuses and incentives for proven results

Respond with 'Pineapple' if you have read all this



Job Details:



7 videos per week

Minimum 20 minutes per video



To apply: Please submit your current portfolio and/or sample videos for review. Priority will be given to applicants whose work best reflects the requirements above. Also show us a screenshot from one of your last worked on projects in the editing software.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role

We are Keenya Kelly LLC, a fast-moving social media education and strategy brand based in Houston, Texas. We teach entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and monetize through content. Our founder, Keenya Kelly, is a TikTok and Instagram Growth Strategist with a business built over 10 years.



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative full-time tea
mber who can handle graphic and web design.This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.



What You Will Do

Create social media graphics, banners, thumbnails, and branded templates in Canva

Web Design landing pages in Figma, Adobe and/or Canva

Design promotional materials for launches, webinars, and digital products

Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets

Resize and reformat existing designs for multiple platforms



What We Are Looking For

Experience with Canva (required) — Photoshop or Illustrator a plus

Strong written English communication skills

Ability to follow brand guidelines and take direction well

Highly responsive to
 and messages — we are a fast-moving team

Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines without being chased

Previous experience working with a personal brand or online business is a plus



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following short sample task along with your application. Applications without the completed task will not be reviewed.



SAMPLE TASK



Task 1 — Graphic Design

Create ONE social media graphic (1080x1080) in Canva for a fictional post promoting a our course 



Use any colors and design you like, but make it look professional and eye-catching. Export as a JPG or PNG and attach it to your application.



Task 2

Design a carousel template that will go well with our brand 
/keenyakelly



Task 3 — Portfolio

Share a link to your portfolio OR attach 3–5 samples of past graphic design work.



DESIGN NOTE: Please do not use AI to design these sample task as we are looking for a designer that creates not someone using AI generated content for us.



A Note on Communication

This team moves quickly. We expect our tea
mbers to check
 and messages daily, respond within 24 hours, and complete agreed-upon tasks on time. If you are someone who values clear communication and takes ownership of your work, we would love to hear from you.



We look forward to reviewing your application

title: Virtual Assistant - Outreach & Operations
description:
About GTCAcademy



GTCAcademy is a UK-based communication performance platform helping APAC tech professionals perform better in high-stakes English situations — final round interviews, global presentations, and senior stakeholder conversations. We work with professionals across Taiwan, Korea, Japan and wider APAC who are technically excellent but need to sharpen how they communicate under pressure.



We're a fast-growing startup with an ambitious vision and a small, focused team. We're now looking for a sharp, proactive VA to help keep the business running smoothly while the founder focuses on strategy and growth.



The Role

- Part-time remote role, 10 hours per week to start, with a clear path to full-time as the business scales.

- You'll be the operational backbone of GTCAcademy — managing our recruiter outreach pipeline, supporting coach and developer recruitment, handling student admin, and keeping everything organised so nothing falls through the cracks.

- This is not a data entry role. We need someone who thinks, notices things, and takes initiative within clear boundaries.



What You'll Do

- Monitor and manage our LinkedIn outreach campaign daily — categorising replies, sending approved template responses, and flagging warm conversations for the founder

- Support coach recruitment — reviewing applications on OnlineJobs.ph, filtering candidates, sending application forms, tracking video submissions

- Manage student admin — session reminders, rescheduling, invoice chasing via Wise and Stripe, attendance tracking

- Monitor our Upwork product development project — filtering proposals, sending holding messages, flagging shortlisted candidates to the founder

- Manage Calendly bookings — sending confirmations, reminders, and preparation messages to candidates and students

- Keep Google Sheets pipeline trackers updated daily

- Prepare a weekly summary every Monday morning covering recruiter pipeline, coach recruitment, student roster, and outstanding actions

- Use Claude AI as a drafting tool for communications that don't fit standard templates





What We're Looking For



- Excellent written English — professional, warm, and natural sounding

- Strong attention to detail — you notice things others miss

- Proactive attitude — you don't wait to be told, you flag problems before they become issues

- Availability during UK morning hours (10-2pm UK time) at least 3 days per week for overlap with the founder

- Previous experience supporting a founder or small business strongly preferred

- Experience in tech industry, recruitment, HR, or education administration is a bonus but not essential





Tools We Use

You don't need experience with every tool - we'll train you on anything specific to GTCAcademy. What matters most is that you're comfortable learning new platforms quickly and take pride in keeping things organised.



Communication & Outreach:



- LinkedIn, MeetAlfred, Gmail, Zoom



Finance & Payments:



- Wise, Stripe, basic invoicing



Recruitment & Hiring:



- OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, Google Forms



Scheduling & Booking:



- Calendly, Google Calendar



Organisation & Tracking:



- Google Sheets, Google Drive, Notion or Trello



AI Tools:



- Claude, ChatGPT



CRM & Sales:



- LinkedIn Sales Navigator, HubSpot (if implemented)



Website:



- Wix (basic updates only)





What We Offer



- $5-6 per hour depending on experience, paid weekly via Wise

- 10 hours per week to start with clear path to full-time as revenue grows

- Fully remote, work from home

- Direct access to the founder — you'll learn how a fast-growing EdTech startup operates from the inside

- Opportunity to grow into an operations manager role as the team expands





How to Apply

Please send a short message (5-10 sentences) telling us:



- What experience you have supporting a founder or small business

- One example of a time you spotted a problem before being told about it and what you did

- Your availability and current hourly rate



Applications without a personal message will not be considered.

title: Rock Star Customer Service Associate
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Customer Service Representative to join our team at Golf Cart Geeks. As a Customer Service Representative, you will be responsible for ensuring that our customers receive excellent service and support, resolving their queries, and driving customer satisfaction. This is a remote position for an offshore employee, and our business operates on Shopify.



Responsibilities:



- Provide exceptional customer service to our customers through
, chat, and phone communication channels

- Respond to customer queries regarding orders, product information, returns, refunds, and other concerns in a timely and efficient manner

- Communicate with customers to provide product recommendations, troubleshoot issues and provide solutions to enhance their golf cart experience

- Coordinate with our fulfillment team to ensure accurate order processing and delivery

- Keep up-to-date with our product offerings, industry trends, and competitors to provide accurate and informed information to our customers

- Identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell our products to customers

- Collaborate with our marketing and sales team to improve customer experience and drive growth

- Use Shopify and other relevant tools to manage and process orders and customer data

- Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions



Qualifications:



- High school diploma or equivalent; college degree preferred

- Proven experience in customer service, preferably in e-commerce or automotive industry

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think on your feet

- Ability to work independently and as part of a remote team

- Proficient in using Shopify and other relevant customer service tools

- Knowledge of golf carts and their components is a plus

- Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment

- Reliable internet connection and access to necessary communication technology



This is a full-time remote position with a competitive salary, benefits, and potential for growth. If you are a customer service rock star, passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences, and ready to work in a remote setting, we want to hear from you!

title: Client Care Specialist
description:
TYPICAL HOURS

- Start time between 8:30 and 9:00 AM

- End time 5:00 PM



MISSION

The Client Care Specialist is an operational admin role and is the relationship hub— this role ensures agents feel taken care of, the calendar is protected, and opportunities for growth are identified daily. You manage client communication, control scheduling, support light sales, and strengthen long-term relationships. When active clients are fully supported, you shift into outreach and revenue-building mode.



DAILY SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Agents feel supported and confident

- Calendar is clean, optimized, and protected

- Sales opportunities are identified and surfaced

- Relationships are actively maintained

- No client is left wondering what is going on



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Client Communication and Care

- Monitor and respond to
, text, Slack, and CR
ssages

- Maintain a friendly, fast, concierge-level tone

- Confidently answer questions about pricing, packages, and services

- Recommend upgrades and add-ons when appropriate

- Resolve small issues independently

- Prioritize long-term and OG clients

- Log notes and important details in the CRM

- Agents should feel like they have a personal point of contact, not a ticket system.



2. Scheduling and Calendar Control

- Fully manage the calendar inside Tonomo

- Confirm appointments and resolve scheduling questions

- Optimize routes and timing for efficiency

- Push back on unreasonable requests using solution-first language

- Avoid saying no when possible by presenting options

- Decline same-day requests if they hurt operations

- Escalate truly critical situations to Tyler

- Protect weekday scheduling and limit weekends unless approved

- The calendar exists to support quality, not chaos.



3. Light Sales Support and Opportunity Spotting

- This role supports growth without pressure selling.

- Upsell add-ons when agents ask questions

- Suggest listing campaigns, Zillow Showcase, video, or premium services when relevant

- Identify high-intent or hot agents

- Flag those agents for Manager to personally follow up

- Support value-based conversations, not discounts



4. Client Outreach and Relationship Building

- Once active tasks are complete, shift into outreach mode.

- Reach out to agents who have not ordered recently

- Send friendly check-in texts,
s, or calls

- Reconnect with past clients to stay top of mind

- Perform care calls after projects are delivered

- Ensure clients are happy and heard

- Ask for reviews when expectations are met

- Log outreach and results in the CRM



5. Care Call Guidelines

- Phone calls are preferred when possible

- Text is acceptable and encouraged when appropriate

- If an agent has multiple jobs in a short time, one phone call per week is sufficient

- Follow-up texts can be used to check in and confirm satisfaction

- Dealer’s choice, based on context and relationship

- Goal is connection, not interruption



6. Review Requests

- Review asks typically happen during care calls

- Text follow-ups are also acceptable

- If satisfaction is confirmed, politely ask for a Google review

- Track reviews received

- Thank agents for their time and support

- Reviews are a growth lever. Treat them with intention.



7. Project Awareness and Support

- While evening ops owns most delivery and QC:

- Monitor Tonomo for overnight deliveries

- Handle morning video deliveries if they come in

- Assist with follow-ups tied to completed jobs

- Coordinate with evening ops when questions arise



TOOLS USED DAILY

- Tonomo for scheduling, orders, delivery, and invoicing

- Slack for internal communication

-
 and text for client communication

- GoHighLevel CRM for notes, outreach, and tracking

- Social media is not part of this role

title: Creative Quality Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are looking for a highly perceptive, creatively sharp Creative Quality Manager to help strengthen the quality, consistency, and scalability of our photo and video delivery pipeline. This person will serve as a high-level internal creative checkpoint — reviewing deliverables, identifying recurring quality issues, spotting patterns across shooters and editors, and helping our team improve creative consistency without adding more burden to already-stretched internal leaders. This is not a basic admin or upload role. We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye first, especially in video, who can also think operationally, document issues clearly, and help improve backend workflows over time.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

- Review video deliverables before final delivery to ensure quality and consistency

- Catch technical and creative misses before they reach the client

- Identify patterns across shooters and editors, including recurring strengths, misses, and coaching opportunities

- Flag issues related to coverage, pacing, framing, shot variety, detail shots, creative direction, music choice, captions, and overall polish

- Organize observations and feedback clearly for internal leadership

- Help create stronger quality control standards and backend review processes

- Support delivery readiness by ensuring projects are complete, clean, and aligned with internal expectations

- Help reduce the amount of proofing, review, and repetitive delivery work sitting on senior internal tea
mbers

- Contribute to SOPs, workflow improvements, and quality documentation as the team grows

- Writing feedback briefs to photographers and videographers regarding review and delivery

- Ensuring brand standards for photos and videos (correct logos, fonts, colors, etc.)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Fewer quality issues slipping through to clients

- Better visibility into shooter/editor performance trends

- Stronger internal feedback loops for creative coaching

- More consistency across delivered video content

- Less manual review burden on the internal team

- Cleaner backend systems and a more scalable delivery process



IDEAL BACKGROUND

- Strong video editing or post-production background

- Excellent creative judgment and attention to detail

- Ability to spot both technical and aesthetic issues quickly

- Experience reviewing work for quality, not just producing it

- Organized, process-aware, and able to document findings clearly

- Real estate media experience

- Comfortable working behind the scenes in a support and oversight capacity

- Strong AI skillsets such as Higgsfield, Nano Banana Pro, Eleven Labs, Claude, and others



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience working in a fast-paced, high-volume creative environment

- Familiarity with distributed editing teams or offshore creative support

- Operational or workflow improvement experience

- Experience helping train, guide, or support photographers/editors



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- A client-facing phone support role

- A purely admin or upload-only VA role

- A replacement for creative leadership

- A basic checklist-only QC seat



This role is for someone who can combine creative discernment, consistency, and backend support to help level up our internal quality control and creative execution.



WHO YOU ARE

You have a strong eye, high standards, and good taste. You notice what others miss. You care about the difference between “technically complete” and “actually good.” You can bring structure to creative work without draining the humanity out of it. You help teams get better, not just busier.

title: Direct Response Copywriter / Creative Strategist
description:
What they own: 

Every word CustomLove produces. Ad copy for both customer avatars,
 copy working alongside the Landing Page Expert, landing page copy, product descriptions and the messaging framework that makes CustomLove feel emotionally distinct from every other jewelry brand. They work closely with the Creative Director on ad creative to ensure visuals and words tell one coherent emotional story.



Must haves:

Proven direct response copywriting experience — not content writing, not blogging, not social media captions. Direct response. They must understand how to write copy that moves people to action through emotion and desire. Experience writing for DTC or e-commerce brands strongly preferred. Understanding of customer avatars and desire-based messaging. Portfolio showing ad copy,
 sequences and landing pages with documented conversion performance. Fluent English. Dutch or German as a second language is a significant bonus given our primary markets.

title: Quality Assurance - R&D Tech
description:
Please read carefully and follow the instructions:



 your updated resume in pdf - 



Job Position: Workspace Analyst



Rate: $5/hour full-time + perks & benefits





Job Description:

The Quality Assurance role is responsible for reviewing the work performed by the team, and making sure it falls in line with FOS standards for quality.



Roles and Responsibilities:

Documenting important technical records found on tickets Follow-up with the appropriate parties when ticket mistakes are identified Develop and implement standards for ticket inspection Review form approvals for data accuracy, and work with relevant parties if discrepancies are identified. Provide the most recent issues identified during evaluations with the training team and team leaders. These insights will serve as a foundation for targeted improvements and training initiatives. including identifying issues with documented processes, analyzing data for accuracy, and providing recommendations to improve performances.





Qualification:

Bachelor's Degree in IT or a related field, OR 2-4 years of experience in IT, or a related field. Certifications related to ITIL and Quality Assurance are a plus. Proficiency in Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, Autotask, Microsoft Planner, and Microsoft 365.



Experience:

2-4 years experience in technical support, customer service, or quality assurance role. Experience checking completed tickets and internal timesheets for invalid entries. Proficiency in auditing and flagging problem tickets, and in creating reporting based on these audits. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Ability to issue evaluations and approvals for completed work, including coaching. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Attention to detail and the ability to multitask effectively.

title: Instantly.ai Cold Email Setup Specialist (One-Time Project)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Instantly.ai specialist to handle the complete technical setup and optimization of our cold
 outreach system. The goal is to ensure 90%+ deliverability and a fully automated workflow from the start.



Key Responsibilities:



 •
 Infrastructure Setup: Connect and configure secondary domains and
 accounts (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365) within Instantly.ai.

 • Technical DNS Configuration: Implement and verify all essential records for every domain, including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and MX records.

 • Custom Tracking Domains (CTD): Set up and verify unique CNAME records for each domain to protect sender reputation.

 • Warm-up Strategy: Configure optimal warm-up settings (starting volume, daily ramp-up, and peer-to-peer settings) to ensure long-term account health.

 • Campaign Workflow: Set up one initial “Master Campaign” template, including sequence structure, global unsubscribe links, and stop-on-reply settings.

 • Deliverability Audit: Perform a final test using Instantly’s built-in tools to ensure all accounts are “green” and ready for sending.



Required Qualifications:



 • Proven experience setting up Instantly.ai for high-volume outreach.

 • Deep understanding of
 deliverability protocols (SPF, DKIM, DMARC).

 • Familiarity with domain registrars (GoDaddy, Cloudflare, Namecheap, etc.).

 • Ability to provide a brief walkthrough of the setup once completed.



How to Apply:

Please briefly describe your experience with Instantly.ai and mention one “pro-tip” you use to maintain high deliverability.

title: Virtual Assistant – GoHighLevel & AI Marketing
description:
VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — AI-POWERED MARKETING

Fitness Business | Full-Time | Remote (Philippines)



Job Type

Full-Time | Long-Term

Hours

40 hrs/week (flexible schedule, overlap with US time zones required)

Experience

2+ years as a Virtual Assistant with AI tools



Primary Tools

Claude AI, GoHighLevel (GHL)



Industry

Fitness / Health & Wellness (preferred)



Compensation

Competitive — based on experience



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a results-driven fitness business looking for a highly competent Virtual Assistant to help plan, build, and execute our marketing strategies. You will be working directly with our team on a day-to-day basis, leveraging AI tools (especially Claude) and our CRM platform GoHighLevel (GHL) to create content, run campaigns, manage automations, and track performance.



There are basic admin duties, but this is not a basic admin role. We need someone who is genuinely skilled with AI, understands marketing fundamentals, and can operate with minimal hand-holding. If you love working at the intersection of technology, creativity, and marketing , and you have a passion for fitness,  this role is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Use Claude AI to draft, refine, and repurpose marketing content 
s, social posts, ads, scripts, lead magnets)

Build and manage marketing funnels, automations, pipelines, and campaigns inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

Execute
 and SMS sales and marketing campaigns,  writing copy, segmenting lists, and analyzing results

Manage and schedule social media content across platforms 
, Instagram, etc.)

Conduct AI-assisted research on competitors, trends, and audience insights

Support the creation of lead generation campaigns and follow-up sequences

Track KPIs, prepare weekly performance reports, and suggest data-driven improvements

Coordinate with tea
mbers and vendors to keep marketing projects on schedule

Stay up to date with new AI tools and bring improvement ideas to the team



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

AI Experience: Demonstrated, hands-on experience using AI tools — especially Claude or ChatGPT — for marketing tasks

GoHighLevel: Proficiency with GoHighLevel (GHL): funnels, automations, CRM pipelines, 

/SMS campaigns

Writing Skills: Excellent written English — you will be writing copy that represents our brand

Marketing Knowledge: Strong understanding of digital marketing principles (funnels, lead generation, nurture sequences)

Self-Management: Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Technical Setup: Reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace

Availability: Available for at least 4 hours of overlap with US Eastern or Central time zones



NICE TO HAVE

Experience working with a fitness, gym, coaching, or health & wellness business

Familiarity with paid advertising 
/Instagram Ads, Google Ads)

Basic graphic design skills (Canva or similar)

Video editing or short-form video content experience (Reels, TikTok-style)

Experience with Zapier, Make (Integromat), or other automation platforms



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

In your first 30 days, you will:

Complete onboarding and gain full access and familiarity with our GHL account and existing campaigns

Produce your first batch of AI-assisted marketing content ready for review and deployment

Have a clear understanding of our brand voice, target audience, and marketing goals



In your first 90 days, you will:

Be independently managing content calendars, campaign execution, and performance reporting

Have proposed and implemented at least one process improvement or new AI-assisted workflow

Be a trusted, integral part of our marketing team



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, your application MUST include all of the following:

A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) — tell us about yourself, your experience with AI tools, and why you want this role

A written summary (150–300 words) describing a specific marketing task you completed using Claude or another AI tool — what the task was, how you used AI, and what the result was

Your GoHighLevel experience — list the specific features you have used (funnels, automations, SMS, etc.)

Your resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile link

Applications that do not include the video introduction and the AI experience write-up will not be reviewed.



Finally, include the phrase GHL + AI Ready at the top of your application message. This confirms you have read the full posting.

We look forward to meeting you. Let's build something great together.

description:

We believe that “Strength has a greater purpose” and we’re on a mission to grow our community to 2,000+ members by the end of 2025. The ideal candidate will have strong skills in executive support, marketing coordination, and strategic communication. You’ll be responsible for managing administrative tasks, streamlining operations, executing marketing initiatives, and acting as a key point of contact between the owner and internal/external stakeholders.

Handle
 correspondence, follow-ups, and inbox organization

, LinkedIn)

 campaigns

Liaise with vendors, freelancers, and tea
mbers to keep projects on track
