title: Administrator
description:
We are expanding our team and looking for a positive and proactive individual to enhance our administrative support and grow with the business.



About us: 

SuperWellness is a leading provider of workplace wellbeing services with an emphasis on lifestyle change. We work with organisations from SMEs to large multinationals, across many different sectors. As a small, highly committed team, we are passionate about making a difference to employee health, both physical and mental, through engaging, evidence-based content and programmes. Health, physical and mental wellbeing, and caring for employees have never been so important for employers.?It’s an exciting time for SuperWellness, and to support our future plans we’re looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Administrator to join our team. 



Objectives: 

• Providing administrative support to the sales, operations and client services teams. 

• Ensuring the smooth operation of projects and providing exceptional service to clients.

• Promote effective communication within the team and with clients, ensuring that information is conveyed accurately and in a timely manner.

• Proactively identify opportunities for process improvement, implement best practices and contribute to enhancing team efficiency and effectiveness.

• Continuously develop administrative skills to support project coordination, improve client interactions and identify industry trends to foster personal growth and contribute to team success.

• Assisting the implementation of new technology or processes to enhance and streamline our client retention process as required.

 

The role: 

We are seeking a dedicated individual to fill a vital supporting role that will be central to our project coordination and client services efforts. As an Administrator, you will be reporting to our Administration Manager, and you will also have a close working relationship with other internal stakeholders such as the administration, operations and sales teams. Your role will be central to successful project delivery, team collaboration, helping elevate our services and support continued business growth.



Your responsibilities will include: 

• Providing essential administrative support for client projects, including webinars, onsite activities, wellbeing programmes and more to ensure tasks are completed seamlessly and efficiently. This involves creating invitations, monitoring bookings and promptly distributing post-event resources.

• Data entry responsibilities such as maintaining client records, documents, and reports and upkeeping organised file management systems to ensure the accuracy and accessibility of essential project information.

• Using word processing and spreadsheets, as well as cloud-based collaboration and management solutions.

• Collaborating with the wider team, such as the CEO or Head of Wellbeing Strategy, to provide vital administrative support for longer-term or ongoing projects.

• Handling administrative requests and queries from internal stakeholders as required.

• Maintaining ongoing communication and knowledge sharing with the team.



Full training will be provided. As your knowledge and understanding of the business grows, there will be opportunities to advance into more senior roles. The role offers many future opportunities for further progression for the right candidate.



Person specification:

Essential

• Fluent in written and spoken English, with the ability to effectively communicate and interact with internal teams and clients.

• Demonstrates commitment to accuracy and meticulous attention to detail.

• Possesses a proactive "can-do" attitude with a willingness to learn and take on new challenges.

• Ability to prioritise work effectively to meet deadlines. 

• Adaptable and comfortable working within a small team.

• Experience in similar roles requiring a high level of organisation.

• Proficiency in Windows package, including Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Outlook.

• Ability to use initiative and work effectively without close supervision.

• Reliable internet access and a functional computer are essential.



Desired but not essential

• Experience with CRM platforms, such as Insightly or HubSpot.

• Experience with work management tools, such as Jira.



This is an opportunity for a motivated, detail-oriented and enthusiastic individual to develop their skills and to be part of a supportive, collaborative team committed to providing a quality service. 



Role specifics:

Full time, permanent – 37.5 hours per week

3.30am – 12pm (UK time) Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour break

Fully remote



What we offer:

$800 - $1000 per month 

13th salary month

25 days paid holiday (plus UK bank holidays)

Bonus & HMO after 3 months

Earn a performance-based pay uplift equivalent to a Friday afternoon off when targets are achieved

Supportive, development focused culture with a strong emphasis on learning, training opportunities



Interested? 

Please apply with your resume and a brief cover letter to the
: 

Please ensure you also fill out the following application form: 

Please note that only candidates who fully complete both applications will be considered for the role.



We endeavour to review all applications in the upcoming weeks. Should your qualifications align with our requirements, we will be in touch with the next steps.

title: Content Marketing Specialist
description:
Location: Remote (UK/Philippines)

Reporting to: Marketing Manager / Managing Director

Type: Full-time or Part Time (contractor arrangement for non-UK based hires)

Start: ASAP / within 4–6 weeks 



Role summary

Trendstop is a leading fashion and lifestyle trend forecasting agency based in London. We deliver insight and visually rich trend content that helps global brands shape future products, campaigns, and storytelling.



We are looking for a Content Marketing Specialist to bring our insights to life through engaging, well-crafted content across social and marketing channels.



This is a hands-on creative role. You will take high-quality trend content and transform it into compelling posts, visuals, and short-form content that connect with audiences and elevate our brand presence.



What you’ll do

Content creation & storytelling

? Turn trend reports and editorial content into engaging, easy-to-digest content

? Write captions, headlines, and short-form copy that feel clear, relevant, and on-brand

? Translate complex ideas into simple, visually engaging narratives



Social media content (LinkedIn & Instagram)

? Create content for LinkedIn and Instagram including posts, carousels, and visual snippets

? Adapt long-form content into concise, engaging social formats

? Ensure content aligns with platform best practices and audience expectations



Short-form video & creative content

? Edit reels and short-form video content using existing assets

? Create simple motion or video edits using tools like CapCut, Canva, or similar

? Select visuals, pace content, and structure posts for engagement



Marketing content & brand storytelling

? Support the creation of marketing materials such as case studies, summaries, and campaign content

? Help shape how Trendstop’s insights are presented across touchpoints

? Maintain a consistent, polished brand voice across all content



Content planning & coordination

? Manage content calendars and support scheduling across platforms

? Work with internal teams to gather assets and align messaging

? Ensure content is delivered on time and maintains a high standard



Performance awareness

? Monitor engagement and understand what content resonates

? Suggest ideas and improvements based on performance and trends

? Stay up to date with social media formats, trends, and creative approaches



What success looks like (first 3–6 months)

? Content feels engaging, relevant, and visually strong

? Social channels are consistent, active, and growing

? Complex ideas are translated into clear, compelling content

? Video and visual content is polished and platform-ready

? The brand feels cohesive and elevated across all outputs 



Skills and experience we’re looking for

? Experience creating content for LinkedIn and Instagram, including posts, carousels, or short-form video

? Strong writing skills with the ability to adapt tone across formats – from engaging social captions to more polished

marketing copy

? A good eye for visuals, layout, and storytelling, with the ability to create content that feels clear and well presented

? Experience using tools such as Canva, CapCut, Adobe to produce social and marketing content

? Ability to turn longer-form or insight-led content into concise, engaging outputs across different formats

? An understanding of branding, tone of voice, and content consistency across channels

? Awareness of what performs well on social and a curiosity for trends, formats, and content ideas

? Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage content calendars and multiple workstreams

? Clear communication and confidence working in a remote team environment

? A proactive mindset with the ability to take ownership of tasks and contribute ideas

? Experience working with fashion, lifestyle, agency, or content-driven environments is a plus





What we offer

? Work with visually rich, forward-thinking trend content

? Be part of a creative, globally distributed team

? Play a key role in shaping how insight is communicated

? Flexible, remote-first working environment

? Competitive compensation aligned with experience



To Apply

Please include your CV, covering letter, portfolio with any relevant work examples and your hourly rate.



The team and I would be delighted to welcome you to our dedicated trend forecasting ‘family’!

Jaana Jätyri

CEO

Trendstop

title: E-commerce Assistant Store Manager
description:
We operate three profitable E-commerce stores and are currently launching our fourth. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a highly experienced E-commerce Assistant Store Manager to handle day-to-day operations, support customers across multiple channels, and help keep our systems running smoothly.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. Please read the full job description and answer all questions for your application to be considered.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job description and follow the application instructions carefully to be considered.



Responsibilities

• Manage customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat with professionalism and accuracy.

• Handle RFQs, returns/exchanges, complaints, disputes, and negative reviews.

• Collect and maintain positive customer reviews and overall satisfaction.

• Support sales-related tasks and assist in improving store performance.

• Collaborate with the CS, Orders, and Product teams to share insights and ensure a consistent customer experience.

• Identify process gaps, recommend improvements, and contribute to SOP updates.

• Perform daily administrative tasks, including EOS reports and operational updates.

• Proactively manage assigned tasks without waiting for instructions.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years in E-commerce operations (customer service + order management + product management).

• Proven Shopify experience (listings, inventory, bulk updates, app usage).

• Strong phone communication skills and ability to handle challenging conversations calmly.

• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency in Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, CRM tools, and Google Workspace.

• Reliable computer + 20 Mbps+ internet.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed - you take initiative and solve problems independently.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy.

• Customer-focused - complaints are opportunities to improve systems.

• Process-minded - you document and refine workflows naturally.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



You're NOT a Fit If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists

• You can't work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities



Before You Apply - Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a two-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

b) What issues did you run into?

c) Anything you need help with?

If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.



Application Instructions (Follow Exactly) -



Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager

Example: Kevin – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

1. Describe your most relevant e-commerce operations experience (platforms used, team size, order volume, responsibilities).

2. What specific Shopify tasks have you performed?

3. What are your current work commitments and availability?

4. Provide your internet speed (include screenshot), computer specifications, and backup solutions for power & internet issues.

5. Provide one example of a difficult customer situation you handled and how you resolved it.

6. Why are you interested in this specific role instead of other VA positions?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We're looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist (Recruiter)
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Role Overview

We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our recruitment team. This is not a "behind-the-scenes" administrative role; you will be the face and voice of our company.

The ideal candidate possesses a pleasing personality—someone who is naturally approachable, professional, and persuasive. Your primary mission is to meet with potential candidates daily, accurately assess their English language capabilities, and lead inspiring information sessions that make people excited to join our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Language Proficiency Assessment

- Conduct live verbal and written English assessments for applicants.

- Utilize your ESL background to evaluate grammar, pronunciation, fluency, and comprehension.

-Provide detailed feedback and scoring to determine if a candidate meets our communication standards.

2. Dynamic Information Sessions

- Lead daily group and individual information sessions (virtual or in-person).

- Present the company’s vision, culture, and benefits in a way that is engaging and infectious.

- Act as a "Brand Ambassador," converting hesitant applicants into enthusiastic new hires through persuasive communication.

3. Candidate Relationship Management

- Maintain a warm and welcoming presence in all candidate interactions to ensure a "best-in-class" candidate experience.

- Serve as the primary point of contact for candidates throughout the early stages of the hiring funnel.

- Follow up with high-potential talent to encourage them to complete the onboarding process.

4. Collaborative Recruitment

- Partner with hiring managers to refine language requirements for different roles.

- Report on candidate pipelines and conversion rates from information sessions.



Required Qualifications & Skills

The "Spark": A naturally pleasing, friendly, and professional personality. You should be someone people feel comfortable talking to immediately.

ESL Expertise: Previous experience in ESL teaching, tutoring, or English proficiency testing (e.g., IELTS, TOEFL, or CEFR standards).

Public Speaking: Excellent presentation skills with the ability to "command a room" (or a Zoom call) and keep an audience engaged.

Linguistic Mastery: Near-native English proficiency is a must. You must be able to spot subtle nuances in language use.

Empathy & Patience: The ability to put candidates at ease, especially those who may be nervous about their language assessment.

Sales Mindset: A background in recruitment or sales is a plus, as you will need to "sell" the career opportunity to top talent.



Why Join Us?

This is a unique opportunity to combine your love for the English language with a fast-paced career in talent acquisition. You will have a direct impact on the quality and culture of our growing team while interacting with diverse individuals every single day.



Interested applicants may apply by completing the Google Form at the link below:

title: Performance Creative Strategist (Meta Ads Focus)
description:
About Us

We are building a high-performance ecommerce operation focused on problem-solving products. Our growth is driven by a strong creative engine where testing, iteration, and speed are everything. We work with structured systems, clear KPIs, and a constant flow of new ad concepts.



Role Overview

We are looking for a Creative Strategist who understands how to generate winning ad concepts at scale. You will be responsible for ideation, analyzing winning creatives, and translating insights into high-converting ad angles, hooks, and scripts.



This is not a basic content role. You need to deeply understand what makes ads convert and how to systematically produce new winners.



What You’ll Do

- Create high-quality creative batches across:

   - Iterations (improving existing winners)

   - Imitations (replicating competitor ads)

   - Ideation (new concepts from scratch)

- Research competitors daily using ad libraries and swipe winning creatives

- Extract insights from Reddit, Amazon reviews, and customer pain points

- Develop clear angles, hooks, and concepts based on proven data

- Brief creatives in a structured way so they can execute fast and accurately

- Work closely with media buyers to double down on what’s working

- Continuously improve concepts based on performance data



What We’re Looking For

- Strong experience in dropshipping or ecommerce advertising

- Deep understanding of:

   - Hooks that stop scroll

   - Emotional triggers and pain points

   - Direct response marketing

- Ability to break down why an ad works and replicate that success

- Experience with:

   - VSLs, UGC ads, advertorial angles

   -
 Ads ecosystem

- Comfortable working with structured systems like:

   - Winner trackers

   - Creative briefs

   - Concept sheets

- Fluent in English



How We Work

- Everything is data-driven

- Winning creatives are tracked and iterated fast

- We prioritize speed, clarity, and execution

- No guessing, everything is based on proven angles and patterns



You Are a Good Fit If

- You can look at an ad and instantly understand why it works

- You know how to turn one winning concept into multiple variations

- You actively study competitors and trends

- You think in angles, not just visuals

- You move fast and take ownership



Compensation

Based on experience and performance. Strong upside for the right person.



How to Apply



Send:

- Examples of ads or concepts you created

- Breakdown of at least one winning ad and why it worked

- Your experience with ecommerce or dropshipping



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to build and scale with us.

title: Creative Strategist - Ad Concept & AI Creative Specialist
description:
We are building a high-performance ecommerce operation focused on problem-solving products where creatives are the main growth driver. Our entire business runs on testing, iteration, and speed, and we rely on a strong creative engine to consistently produce new winning ads. We are looking for a Creative Strategist who not only understands how to come up with winning concepts but also knows how to execute and scale them using modern tools.



In this role you will be responsible for generating new ad concepts, analyzing winning creatives, and translating insights into high-converting hooks, angles, and scripts. You will continuously study competitors, identify patterns that work, and turn those into structured concepts that can be produced fast. You should understand how to take one winning idea and expand it into multiple variations that can be tested at scale.



A key part of this role is experience with generating static creatives using AI tools and prompts. You need to know how to create high-converting statics by writing strong prompts that result in clean, scroll-stopping visuals aligned with the concept. This is not about random image generation but about thinking like a performance marketer and using prompts to produce creatives that actually convert.



We are looking for someone with strong experience in ecommerce or dropshipping who understands direct response marketing, emotional triggers, and what makes people stop scrolling. You should be able to break down why an ad works and replicate that success consistently. Experience with VSLs, UGC formats, and Meta Ads is essential, as well as being comfortable working with structured systems like creative briefs, concept sheets, and winner trackers.



You will work closely with media buyers to identify what is working and double down on it quickly. Everything we do is data-driven and focused on scaling winners, not guessing. Speed, clarity, and execution are key in this role.



This role is ideal for someone who naturally thinks in angles, constantly studies competitors, and enjoys building a system around creative production rather than relying on one-off ideas. You should take ownership, move fast, and be focused on results.



Compensation is based on experience and performance with strong upside for the right person.



To apply, send examples of concepts or ads you have created, include a breakdown of at least one winning ad and explain why it worked, and share your experience with ecommerce or dropshipping. We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow and scale with us.

title: Accountant – Payment Processing & Reconciliation
description:
About the Role

AJ Media is a fast-growing DTC eCommerce company managing a portfolio of brands across multiple markets. As our operations scale, so does the complexity of our payment infrastructure — and we need someone who can own it.



We're hiring an Accountant who specialises in payment processing reconciliation. This isn't a general bookkeeping role — your core mandate will be to ensure every dollar running through our payment ecosystem is accounted for, tracked, and reconciled accurately and on time.



If you've only ever worked with Stripe or PayPal, this role will stretch you. We work with private payment processors, reserve-based arrangements, and complex multi-processor setups — and you'll be the person keeping it all clean.



What You'll Do

Perform end-to-end reconciliation across all payment processors — including private/high-risk processors operating with rolling or fixed reserves

Monitor and track reserve balances, release schedules, and amounts owed across all active processors

Identify and resolve discrepancies between processor settlements, bank deposits, and internal records

Maintain an up-to-date ledger of outstanding balances and aging receivables across all payment channels

Coordinate with internal teams (Finance, Operations) to ensure accurate transaction reporting

Flag risk exposure and escalate anomalies in processor behaviour, payout delays, or unexpected reserve holds

Prepare regular reconciliation reports for leadership — clear, accurate, and delivered on schedule

Continuously improve reconciliation workflows as payment processor volume grows



What We're Looking For

Proven experience in payment processing reconciliation — not just Stripe/PayPal, but private processors, reserve accounts, and high-risk payment environments

Strong understanding of how payment reserves work: rolling reserves, fixed reserves, reserve release timelines

Solid accounting fundamentals — you know your debits, credits, and how to structure a clean reconciliation

High attention to detail — discrepancies don't slip past you

Comfortable working independently in a fully remote, async-first environment

Proficient with spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets) for reconciliation work; experience with accounting software is a plus

Excellent written communication — you'll be reporting findings clearly to non-accountants



Bonus Points

Prior experience in eCommerce, DTC, or subscription-based businesses

Familiarity with platforms like Shopify, CheckoutChamp, or similar eCommerce stacks

Experience dealing with chargebacks, dispute management, and their reconciliation impact

Background in multi-currency reconciliation across markets



Do Not Apply If…

You've only ever reconciled standard Stripe or PayPal settlements and have no exposure to private processors or reserve structures

You need hand-holding to manage your workflow — this role requires strong self-direction

Numbers-heavy, detail-intensive work doesn't energise you



How to Apply

Apply here:

title: Full-Stack AI Engineer (Philippines, Remote)
description:
(JD) is a US-based legal digital marketing agency with a presence in Ireland. We build SEO, GEO, and AI-driven marketing systems exclusively for law firms. We move fast, build for scale, and use Claude Code & Codex as a core part of our development workflow.



We already have automation in place  but we need someone who ships constantly. This role is about building apps from day one, making continuous improvements to existing systems, and managing what we've already built while expanding it aggressively. You won't be waiting for specs to land in your lap. You'll be an active builder.



We're also in the process of hiring a Director-level engineering lead. Until that person is in place, you'll work directly with the Founder  which means real visibility, real context, and a chance to shape how we build from the ground up.



What You'll Build — Starting Day One



**Juris Internal Software** — We've built internal tools that run company operations using automation and prior developers. We need someone to take ownership, make improvements, and keep building on top of what exists.



**JurisRank** — Multi-tenant SaaS rank tracker (React + TypeScript + Supabase + Tailwind). Geo-grid heatmaps, AI visibility tracking (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AIO), white-label architecture. External scan worker on Railway.



**Claude Code Automation Workflows** — MCP-powered agentic pipelines pulling from DataForSEO, Ahrefs, Local Falcon, CallRail, and Google APIs to produce prospect intelligence reports, rank analyses, and sales assets with minimal human input.



**Internal Tooling & Slack Integrations** — Slack-to-output workflows where tea
mbers enter inputs and receive Excel reports, dashboards, or summaries without touching code. You'll own and expand this middleware layer.



**MCP Stack** — We run a significant MCP server ecosystem. You'll build new servers, maintain existing integrations, debug auth failures, and expand our tool ecosystem as new data sources come online.



The expectation is simple: things get built, things get shipped, things get better. Continuously.



---



## Core Requirements



We screen hard on these.



**AI & Claude Code**

- Hands-on Claude Code experience

- MCP server setup & development

- Agentic workflow architecture

- Structured output & prompt engineering

- Multi-step AI pipeline design



**Full-Stack Development**

- React + TypeScript

- Supabase (auth, RLS, edge functions)

- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui

- Node.js backend workers

- Python (scripting & agents)



**API Integration**

- REST & GraphQL APIs

- DataForSEO, Ahrefs, CallRail

- Google Search Console & GA4

- Google Ads API

- HubSpot, Slack, Notion APIs



**Google Workspace**

We run almost entirely on Google Workspace. Proficiency here saves significant time.

- Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, Calendar

- Google Search Console, GA4, Ads, and PageSpeed APIs



---



## Strong Advantages



Not required, but will move you to the top of the list:

- n8n or Make automation workflows

- Vercel / Railway / Render deployment

- Zapier integrations

- Local SEO or digital marketing background

- Mapbox GL JS or similar map rendering

- GitHub Actions & CI/CD pipelines

- Recharts or D3 data visualisation

- Stripe / billing integrations

- CLI tool development



---



## Role Logistics



**Location:** Fully remote — Philippines-based candidates only.



**Hours:** Full-time only. We track time through **Hubstaff** — transparency and consistency matter to us.



**Work style:** Async-first via Slack. You own tasks independently and ship without hand-holding. We build assets, not one-off deliverables.



**Reporting:** Directly to the Founder while our Director of Engineering hire is being finalized. You'll have full context on where the product is going and a real seat at the table.



**Compensation & Benefits:**

- Competitive rate commensurate with experience

- **13th month pay** — provided annually

- Fully remote

- Long-term role — we're building a company, not filling a seat. We want someone who grows with us.



---



## This Role Is For You If…



- You want to join early, work closely with a founder, and grow as the engineering team scales

- You're a builder by nature — you find the problem, fix it, and move to the next one

- You're comfortable taking a codebase and making it better without someone holding your hand

- You're excited about AI, SaaS, and building tools that real teams use every day

- You want stability and a clear path to more responsibility as we hire above and around you



---



## How We'll Vet You



1. **Application** — A short note on your Claude Code experience, one project you're proud of, and a link to your GitHub or portfolio

2. **Async Technical Screen** — A short take-home task relevant to our actual stack (expect 2–3 hours)

3. **Video Interview** — With the Founder to talk through your work and assess fit

4. **Paid Trial Project** — A short paid engagement (1–2 weeks) on a real task so we can see how you actually operate

5. **Offer** — Full-time for the right person



We read every application. We don't ghost.



---



## Ready to Apply?



Send us:

- A short note on your Claude Code experience

- One project you're proud of and what your role was in building it

- A link to your GitHub or portfolio

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Sales Closer/Salesperson

Maintain accurate records of interactions, sales, and follow-ups in CRM systems.



Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales or client-facing roles, preferably within education or service-based industries.

Strong negotiation and persuasion skills, with a customer-centered approach.

Goal-oriented and motivated to meet and exceed sales targets.

Familiarity with CRM software and sales tracking tools.



Ideal Candidate:

title: Quality Assurance (QA) Manager - Home Care Operations
description:
Job Title

Quality Assurance (QA) Manager – Home Care Operations



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Company: OPA Home Care

Reports To: Director of Operations



Role Overview

OPA Home Care is seeking a Quality Assurance Manager responsible for ensuring operational accuracy across our core service workflows.



This role functions as the final quality gate before operational work reaches leadership.



The QA Manager will review operational outputs, identify process failures, and ensure that work produced by the operations tea
ets OPA’s standards for accuracy, completeness, and professionalism.



The position is process-oriented and requires strong attention to detail, structured thinking, and the ability to enforce standards consistently.



Core Responsibilities

The QA Manager is responsible for quality control across the following operational areas:



Referral and Intake

Review referral intake records for accuracy and completeness



Verify correct client demographic and service data



Ensure referral documentation is properly recorded in the system



Scheduling

Audit caregiver schedules for accuracy and coverage



Verify caregiver assignments match client care plans



Review missed-shift i
 and identify process failures



Documentation

Review caregiver visit notes for completeness and accuracy



Ensure documentation meets operational and compliance standards



Track missing or incomplete documentation



Billing Preparation

Verify visit data and documentation required for billing



Ensure service records are accurate before submission



Quality Reporting

Maintain a QA tracking system identifying recurring operational errors



Produce weekly quality reports for operations leadership



Recommend process improvements when errors repeat



Key Outcomes

The QA Manager is accountable for the following outcomes:



Metric Target

Operational documentation accuracy 100%

Referral intake accuracy 100%

Scheduling audit compliance 100%

Error detection before leadership review >95%

The QA Manager ensures work is correct before it reaches leadership review.



Required Qualifications

3+ years experience in quality assurance, auditing, or operational review



Experience reviewing administrative workflows or documentation



Strong attention to detail and ability to detect errors



Strong written English communication



Comfortable working with operational systems and spreadsheets



Experience with healthcare operations, BPO quality assurance, or administrative auditing preferred



Preferred Experience

Experience in one or more of the following areas is strongly preferred:



Home care or healthcare operations



Quality assurance in BPO environments



Medical documentation review



Operational compliance auditing



Skills Required

Structured thinking



High attention to detail



Ability to enforce operational standards



Strong organizational discipline



Ability to identify root causes of recurring operational errors



Work Style

This role requires someone who:



notices small inconsistencies others overlook



prefers structured processes and checklists



is comfortable enforcing quality standards



takes ownership of accuracy and process improvement



About OPA Home Care

OPA Home Care provides in-home care services to older adults and individuals who require assistance with daily living.



Our company is built around the following core values:



Attention to Detail



Reliability



Strong Work Ethic



Efficiency



Coachability



Self-Starter mindset



Lagniappe – delivering a little extra



We are building systems that ensure every client receives dependable, high-quality care.



Compensation

Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



Typical range for this role:



Location Monthly

Philippines $1,200 – $1,500 / month

Application Instructions

Applicants should submit:



Resume



Short description of prior QA or operational review experience



Example of a process or workflow they have improved



Hiring Filter (Important)

Candidates who succeed in this role typically demonstrate:



exceptional attention to detail



comfort identifying operational mistakes



discipline in following structured processes



This role is not a customer service position. It is a process accuracy and quality control role.



Optional Enhancement (Strongly Recommended)

Add a screening test to the job posting.



Example:



Give applicants a sample operational document with errors and ask them to identify mistakes.



This dramatically improves hiring quality for QA roles.

title: Video Editor - AI/VSLs
description:
We're a scaling DTC brand running high-volume Meta ads. We need a video editor who lives in AI-assisted editing workflows and can produce VSLs and short-form ad creatives at speed.

You will:



Edit 15-30+ video ads per week (UGC, VSLs, AI-generated content, B-roll compilations)

Use AI tools (Runway, HeyGen, Eleven Labs, CapCut, etc.) to accelerate production

Build VSLs from scripts — narrator-led, text overlay, before/after formats

Produce scroll-stopping hooks with rapid iterations and variations

Work from creative briefs and scripts provided by the Creative Strategist



You need:



Proven DTC/performance ad editing experience (show us your ads, not your showreel)

Fluency in at least 2-3 AI video/voice tools

Sub-24hr turnaround on standard edits

Understanding of direct response principles (pattern interrupt, pacing, CTA placement)

Ability to self-QA — correct aspect ratios, safe zones, captions, audio levels



Nice to have:



Experience with health/wellness or body composition products

Familiarity with Meta ad specs and platform nuances

Motion graphics capability (lower thirds, kinetic text, data visualizations)

title: Account Manager (Digital Marketing Company)
description:
***All applications must be submitted through this link ONLY:

hire.localvisibility.co/job-overview-account-manager

***Messages here in OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.





Account Manager

Greetings from Local Visibility - your future workplace filled with positivity and endless possibilities! We are seeking talented account managers to join our dynamic team!



About Us:

Local Visibility is a growing digital marketing agency specializing in lead generation for home improvement and service companies in the US and Canada. We have been in business for 14 years and take pride in providing high-quality services.



Why Us:



Team harmony: Your wins are ours, and together, we create a harmonious work environment where your efforts and ideas truly shine.

Grow with us: Being with us means your journey is always exciting! Our goal is to give you the tools, help, and chances to move your career forward.

Everyone’s welcome: We’re happy to be in a place where each special voice isn’t just heard but really appreciated.

Celebrating YOU: Birthdays, small wins, or achievements - it’s important to celebrate the good things. We love acknowledging and appreciating each other.



Job Overview

The Account Manager is crucial for ensuring customer satisfaction and retention by fostering strong relationships, understanding client needs, and facilitating effective communication between clients and internal teams. As an account manager, you are responsible for managing the relationships with clients. They must speak English fluently without an accent. Additionally, the candidate must be presentable, as this is a client-facing role, and should have a strong background working with American clients.



The position includes:



Customer Relationship Management: Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with clients. Regularly communicate with clients to understand their needs, address concerns, and provide solutions.



Account Management: Understand the client's business objectives, industry challenges, and pain points to tailor solutions and offerings effectively.



Product Knowledge: Maintain a deep understanding of the company’s products and services.



Customer Feedback: Collect qualitative feedback from customers regarding their support experiences.



Responsibilities:

Create monthly marketing performance reports 
 Ads, Semrush, Bright Local, AdWords, Analytics).

Meet with clients at least once a month using Google Meet to review reports, progress, and plan future actions.

Responsible for handling incoming calls and providing support or assistance as needed.

Document customer service requests and follow through on open items for clients.

Follow up on customer service requests weekly to ensure they are in progress and close the loop with clients.



Required Qualifications

Must be able to speak English without an accent and demonstrate strong verbal and written communication skills required to convey information.

Must have prior experience in customer service, phone sales, or account management for a marketing agency.

Must be able to demonstrate knowledge of digital marketing, including SEO, PPC, and Social Media

Must have a reliable internet connection with a backup option and a quiet, distraction-free working environment.

Must have prior experience working the night shift (8 am to 5 pm Eastern time).

You know this about yourself:

You are very intelligent and quick-witted (your mouth might get you in trouble every once in a while)

You love to learn new things

You always take initiative and get things done

You are an extreme problem solver and can figure anything out

You are very detail-oriented, organized, and analytical

You are a people person who is outgoing and friendly. People like being around you and think you are funny.

You always look for the good and positive in things, even when bad things happen.

You are honest and genuine.

You are not very good at working with your hands or fixing things.

You don't like to take risks.



Pay: Starting Rate is $8/hr US Dollar





Programs or Tool Tools You Need to Know:

G-Suite Click Up, Google Meet, High Level





Job Type: Full-Time 40 hrs Weekly



Pay: Starting Rate is $8/hr US Dollar



Benefits:

Pay Raises as the Career Grows

Trainings for Skill Advancement

Health Insurance Reimbursement

Paid Time Off and paid PH Holidays



Schedule

Monday to Friday

8 AM to 5 PM Eastern Time



Desired Location:

Non-US

Philippines



Programs or Tool Tools You Need to Know:

G-Suite, Click Up, Zoom, High Level





***All applications must be submitted through this link ONLY:

hire.localvisibility.co/job-overview-account-manager

***Messages here in OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.

title: Paid Traffic Operator
description:
Company Overview:

We're a US-based digital media agency experiencing rapid growth. We manage content and marketing campaigns for creators across various platforms. Our team works fully remote, spanning multiple time zones.



The Role:

We're hiring a Paid Traffic Operator to handle the hands-on execution of our paid advertising campaigns. This is an operational role—our internal traffic management system guides campaign decisions, and your responsibility is to execute workflows precisely, launch campaigns according to specifications, track performance, and report consistently.



You don't need to be a media buying strategist. You need to be dependable, process-oriented, and a clear communicator.



What You'll Do:

- Launch paid campaigns across multiple ad networks using detailed SOPs

- Check campaign performance daily through our internal dashboard

- Make manual adjustments in ad platforms—budgets, creatives, targeting—as instructed

- Flag performance issues that fall outside defined thresholds for management to review

- Deliver a brief daily async update covering spend, results, and any concerns

- Maintain accurate, current campaign data across all platforms



What We're Looking For:

- Meticulous attention to detail—you follow processes exactly, without shortcuts

- Dependable and consistent—daily reporting and punctuality are essential

- Basic experience with at least one ad platform (Meta Ads, Google Ads, or similar)

- Self-sufficient in a remote, async work environment

- Strong written English—clear, concise communication is central to this role

- Open to feedback—you ask questions early instead of guessing



Bonus Points:

- Experience with push, pop, or display traffic networks

- Background in a digital agency or media buying team

- Familiarity with CPM or CPC buying across multiple networks



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short paragraph about the ad platform or traffic network you know best and what your responsibilities were. Applications missing this will not be considered.

title: Remote Appointment Setter – US Life Insurance (Full-Time, WFH)
description:
About the company

We are Florida-based life insurance agency focused on final expense and life insurance sales. We protect American families with quality coverage solutions, and we're expanding our remote support team in the Philippines.



What you'll do

You will be the front line of our sales operation — calling fresh and aged final expense leads through a dialer to qualify prospects and schedule appointments for our licensed US-based agents. This is a high-volume, script-driven role. You will NOT be selling insurance; your job is strictly appointment setting and lead qualification.



Day-to-day responsibilities

Make outbound calls using a provided dialer system and approved scripts

Double-dial new leads immediately — target speed-to-lead under 5 minutes

Qualify leads and schedule appointments directly into agent calendars

Handle inbound calls, collect client info, and route to licensed US agents

Confirm and reconfirm appointments via call, SMS, or

Follow up on no-shows and re-engage cold leads

Update CRM in real time — log all calls, status changes, and notes accurately

Strictly follow all approved scripts and compliance guidelines



Requirements

2–3 years of experience as an appointment setter (required)

Prior experience in US life insurance or final expense industry (strongly preferred)

Excellent spoken English — neutral accent, warm and confident phone presence

Comfortable calling American seniors over the phone

Proven track record in a quota-based, sales-driven environment

Skilled in using sales tonality and vocal inflection while reading from a script

Experience with dialer systems such as GoHighLevel, Mojo, or PhoneBurner

Proficient with CRM tools and accurate data entry

Quiet, distraction-free home workspace with reliable high-speed internet



Performance metrics

Speed to lead — target under 5 minutes for new leads

Daily and weekly call volume

Appointment set rate and show rate



Lead contact rate

CRM accuracy and completeness

Script and compliance adherence

title: Amazon PPC & Marketplace Manager
description:
Company Overview

A fast-growing, bold CPG food brand in the grilling and seasoning space, selling direct-to-consumer across Amazon and other online marketplaces. The brand has strong traction, high unit velocity, and loyal customers, with a clear focus for 2026: increase profitability, optimize ad spend, and scale revenue responsibly without leaking margin.



Role Overview

We are hiring an experienced Amazon PPC & Marketplace Manager to take full ownership of Amazon performance, including advertising, listing optimization, catalog accuracy, and marketplace management.

This is not an entry-level Amazon VA role.

We need someone who:

Understands ROAS and profitability deeply

Knows how to use Helium 10 properly

Can optimize listings for keywords and conversion

Can manage PPC strategically, not emotionally

Notices errors before the owner does

The primary focus is Amazon. Secondary platforms include Walmart, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other DTC marketplaces.

Initial scope is part-time with room to grow into expanded hours as profitability improves.

Work Hours: US CST overlap required.





Core Responsibilities



1. Amazon PPC Management (Primary Focus)

Audit existing Amazon ad structure

Identify and eliminate unprofitable campaigns

Optimize for profitable ROAS, not vanity metrics

Manage keyword targeting, bid adjustments, and budget allocation

Monitor impression share, ACOS, TACOS, and overall ad efficiency

Use Helium 10 for:

Keyword research

Listing optimization

Market tracking

Competitive analysis

Provide clear reporting on performance and profitability

Goal: Improve profitability while maintaining or growing revenue.



2. Listing Optimization & Catalog Management

Ensure all listings are:

Uniform in branding and naming conventions

Keyword-optimized

Conversion-focused

Maintain correct:

Product titles

Variations

Quantities

Bundles

Packaging information

Ensure consistency across all SKUs

Update enhanced A+ content as needed

Prevent duplicate naming inconsistencies (e.g. brand variations, formatting errors)

Implement updates via individual edits or flat files when appropriate

Attention to detail is critical.



3. Marketplace Expansion & Management

Oversee product listings and updates across:

Amazon (primary)

Walmart

Shopify

TikTok Shop

Shopify Collective

Additional DTC channels as needed

Responsibilities include:

Listing updates

Pricing corrections

Bundle accuracy

Manual order entry when required

Monitoring for inconsistencies or suppressed listings

If you can manage Amazon well, the rest should feel manageable.



4. Inventory & Replenishment Monitoring

Pull Amazon replenishment reports

Monitor FBA stock levels

Flag restock needs bi-weekly or monthly

Identify inventory discrepancies

Assist with FBA shipment tracking

Coordinate with team on inbound shipment discrepancies



5. Customer Service (Light Volume)

Handle Amazon customer messages daily

Manage low-volume customer service tasks

Escalate issues appropriately

Maintain high response standards



6. Basic Creative Support (Nice to Have)

Use Canva for simple visual edits

Support basic ad creative updates

Collaborate with graphic designer when needed

Advanced graphic skills are not required, but comfort with Canva and AI tools is helpful.



Required Skills & Experience

2+ years managing Amazon Seller Central

Strong Amazon PPC experience

Deep familiarity with Helium 10

Strong keyword research and listing optimization skills

Strong spreadsheet skills

Understanding of profitability and contribution margin

Clear communicator

Detail-oriented

Proactive problem-solver

title: Curative Title Researcher
description:
???? Job Title: Curative Title Researcher

Position Type: Remote – Part-Time (20-25 hours)

Schedule: Flexible hours; deliverables-based

Compensation: $5/hour + $75 bonus per deal



???? About the Role

We’re a small but growing real estate investment company that specializes in acquiring off-market properties — often those with title issues due to tax liens, probate complications, or missing heirs. We’re seeking a dedicated, detail-obsessed Curative Title Researcher to help us uncover and resolve ownership challenges behind the scenes.

If you love deep-diving into public records, solving puzzles, and working independently, this could be the perfect long-term fit for you.



???? Key Responsibilities

Conduct detailed research into county records, probate filings, obituaries, tax records, and court documents to identify rightful property owners or heirs.





Analyze title reports, deeds, affidavits, and public databases to identify title defects and chain-of-title gaps.





Perform skip tracing to locate hard-to-find individuals using online tools, voter registration records, people search engines, and social media. 





Verify contact information for property owners, heirs, attorneys, and representatives, and compile the data into clear, organized reports.





Collaborate with our acquisitions team, title companies, and attorneys to support title curative strategies.





Maintain confidentiality and ensure data accuracy and compliance with privacy protocols.







? Qualifications

Experience in surplus funds, title research, genealogy research, skip tracing, legal investigations, or real estate data (2+ years required)





Strong ability to interpret legal and property documents: deeds, wills, probate documents, notices, liens, etc.





Familiarity with county clerk portals, tax collector sites, county appraisal district sites, online title search tools, and skip-tracing software





Exceptional attention to detail and high standards for accuracy





Strong analytical, investigative, and documentation skills





Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision





Tech-savvy: proficient with spreadsheets, document organization, and web-based research







???? You’re a Great Fit If You

Love solving complex puzzles through research





Work methodically, stay organized, and never leave a stone unturned.





Enjoy deep, independent work with minimal interruption.





Have excellent follow-through and take pride in accurate results.





Are process-driven and able to replicate your research steps.





???? How to Apply



Please
 your resume or brief description of your background to 
 the subject line below. 



Subject: Curative Title Research Application.

Include 1–2 sentences about why you’re interested and how many years of experience you have with each of the following: surplus funds, title examination, skip tracing, and public records research.



Include link to DISC personality test results:

title: Bricks & Bytes - Sales & Operations Manager
description:
If you want to help lead the commercial engine at the most exciting media brand in AEC (Architecture, Engineering & Construction) technology, read on.



What started as a small podcast interviewing tech operators has gotten a little out of hand. Now, we produce videos that hit hundreds of thousands of views, podcasts that shape industry narrative, and content that bleeds influence across the built world.



We're building the biggest media platform that exists in this space — and we're looking for someone who wants to help us monetise every inch of it.



---



## 7 Reasons This Role Is For You



1. You want to grow into, and become, a renowned commercial force within the evolving media landscape

2. You are hungry to sell products and partnerships that shape the minds of our industry

3. You think intuitively, act decisively, and don't need supervision to perform

4. You obsess over both your own performance and the company's growth

5. You're detail-orientated because you know tiny optimisations in a sales pipeline can compound into massive results

6. You nerd out over revenue metrics and work hard to identify which levers move the needle

7. You meticulously study the AEC and media landscape so that we are always one step ahead of our competition



## 6 Reasons This Role Is Not For You



1. You are happy working at a steady 9-5. Nothing about what we do is steady and we have not worked 9-5 since day one. That means maximum flexibility and high expectation on results

2. You don't understand that a media business must make money to exist

3. You are comfortable with your own skill set — we expect continuous self and skill refinement and improvement

4. You can't switch context fast — one hour we're pitching a sponsor, next we're coordinating Fight Night logistics

5. You use LLMs for more than 10% of your work

6. You're sensitive to feedback. We debate hard and move quick. Candid feedback is our love language



## The Bottom Line



We don't care how many hours you work, we care how much you move the needle. We're not here to "sell ads." We're here to own the narrative in AEC tech and build a commercial machine that funds the mission. We prize A-players — people who are sharp, self-accountable, curious, and relentless.



---



## The Role



This is a sales-first role (75% commercial, 25% operations). Your job is simple: sell Bricks & Bytes products to the construction technology ecosystem and make sure the operational side of what you sell runs smoothly.



You'll report directly to the CEO, who handles strategic relationships and high-level closes. Your job is to fill the pipeline, run outreach, pitch, negotiate, and close deals independently — then make sure delivery is seamless.



---



## What You're Selling



You'll be responsible for driving revenue across the full BB product suite:



- **Sponsorships** — podcast ads, newsletter placements, social media shoutouts, blog banners. Packages range from $2,500–$7,500+/quarter. Our sponsor inventory isn't full — your job is to fill it and expand it

- **Event sponsorships & tickets** — London executive dinners, happy hours, the September robotics event, virtual summits. Sell headline and tier sponsorships, fill seats with the right people

- **Fight Night (AEC UFC)** — our debate-format live show. $3,000+ in sponsorship per session. You own this end to end: sell the sponsors, book the guests, run the logistics, hand off content to the editorial team. Target: 1 per month

- **Event live streams** — we get paid to produce live interview content at industry conferences (Paris, Boston, etc.). Sell the sponsorship packages around these streams

- **Branded video productions** — companies like Bedrock Robotics pay us to produce documentary-style content with them. You'll prospect and pitch these opportunities

- **BB Radar product demos** — companies pay to be listed and featured on our ConTech directory. You'll sell demo slots and listing packages



---



## What You'll Do — Sales (75%)



### Pipeline & Outreach



- Build and maintain a prospect list of potential sponsors, advertisers, and partners across the ConTech ecosystem

- Run outbound outreach campaigns — cold
, LinkedIn, warm intros — to sell all BB products

- Target legacy software providers, construction tech startups, SaaS platforms, recruiters, legal firms, and service providers who want access to our audience

- Qualify inbound leads and sponsor enquiries



### Pitch & Close



- Pitch sponsorship packages, event sponsorships, Fight Night deals, and branded video opportunities independently

- Negotiate pricing and terms within agreed frameworks

- Close deals up to an agreed threshold — escalate larger or strategic deals to the CEO

- Prepare proposals, one-pagers, and sponsor collateral as needed



### Account Management



- Own the sponsor register — every active deal, renewal date, open inventory slot, and pricing tier

- Flag renewals 30 days out and proactively upsell or renew

- Maintain sponsor relationships post-sale — make sure they're happy, check in regularly, identify opportunities to expand the relationship

- Report on revenue pipeline weekly: what's sold, what's pending, what's expiring



---



## What You'll Do — Operations (25%)



### Fight Night



- Own the full Fight Night production cycle: guest booking, scheduling, run-of-show, sponsor delivery, post-event wrap-up

- Target: monthly cadence, self-funding through sponsorship revenue you generate



### Sponsor Delivery



- Coordinate with the content team (Head of Content, video editor, scheduling) to make sure sponsor placements go live correctly and on time

- Track deliverables against what was sold — make sure sponsors get what they paid for



### Team Support



- Act as the connective tissue between the CEO, editorial, and operations teams on anything commercial

- Keep Notion, sponsor trackers, and pipeline docs up to date

- Support event logistics where needed — guest confirmations, venue comms, post-event follow-ups



---



## Who You Are



- **You can sell.** Not in theory — you've actually sold something before. Sponsorships, ad space, SaaS, services, whatever. You know how to write a cold
 that gets a reply and how to move a conversation to a close

- **You're organised.** You'll be managing dozens of sponsor relationships, renewal dates, outreach threads, and event timelines simultaneously. Nothing slips

- **You're a self-starter.** You don't wait to be told what to sell or who to
. You find the opportunities and go after them

- **You write well in English.** Your outreach
s sound like a real person, not a template. Your proposals are clean and professional

---

 with:

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Who We Are:

At Juris Digital, we help law firms achieve sustainable growth through organic and paid search marketing is not just what Juris Digital delivers — it’s what drives our SEOs daily. Our team is smart and intelligent and knows what it takes to drive real revenue growth, and cares about the bottom-line outcomes. We’re competitive and collaborative, like to have fun, and love adding new tea
mbers. If you are seeking a dynamic workplace and new challenges, we want to hear from you!



Who we’re looking for:

The SEO Specialist is a contractor-only position. You will ensure and implement digital marketing and SEO tasks such as content publishing, keyword research, onsite and offsite SEO, link building, content promotion and outreach, and copywriting. The SEO Specialist is also responsible for helping prepare monthly client reports.



Your day-to-day will be spent conducting data-driven keyword research, support with essential SEO and client management tasks. You’ll have confidence in your SEO knowledge and how to communicate it with your team, and you’ll grow and learn together with your team, holding yourself accountable.



What you will do:

- Publishing and optimizing new content in WordPress.

- Business listing management

- Google Business Profile, Bing Places, and Apple Places management

- Copywriting for non-legal content

- Link-building outreach (scholarships, community initiatives)

- Data wrangling and analysis for advanced content and SEO recommendations

- Responsible for making sure clients stay within budget. Although this will be everyone’s job.



How you’ll do it:

Embody Juris Digital’s core values: Excellence, Fun, Creativity, Empathy, Transparency and Relationships

- Curiosity: Ask really good questions of clients that drive creative solutions. You are compelled by the desire to learn more, ask more, and find new solutions for your partners that haven’t been previously thought of.

- Work Ethic: Come to work to achieve. Use your time wisely to create opportunities, and understand that success results from hard work and diligence.

- Intelligence: You can quickly learn and retain new information, processes, and abilities.

- Coachability: Seek out and implement coaching on personal performance in order to improve. React calmly to criticism and are open to new ideas and changes in the process.

- Self-motivation / Drive: You are driven to exceed minimum standards by your personal “why.”

- Resilience and Perseverance: This isn’t your first rodeo. You weather your roles’ inevitable ups and downs with grace, professionalism, grit, and determination.



Our ideal candidate will be or have:

- 3+ years of SEO experience

- Proven track record of driving client success in a digital marketing environment.

- Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

- On-Page SEO

- Technical Crawls/Updates

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills – able to simplify complex topics in a friendly and approachable manner

- Please put a * next to your name when applying.

- You have significant knowledge in / experience with

*WordPress 

*Google Analytics 

*Clickup

*Callrail

*SEO competitor research tools (Ahrefs, ScreamingFrog, etc.)

- General knowledge of software applications i.e., Clickup, Google Apps, etc.

- Your unique strengths – if you don’t match everything we’re looking for, tell us why you’d be a great fit.

- Must possess strong English-speaking skills.

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)

title: WordPress Content Transfer Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled WordPress Content Transfer Specialist to assist in migrating, formatting, and organizing website content into WordPress. This role requires strong familiarity with WordPress CMS, page builders (e.g., Gutenberg, Elementor, WPBakery), and a sharp eye for accuracy and consistency across digital content.

You will play a key role in ensuring the integrity and presentation of content during the transition from legacy systems, staging sites, or external sources into a live WordPress environment.



**Key Responsibilities**

- Transfer and format existing content (text, images, videos, metadata) into WordPress pages and posts.

- Maintain consistent layout, styling, and structure during content migration using theme settings or page builders.

- Set up proper categories, tags, featured images, permalinks, and SEO metadata.

- Ensure all internal links, media, and downloadable files are properly linked and functional.

- Identify and resolve content formatting or styling issues post-migration.

- Use plugins like ACF, Carbon Fields, or custom post types where needed to place content properly.



**Required Skills & Qualifications**

- Proven experience working with WordPress, including Gutenberg and popular page builders.

- Strong attention to detail, especially with formatting, design consistency, and content structure.

- Basic understanding of HTML and CSS for troubleshooting content formatting issues.

- Familiarity with SEO best practices in content formatting and metadata setup.

- Experience working with media libraries and optimizing images for web use.

- Ability to follow structured processes and naming conventions.

- Excellent time management and organizational skills.

- Strong written and verbal communication.

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)



**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience with content migration tools or plugins.

- Familiarity with WPML, Polylang, or multilingual content management.

- Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) and mobile-first formatting.

- Knowledge of custom fields (ACF, Carbon Fields) and custom post types.

- To confirm you've read the full job post, please put an asterisk (*) next to your name when applying.



**How to Apply**

Please submit your resume and briefly highlight your hands-on experience with WordPress content management, including any work using page builders like Elementor, Gutenberg, or WPBakery.

Be sure to mention your familiarity with formatting standards, SEO metadata, and content migration tools or plugins if applicable.

title: Google Ads - Tracking Implementation Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically proficient Tracking Implementation Specialist to support our paid media efforts by ensuring precise and comprehensive conversion tracking. This role requires deep knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Ads conversion tracking, and CallRail integration. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience configuring form submission and phone call goals for PPC campaigns and will be crucial in aligning tracking infrastructure with campaign objectives.



**Key Responsibilities**

Tag Management and Configuration

- Set up, audit, and manage tags, triggers, and variables in Google Tag Manager (GTM)

- Implement conversion tracking for form submissions and phone calls through GTM

- Collaborate with developers or use GTM tools (e.g., data layer) to ensure accurate firing of tags



Google Ads Conversion Tracking

- Configure and verify Google Ads goals for both lead forms and phone calls

- Ensure goals are properly attributed and feeding into Google Ads reporting for optimization

- Regularly test and troubleshoot conversion tags to maintain data accuracy



Call Tracking Integration

- Fully set up and integrate CallRail with Google Ads and GTM

- Ensure dynamic number insertion (DNI) is functioning correctly across ad campaigns

- Track and report on call conversion events in both Google Ads and Google Analytics



Audit & Quality Control

- Perform ongoing audits of tracking setups across accounts to ensure reliability

- Identify discrepancies or tracking failures and resolve them promptly

- Maintain detailed documentation of tracking implementations and changes



Collaboration

- Work with PPC strategists and campaign managers to align tracking goals with KPIs

- Communicate technical tracking concepts in a way that is understandable to non-technical tea
mbers and clients



**Qualifications**

- 2–4+ years of experience in digital marketing or technical implementation roles

- Proven experience setting up Google Ads goals (calls and form submissions)

- Strong proficiency with Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, and Google Analytics

- Experience with CallRail implementation and tracking setup

- Ability to read and work with basic HTML and JavaScript is a plus

- Familiarity with using browser dev tools and tag debugging tools (e.g., Tag Assistant, GTM preview)

- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Strong communication skills and ability to manage multiple tracking tasks across projects

- Must be available to work 9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time (MT)

- To confirm you've read the full job post, please put an asterisk (*) next to your name when applying.



**How to Apply**

Please submit your resume and highlight any hands-on experience you have with GTM, Google Ads tracking, and CallRail integration.

title: Mockup Designer
description:
Keyboard Mockup Designer (Commission Based, Remote)

We're looking for designers to create keyboard mockups on a per-commission basis. No fixed hours, fully remote, and all tools are free.



What you'll do:

-Source images online (Google, AI generation, clip art) and place them onto a provided template

-Remove backgrounds where needed

-Minor font and color adjustments

-Deliver completed PSD + all assets in a single ZIP file

-Revisions are light, usually just color or image swaps



Tools (all free, no cost to you):

-Photopea (web based)

-Picsart (background removal)
