We're onboarding up to 10 designers. Open to beginners with an eye for design.

To apply, send your portfolio or any past editing work to us.

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

title: Ethical Hacker / Offensive Security Freelancer (Lab Setup)

Knows how to bypass 2FA using reverse proxy attacks.

Has experience with red teaming or social engineering tools..

title: AI-Powered Website Designer — Polish Websites Using AI Tools (Full-Time VA)
description:
TO APPLY: You MUST include a short Loom video (2-3 minutes) showing you using ANY AI tool (Claude, ChatGPT, Lovable, v0, Bolt, Cursor) to build or improve a website. No video = no interview.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a web marketing agency that builds premium websites for local service businesses. We do NOT code manually — we use AI tools to generate and polish websites fast.



We need a full-time VA who has great design taste and knows how to use AI tools to make websites look stunning.



YOUR JOB:

1. Receive an AI-generated website draft via Slack

2. Use AI tools (Claude, Cursor, Lovable, ChatGPT) to polish it until it looks premium

3. Fix design details: spacing, colors, fonts, animations, mobile responsiveness

4. Push the final version live

5. Repeat 3-5 times per day



EXAMPLES OF THE QUALITY WE EXPECT (look at these sites):

- holmgaardservice.dk

- 

- fpboligservice.dk



These are the standard. If you can make websites look like these using AI tools, you're our person.



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT:

? Design taste — you know what looks good and what looks cheap

? Speed — you can polish a website in 30-60 minutes using AI

? AI fluency — you actively use Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Lovable, or similar daily

? Reliability — you show up every day, on time, and deliver

? Attention to detail — spacing, alignment, mobile view, animations



WHAT WE DO NOT CARE ABOUT:

? Formal education or degrees

? Years of "coding experience"

? Manual coding skills (we use AI for that)

? Certifications



REQUIREMENTS:

- You currently use AI tools for web development (show us in your Loom video)

- You have an eye for clean, modern, premium design

- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (enough to know what to ask the AI to fix)

- Available full-time Monday-Friday, 8+ hours/day

- Slack for communication

- Reliable internet

- Own computer



TO APPLY — answer these 3 questions:

1. Record a 2-3 min Loom video of you using an AI tool to build or improve a website

2. Which AI tools do you use daily and for what?

3. Look at holmgaardservice.dk — what would you change to make it even better?

I’m looking for a professional Video Editor who thrives on autonomy. This is a flexible remote role. I don’t believe in micro-management or tracking your every move. You’ll have the flexibility to manage your own schedule, as long as the work is strong and deadlines are hit.



This role is for someone who can do more than simply cut clips together. You’ll be editing Instagram Reels and TikTok videos for creator-led client accounts, working from raw footage, content ideas and strategic direction. 



At the start, there will be support on the strategy side, but over time I want someone who can take ownership of the edit itself, make strong creative decisions independently, and turn footage into content that feels sharp, engaging, premium and platform-native.



You should be comfortable reviewing footage, spotting the strongest 
nts, shaping the structure of the video, and feeding back on what footage would be more useful to capture next time so the content gets better over time.



The types of creators and niches we work across are primarily:



?  lifestyle

?  motorsport

?  sport

?  media

?  business

?  education



That means the editor needs range. Some edits need to feel internet-native, clever and engaging. Others need to feel cinematic, premium and more restrained.





THE VIBE: HIGH STANDARDS, SPEED AND GOOD JUDGEMENT



This role offers flexibility, but it is still a serious position with real standards.



The pace

I’m looking for someone who wants to build speed and efficiency over time. Fast turnaround and strong judgement matter here.



The pressure

Most days are smooth, but this can be a fast-moving environment when multiple edits land at once or deadlines get tight. I need someone who stays level-headed, communicates clearly and keeps standards high.



The standard

I’m looking for someone who understands short-form content, not just editing software. You should know what makes a Reel or TikTok work in terms of pacing, hooks, captions, structure, retention, visual stimulation and clarity.



---



WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR VISUALLY



I do NOT want generic talking-head edits, basic auto-captions, or lazy podcast-style clipping.



I’m looking for an editor who understands how to make creator-led social content feel intentional, engaging and premium.



Broadly, the styles I like sit across 3 lanes:



1) Personable infotainment



Educational or opinion-led talking-head videos that use interpreted captions, visual aids, 
s, cultural references, pop-up imagery, split screens and supporting B-roll to keep retention high.



2) Cinematic and kinetic



Premium, high-energy edits where the footage is elevated through pacing, motion, masking, sound design, subtle transitions and strong visual rhythm.



3) Soft cinematic



Minimal, premium edits where the footage is already strong and the editor knows how to enhance it through restraint, timing and polish rather than over-editing.



---



REQUIRED EDITING CAPABILITIES AND STYLE



Advanced mixed-media compositing



You must be highly skilled at integrating pop-culture imagery, 
s, historical images, relevant screenshots and visual aids into talking-head footage.



This includes clean 50/50 split-screen layouts where one side may contain the speaker and the other side may contain supporting footage, imagery or visual explanation.



Interpreted copywriting and typography



I do not want automated, word-for-word captions.



You must be able to listen to the audio, understand the core point being made, and create punchy, summarised on-screen text that strengthens the idea.



A lot of the edits I like use two distinct fonts to create contrast and hierarchy. The text should feel designed, not auto-generated.



Strong visual judgement



You need to know when an edit needs pop-up images, 
s, relevant B-roll, cultural references, cleaner negative space, minimalism, faster pacing or slower cinematic breathing room.



I am not looking for someone who applies the same editing formula to every video.



High-end social editing



You should know how to make standard footage feel better than it is.



That may involve clean masking, subject isolation, dynamic text placement, subtle zooms, motion blur, stronger pacing, tasteful overlays, stronger shot selection, polished transitions and elevated sound design.



Dynamic sound design



Your edits should sound as good as they look.



You should know how to use sound to support the viewing experience, whether that’s subtle UI pops, soft whooshes, crisp transitions, stronger impacts, risers, or more restrained natural Foley depending on the style of video.



Adaptable pacing



Some videos need speed, stimulation and density. Others need confidence, restraint and room to breathe.



You need to understand the difference and edit accordingly.



---



REFERENCE STYLES



Below are five reference reels that reflect the level and style I’m looking for.



These are not here for you to copy shot-for-shot. They are here to show the level of editing taste, pacing, layout, visual interpretation and overall aesthetic I want.



Reference 1 — Personable infotainment



I like this because the images pop up in direct relation to what’s being discussed. It is not the most technically complex edit, but it is highly engaging. The images take up meaningful space on screen, the captions use two fonts, and the use of 
s, cultural imagery and supporting visuals really helps bring the idea to life. This works especially well for creator clients trying to educate in an entertaining way.







Reference 2 — Personable infotainment



Again, this is a relatively simple edit, but it’s effective. The split between talking head and supporting footage works well. I also like that the text is not simply repeating the speaker word-for-word. It interprets and expands on the point, which means the editor needs to actually understand the message, not just transcribe it.




==



Reference 3 — Soft cinematic



I like how cinematic this feels. The footage already does a lot of the heavy lifting, but the edit enhances it through subtle transitions, pacing and polish rather than overdoing it.




==



Reference 4 — Cinematic and kinetic



I like the animations here, the pacing, and the way the cinematic footage is elevated through post-production. It feels premium without feeling messy.




==



Reference 5 — Cinematic B-roll-led content



This is the kind of B-roll-led video style I want some clients making. It’s a lighter lift for the creator when it comes to filming, but the magic is in the edit.




==



---



READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING



Be honest with yourself before applying.



If you do NOT think you can edit to the level of the references above, DO NOT APPLY.



If your current sample work does NOT compare to the level, taste, pacing or execution of the reference work above, do not apply.



If your work is mainly generic podcast clipping, basic captions, low-effort reels, slow flat edits, or templated short-form that all looks the same, DO NOT APPLY.



I am looking for someone whose current level is already close to the standard shown above or has shown potential to achieve this.



This is deliberate. I want to save both your time and mine.



---



COMPENSATION AND TERMS



Salary: $700 USD per month (negotiable)

Payment: Paid consistently on the last Friday of every month

Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible working hours

Turnaround: Same-day turnaround preferred, 24 hours maximum unless agreed otherwise in advance

Equipment: You must have your own professional editing setup and hardware

Start date: Immediate start preferred



---



## TIMELINE



I am looking to move quickly.



The job advert will be closed within the next 24 hours.

A final decision will be made by Friday at 5pm UK Time.



If you are genuinely interested, you will need to be PROACTIVE. Do not send a vague message and disappear. Send the right examples, follow the instructions properly, and make it easy for me to assess you quickly.



---



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS — READ CAREFULLY



I want to see your talent, not a document.



DO NOT send me a CV or resume. CVs will be dismissed immediately.



To apply, please send:



1) Exactly 5 links to your best work



No more than 5. No fewer than 5. No general portfolio links.



I want the FIVE pieces of work you believe are the closest match to the style and quality level referenced above.



2) A short note explaining why you chose those 5 examples



Keep it brief. I want to understand your judgement and taste.



3) A sentence confirming your availability



Please confirm whether you would be able to start immediately.



4) Your editing software stack



Tell me what you edit with.



If you cannot follow these instructions properly, this role is probably not the right fit.



---



WHAT GOOD APPLICATIONS WILL SHOW



The strongest applicants will usually show some mix of:



? talking-head edits

? educational or insight-led content

? split-screen or mixed-media edits

? fast-paced creator content

? cinematic B-roll-led work

? strong text hierarchy and on-screen design

? evidence of good pacing and good judgement



---



FINAL NOTE



This role is for someone who wants ownership, speed, creative responsibility and clear standards.



If your work already looks and feels close to the references above, apply.



If your work DOESN'T already looks and feels close to the references above, BUT you believe with the right opportunity you can achieve that level of production, then apply.



If neither of the above, don’t.



Thanks,



Phil

title: HubSpot Developer

title: Appointment Setter & Virtual Assistant (B2B SaaS — Coaching Industry)
description:
Company: CoachHQ



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)



Hours: Full-time (40 hrs/week, flexible schedule)





About CoachHQ



CoachHQ is a B2B SaaS platform built for coaching businesses — helping health, fitness, life, and business coaches manage their clients, payments, contracts, and operations in one place.



We're not a fitness app. We're not a generic CRM. We're a business operating system for coaches who want to run their company like a real business.



We're at launch stage and growing. This is a ground-floor opportunity to join a small, focused team and grow with the company.





The Role



This is a dual role: part outbound appointment setting, part virtual assistant. You'll help us book sales calls, track leads, and keep operations running smoothly.



Appointment Setting (Primary Focus)



Run outbound DM campaigns on Instagram and LinkedIn to book discovery calls with coaching business owners. Follow proven outreach scripts and frameworks (full training provided). Research and identify potential leads: coaches, coaching business operators, and business mentors. Track all conversations and lead status in our CRM. Follow up consistently — no lead gets forgotten.



Virtual Assistant (Secondary Focus)



Keep lead tracking and CRM data clean and organized. Research outreach targets (coaches, mentors, potential partners). Support with general admin: scheduling, inbox management, coordination. Help the founder stay focused on product and sales by handling operational tasks.





Who We're Looking For



You are:



Organized and reliable — you don't need chasing, you just get things done.



Comfortable with tech — you don't need to code, but you know your way around tools like Google Workspace, Notion, CRMs, and social media platforms. You've heard of Stripe. You know what SaaS means. If you don't know something, you learn fast.



A clear communicator — you write in natural, professional English with good tone.



Proactive — you flag problems, suggest improvements, and take ownership.



Coachable — you follow systems, ask questions, and get better based on feedback.



Looking for long-term work — this is not a short-term gig.



Bonus (not required):



Experience with appointment setting, outbound sales, or lead generation. Familiarity with B2B SaaS or the coaching/fitness industry. Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRMs.





This Role Is NOT For You If You:



Copy-paste generic messages and hope for the best. Disappear when things get busy. Need constant reminders to do your job. Treat this as a side hustle you'll "get to eventually." Struggle with written English or professional tone.



We're building something real. Standards matter.





What You Get



Full training on outreach frameworks, scripts, and tools. Direct access to the founder — you're part of the early team, not a cog. Clear expectations and honest feedback. Long-term stability and growth as CoachHQ scales. Flexible hours (but consistent output expected).





How to Apply



Applications that do not follow these steps will be ignored.



 
 with the subject line: CoachHQ Setter/VA Application — [Your Name]



Include the following in your
:



1. A short introduction about yourself (2–3 sentences)

2. Your relevant experience — appointment setting, outbound sales, VA work, customer support, or similar

3. Why this role interests you

4. Visit hq.coach AND look at the Instagram 
 — then explain in your own words what CoachHQ is and who it's for (2–3 sentences max)

5. What does "B2B SaaS" mean? (Just a sentence to confirm you understand)

6. Your internet speed (screenshot from speedtest.net), your device setup, your available working hours, and confirmation you're looking for long-term work



Test Task (Required):



Find 5 fitness or life coaches on Instagram who appear to run a real coaching business (not just posting content — actually selling coaching). For each one, write a short 2–3 sentence DM opener you'd use to start a conversation about CoachHQ. Include their Instagram handle and your message. Paste this in your application
.



Do not message our Instagram or LinkedIn. Applications sent anywhere other than 
 will be ignored.

title: Shopify Direct Response Page Builder — Landing Pages & PDPs
description:
We're a supplement subscription brand scaling on paid traffic. Every week we need new direct response landing pages live — advertorials, pre-sell pages, listicle landing pages, and product detail pages built for multiple customer avatars. The pages perform or we replace them. That's the standard.

We already have the copy. We already have the design references. Your job is to build fast, build accurately, and make sure every page tracks correctly.



What you'll be doing:



Building direct response landing pages and PDPs on Shopify from provided copy and design references — pixel-perfect execution every time. Every page you build must have full Meta Pixel and Google Ads conversion tracking set up and verified. Turnaround is 24 hours per page or per 2-page funnel. This is the expectation, not the exception.



You'll also manage our subscription app setup and integrations (Loop Subscriptions or equivalent) — handling subscription flows, offer logic, and troubleshooting when things break.



This role is for you if:



You've built DR landing pages before and understand the difference between a brochure page and a page built to convert paid traffic

You're fast, clean, and don't need hand-holding

You take pride in zero tracking errors

You want a stable full-time role with real performance upside



This role is not for you if:



You need days to deliver a single page

You've never touched a subscription app

You treat tracking as someone else's problem



To confirm you've read this post in full, start your application with the word "convert" before anything else. Applications that don't include this will not be opened.

Portfolio required. Only direct response pages will be reviewed — advertorials, pre-sell pages, listicle landing pages, or DR product pages built for paid traffic. General website pages, branding pages, or portfolio sites will not be considered regardless of quality.



Compensation: $800/month base + a fixed bonus paid for every winning page or funnel that hits conversion benchmarks. Bonus amount shared during onboarding.

title: Creative Video Editor  – Daily YouTube Videos (Think for Yourself)
description:
Pay: $300/month (1 video per day, 7–9 minutes) 

Paid $75/week.



---



Read this carefully before applying.



I am NOT looking for someone who just follows instructions.



I’m looking for a creative video editor who can think, make decisions, and take ownership of the final video.



---



What You’ll Do (Daily):



You will turn a script + voiceover into a complete YouTube video.



I will provide:

- Script (with structure + suggestions)

- Voiceover audio

- Some B-roll clips (when available)

- A reference video (the exact style to match)



You are responsible for:

- Building the video from scratch (not re-editing)

- Choosing the best visuals for each 
nt

- Generating additional B-roll when needed (Grok, stock, screen recordings, etc.)

- Adding A-roll clips (HeyGen or provided)

- Syncing visuals to audio

- Adding captions, motion, zooms, overlays (CapCut)

- Making the video engaging and easy to watch



If something is missing visually, you solve it.



---



Creative Responsibility (Important):



If the script says:

“people can’t recognize faces”



I expect you to think:

? show a face  

? show confusion  

? make it visual  



Not:

? drop a random clip



---



Style We Want:



- Fast-paced and engaging  

- Clean but dynamic  

- Educational + emotional  

- You will be given an exact reference video to match  



---



Requirements:



- Strong CapCut skills (Pro preferred) or tell me what editing software you use and prefer.

- Ability to think and make creative decisions without being told every step

- Reliable DAILY turnaround (non-negotiable)

- Good internet for uploading/downloading assets

- Fluent in English



---



What Success Looks Like:



You take:

- a script  

- a voiceover  

- basic assets  



…and turn it into a complete, polished video people actually want to watch.



You are responsible for the final result.



---



Application Process (Paid Test Only):



No portfolio needed.



To apply, you will complete a paid test task.



You will:

- Receive a script + voiceover + reference video

- Create a short sample video



You will be paid $7 USD for this test.



I will choose the best editor based on:

- creativity

- pacing

- visual choices

- overall feel



---



To Apply:



Send a message and confirm:

- You can complete the paid test

- You can deliver 1 video per day



Start your message with: “I THINK”



(If you don’t include this, I will not respond.)



---



Looking for someone long-term who wants consistent monthly income and can grow with me.

title: Outbound Engagement Specialist
description:
Jumper Media is a social media marketing agency that helps brands grow through strategic social media engagement and authentic community building.



We are looking for a detail-oriented Outbound Engagement Specialist who understands that social media growth comes from real conversations and meaningful interactions — not generic comments.



Your role will be to represent our clients inside their Instagram communities by engaging with the right audiences and contributing to relevant conversations.



This is not a typical VA role. We are looking for someone who:

• Communicates naturally online

• Can adapt tone depending on audience and brand voice

• Understands online communities and social media culture

• Takes initiative to identify new engagement opportunities

• If you enjoy writing thoughtful comments and observing how people interact on social media, this role may be a great fit.



Role Details

Position: Outbound Engagement Specialist / Community Manager

Clients: 5–7 accounts

Work Type: Remote, Part-Time

Schedule: 7:00 PM – 12:00 AM

Compensation: $3/hour



What You'll Be Doing

In this role, you will help grow client Instagram accounts through strategic outbound engagement and community interaction.



You will:

• Write thoughtful comments on posts within the client’s target audience

• Like posts strategically to increase brand visibility

• Complete a minimum of 25 meaningful comments and 25 likes per client per day

• Engage with posts from potential customers, creators, and industry accounts

• Identify accounts that match the client’s target audience and engage naturally with their content

• Adjust tone depending on the brand voice, niche, and context

• Observe which comments spark responses or conversations

• Suggest new communities, hashtags, or engagement opportunities that may help grow the account

• This role requires someone who can think beyond simple tasks and contribute to genuine community engagement.



What We're Looking For

• At least 2 years of experience in community management, social media management, or a similar role

• Strong written English and ability to write natural, thoughtful comments

• Good understanding of Instagram culture and different audience types

• Ability to identify relevant accounts and engage appropriately

• Comfortable adjusting tone depending on context and brand voice

• Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT for ideation and workflow support

• Strong time management and ability to manage multiple client accounts during a shift

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work consistently during scheduled hours



Technical Requirements

• Reliable laptop or desktop

• Stable internet connection

• Ability to use VPN if required





Does this role sound like a good fit? Submit your application by sending your CV to 
 with the subject "SMM Outbound Engagement Specialist".

title: Real Estate Acquisitions VA
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

 us at:

title: Digital Operations Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone with a proven track record of helping entrepreneurs grow their businesses through execution and measurable results. You are a strong thinker and problem-solver who can take ideas from A to Z and turn them into action independently.



This role requires high ownership, clear communication, and a proactive mindset. You don’t wait for instructions — you actively follow up on tasks, clarify priorities, and make sure nothing is delayed or left unclear.



You should be able to think ahead, work independently, and consistently move work forward with minimal supervision. This includes quickly understanding existing workflows and improving them where possible.



This role includes both recurring operational tasks and flexible project-based work depending on business priorities and active initiatives.



Position Details

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET

• Hours: 40 hours per week



Benefits

• $960 USD/month ($6 per hour)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• Weekends Off

• Benefits allowance after 6 months ($80/month)



Core Profile

• Demonstrated ability to support entrepreneurs in growing and scaling their businesses through execution and outcomes

• Self-starter with strong initiative and problem-solving ability

• Fast and reliable execution with strong follow-through

• Structured thinker who can build, improve, and manage systems independently

• Comfortable taking ownership from start to finish with minimal supervision

• Proactive communicator who provides clear and timely updates

• Strong ability to work with ambiguity while still moving tasks forward

• Able to take initiative in managing communication flow, including following up on priorities and ensuring clarity without needing reminders



AI & Digital Competency

• Proficient in AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield, etc.)

• Able to turn AI outputs into clear, brand-aligned content

• Comfortable creating simple AI workflows and prompt templates



Operations & Systems

• Strong G-Suite skills (Sheets, Drive organization, Docs, workflow management)

• Good digital file organization and naming discipline

• Ability to create SOPs and improve workflows

• Comfortable managing multiple ongoing tasks and projects



Content & Marketing

• Strong video editing skills (short-form content, reels, clean edits, captions, consistent branding)

• Ability to support social media growth and content execution

• Understanding of branding and audience engagement

• Please include the word “SONDER” in the subject line



Additionally:

• Preferably has some design ability and understands aesthetic consistency. Can look at older content and pieces we have created and evolve that so the new piece feels on-brand and fits seamlessly with the aesthetic.



Required Qualifications

• Strong organizational and communication skills

• Experience in operations, administration, or workflow support

• Self-directed and able to work with minimal supervision

• Reliable device and internet connection



Technical Requirement

• Access to a reliable Apple device



Preferred

• Real estate, sales, or service-based business experience

• Background in digital operations or system building



To Apply

• Send your resume and portfolio

• Screenshot showing your computer specs and internet speed.

• Answer: “Why are you a good fit for this role?”

Opportunity to grow within a values-driven organization

title: WE ARE LOOKING FOR INSURANCE VERIFICATION AND PRIOR AUTHORIZATION SPECIALIST
description:
Apply now via the link below!

Skilled Intake Specialist - Healthcare


/open-jobs/



WHAT WE OFFER

-Compensation & Benefits

-Competitive compensation

-Monthly Company Bonus Program

-Paid Vacation Leave

-Healthcare Insurance

-PhilHealth Insurance

-Internet Allowance

-Holiday Bonus

-Work Environment & Growth

-100% remote work — work from anywhere with a stable internet connection



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Handle end-to-end insurance verification for new DME patients (urology, ostomy, catheter) via portal and phone, validating insurance information and HCPC codes, documenting results, and routing to appropriate teams.

Manage the full prior authorization lifecycle — collecting clinical documentation, submitting requests to payers, tracking status, initiating re-authorizations ahead of reorder dates, and flagging denials or appeals to internal contacts. 

Conduct reverifications for existing patients with coverage changes, maintain the daily reverification queue, provide overflow support during high-volume periods, and flag patterns that may indicate seasonal spikes.

Ensure accurate documentation across all verification and authorization interactions.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Minimum 3 years of experience in US medical insurance verification, prior authorization, or RCM — REQUIRED

Prior Authorization (PA) and Insurance Verification (IV) experience — REQUIRED

Healthcare experience — REQUIRED

Working knowledge of US payer portals (Availity, NaviMed, UHC, BCBS, Cigna, etc.)

Familiarity with HCPC codes and DME billing requirements, including ostomy and catheter products

Experience handling Medicare and Medicare Advantage plans

Strong English communication skills — written and verbal (phone calls to US payers required)

Ability to manage multi-stage caseloads with concurrent active authorizations

Familiarity with insurance change workflows, COB (coordination of benefits), and plan terminations

Close attention to detail and the ability to maintain quality under volume pressure

Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours remotely from any location

Experience in DME, urology, ostomy, catheter, home health, or specialty medical billing

CloseMore Solutions is a growing B2B marketing agency that helps real estate wholesalers generate motivated seller leads and close more deals. We build done-for-you lead generation systems using Meta ads, CRM automation, and AI-powered outreach and we're now adding cold
 as a core channel.

 engine from day one.



What You'll Do



Build and manage cold
 campaigns in Instantly sequences, A/B tests, inbox rotation, and deliverability management

Use 
 to research, build, and export targeted lead lists for outreach campaigns

Write and optimize subject lines and
 copy that gets replies, not just opens

Monitor campaign health bounce rates, reply rates, domain reputation and proactively fix issues

How to Apply

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: YouTube Editor based in CEBU for LONG FORM 20-30 Min
description:
YOUTUBE



You're Not Just an Editor. You're a Storyteller Who Lives for the Ocean.

We're Expedition Drenched, a YouTube adventure channel currently based in Cebu, Philippines, documenting life aboard two expedition sailboats as we prepare to circumnavigate Australia.

We need a long term Video Editor and Social Media Manager who can grow with us.



You must be:

- Based in Cebu. We have too much footage to transfer over the internet so will need to be able to give and receive hard drives back and forth

- A natural adventure storyteller who knows how to open a video with a hook that stops the scroll and builds an arc that keeps people watching to the end. If you only have short form videos in your portfolio please do not apply.

- Skilled at colour grading underwater and ocean footage.

- Confident cleaning and shaping audio recorded outdoors in wind and open water environments.

- Able to put together engaging stories from large amounts of footage



We are not looking for someone who focuses on AI platforms to edit for them. You must be self skilled in Final Cut, Premier or DaVinci



To apply:

Send your CV, a short note on why this role is for you, and links to at least two LONG FORM editing examples. Ocean or underwater footage in your reel will go a long way

title: Executive Assistant
description:
We're Hiring: Executive Assistant (Instagram + Ops)



We’re growing fast and looking for an A* Executive Assistant to take ownership of our Instagram DMs and help streamline key virtual processes in the business.



This is NOT for you if:



You need to clock off by 9pm every night.

Your written English isn’t sharp.

You don’t understand how Instagram or social media works.

You’ve already got another job or side hustle pulling focus.

You plan to use ChatGPT (or anything AI-generated) to write your application we’ll know. Don’t waste our time or yours.



Skip this post seriously if that’s you.



This is for you if:



Your written English is top-tier (grammar nerds, we love you).

You’re a people person who can build trust in the DMs.

You’ve got a genuine interest in fitness and helping others win.

You’re hungry to grow with a business that’s scaling fast and want to earn more responsibility over time.



We’re after someone driven, reliable, and ready to work 6–7 days a week across UK evenings and weekends. You’ll play a real part in building something special here and if you thrive, so will your role, your income, and your impact.



To apply:



 
 with the subject line: Potentia Executive



Include 2–3 sentences on why you’d be a great fit. I’ll be checking every
 personally and yes, I’ll know if it’s written by AI.



Follow + D
 on 



Tell me what you think of this instagram

title: Tenancy manager
description:
Job Title

Tenancy Management Admin – Full Time – Remote



Job Description

We are looking for a highly reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive Tenancy Manager Admin to join our team full time on a remote basis.



We manage a portfolio of residential properties in central London and need someone who is precise, organised, and able to handle important administrative tasks without mistakes. This is NOT a generic VA role. We need someone who can work carefully, follow procedures exactly, and take real ownership of their work.



This role involves handling sensitive tasks such as rent tracking, tenant administration, contract checks, move-in coordination, landlord and tenant communications, and general property management support (problem solving). Accuracy is absolutely essential.



Main Responsibilities



Update and maintain rent ledgers accurately

Track rent payments, arrears, and outstanding balances

Prepare and check tenancy documents, guarantor documents, and contract packs

Ensure all required documents and payments are complete before move-ins

Draft clear and professional
s to tenants, landlords, and contractors

Solve and deal with maintenance issues through our trusted contractors

Follow up on maintenance issues and confirm completion

Keep spreadsheets, records, and internal systems fully accurate and up to date

Report any issue, discrepancy immediately and handle general admin tasks

Follow procedures carefully and double/triple-check all important tasks before completion



Requirements



Previous experience in property management, real estate admin, leasing support, or a similar role (Uk or US preferred but not essential)

Excellent written and spoken English

Very strong attention to detail

Highly organised and able to manage multiple tasks carefully

Able to follow instructions and procedures exactly

Good problem-solving skills and common sense

Comfortable using spreadsheets,
, and online systems

Able to work independently and take ownership of tasks

Honest, reliable, and consistent, and able to work under pressure



Important

This role requires a high level of accuracy. Mistakes in this position can have financial and operational consequences. We are looking for someone who naturally double-checks their work and is able to think outside the box and takes pride in getting things right.



What We Offer

Full-time remote role

Opportunity to grow within the company

Performance-based company bonus

2 weeks Paid holidays after 1 year of continuous work

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Working Hours

Applicants must be available to work during UK business hours



Salary

Competitive, depending on experience and suitability.

Performance bonus



Application Process

To apply, please send:



Your CV

A short introduction about your experience in property management or similar work

Examples of the types of admin/property tasks you have handled

Confirmation of your availability for full-time work

Confirmation of whether you currently work for any other clients



Please note that shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a practical test to assess accuracy, judgment, and attention 

to detail.



Please note: to confirm attention to detail, copy and paste this exact sentence at the top of your application: “I understand that accuracy is essential in tenancy management.”

title: Game Developer — Playable Ad Creative
description:
Cocos Developer — Playable Ad Creative

We make mobile games and we're looking for a developer to join our creative production team. Your job isn't building games from scratch — it's taking proven concepts from our existing title and producing high volumes of polished, self-contained playable ads in Cocos Creator: new layouts, fresh mechanics, visual tweaks, and gameplay variations that we can test as ad content across networks.

It's output-focused work by nature, but the best person for this role will bring genuine creative instinct to every build — understanding what makes a playable hook a viewer in the first two seconds, keep them engaged, and drive an install.

What You'll Be Doing



Building and iterating playable ad experiences in Cocos Creator based on scenes and mechanics from our existing title

Producing multiple creative variants from a single brief — new layouts, camera angles, UI treatments, and gameplay twists

Keeping every build under the 5MB file size limit, using CLI tooling to audit, profile, and optimise assets, scripts, and bundles systematically

Optimising 3D assets in Blender — decimating meshes, reducing poly counts, and preparing game-ready models that look great without breaking the size budget

Writing clean, modular code that can be rapidly forked and varied without bloat accumulating across iterations

Using AI coding assistants (Claude Code or equivalent) as a core part of your workflow — not occasionally, but as standard practice for boilerplate, refactoring, and problem-solving

Pitching and executing your own original playable concepts — exhilarating, interactive 
nts that retain users and perform as ad content

Working within an established codebase, reading and extending existing scripts confidently



What We're Looking For



Strong experience with Unity or Cocos Creator — if you know Unity well, Cocos is a short bridge and we'll support the transition

Demonstrated ability to use AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.) as a genuine accelerant in your programming workflow — this is non-negotiable

Hands-on experience using CLI tools to analyse and reduce build sizes: understanding what's eating your budget, stripping unused assets, compressing textures, and hitting hard size targets

Solid Blender skills with a focus on optimisation — you should be comfortable taking a mesh and stripping it down to the leanest version that still holds up visually in a real-time context

Comfortable working inside an existing project and codebase rather than building from zero

A creative eye — you should be able to look at a mechanic and have ideas, not just wait to be told what to change

Self-directed and productive working remotely with minimal hand-holding

Comfortable with repetitive, output-focused work without letting quality slip



Nice to Have



Existing Cocos Creator experience and familiarity with its build pipeline

Familiarity with mobile playable ad formats and what makes interactive ad content perform

Experience optimising for ad network playable specs (Meta, AppLovin, etc.)

Basic video or screen capture skills for documenting and sharing build previews



Salary & Growth

Starting salary is based on experience and portfolio. We review performance after an initial period, and those who demonstrate strong output and creative initiative can expect salary progression — this is a role where the right person can grow quickly.

Hours

For the first week or so, we'll ask you to work UK hours (10am–6pm) during an induction period so we can get you set up properly and answer questions in real time. Once you're settled, you'll have much more flexibility to work hours that suit you.

To Apply

Share your portfolio — Cocos or Unity projects, playables, or anything that shows your work in action. Interactive demos are ideal, but video or GIF walkthroughs of scenes or effects are great too. Tell us briefly about a project where you had to work within someone else's existing codebase, and how you use AI tools day-to-day in your development workflow.

title: Experienced Setter
description:
Ghostlabb is hiring an experienced Setter to run outbound conversations and book qualified calls. This is a weekday role with daily output requirements, fast response times, and clear KPIs. You must have at least two years of setting experience and be able to match a specific voice.



What you’ll be responsible for

• Sending 25 high?quality outbound DMs every weekday

• Managing all active conversations with a max 12?hour response time

• Following up on ghosted conversations using provided templates

• Updating the Pipeline Tracker with statuses, notes, and next steps

• Sending the Calendly link to warm prospects and confirming they booked

• Setting reminder dates for delayed prospects

• Submitting a daily EOD report in Slack

• Working a consistent hours



What we’re looking for

• Minimum 2 years of proven setting experience

• Strong written English and tone?matching ability

• Ability to keep conversations human, not scripted

• Reliable, consistent, and comfortable working inside structured systems

• Experience with coaching/consulting audiences is a plus



ICP you’ll be targeting

Coaches, consultants, and service providers in the US, Canada, UK, Ireland, or Europe who are established, selling a service, and capable of investing $1,000+.



To apply

Start your message with a concise, to?the?point answer to this question:

“Walk me through your exact process from first message to booked call.”



Then include your experience, availability, and any relevant results.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: WordPress & SEO Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are building an in-house WordPress & SEO team to manage 50+ website domains and are looking for skilled, self-driven specialists to join us full time. In this role, you will own both the WordPress build and maintenance side of our sites as well as the full SEO workflow — from audit and keyword research through to on-site fixes and content implementation.

This is a remote position with consistent full-time hours. You must be comfortable working independently, hitting deadlines, and communicating clearly within a fast-moving team environment.



What You'll Be Doing

• Building, maintaining, and updating WordPress websites to a high standard across 50+ domains

• Customising themes, page builders (Elementor, Divi, Gutenberg, etc.), and plugins to meet site requirements

• Applying basic HTML, CSS, and PHP edits to resolve site issues and implement on-page changes

• Conducting full SEO audits across assigned domains (technical, on-page, content, backlinks)

• Performing in-depth keyword research and building keyword maps for priority pages

• Implementing on-site SEO fixes based on audit findings

• Writing and optimizing content for key pages based on keyword strategy

• Managing and updating internal tracking tools to report progress across domains

• Collaborating with tea
mbers and escalating blockers to the team lead

• Monitoring GSC and analytics to flag ranking changes, crawl issues, or indexing problems

• Meeting turnaround targets for each domain phase



Requirements

You must have:



• Advanced WordPress site building skills — you must be confident building and managing sites end to end

• Solid working knowledge of at least one major page builder (Elementor, Divi, Gutenberg, or similar)

• Basic code knowledge — ability to read and make edits in HTML, CSS, and basic PHP

• Proven, high-level understanding of technical SEO, on-page SEO, and content optimization

• Experience managing or auditing multiple websites simultaneously

• Strong working knowledge of Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Familiarity with crawling tools such as Screaming Frog or Sitebulb

• Ability to manage your own workload, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines without micromanagement

• Clear written communication skills and ability to work within a team

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated work setup for full-time remote work



Preferred (not required):



• Active SEMrush account — applicants with SEMrush access will be prioritized in our hiring process

• Experience with Ahrefs, Moz, or similar SEO platforms

• Intermediate CSS or JavaScript skills beyond basic edits

• Experience with WooCommerce or other WordPress e-commerce setups

• Familiarity with schema markup and structured data implementation

• Background working with agencies, large portfolios, or multi-site WordPress environments



What We Offer

• Full-time remote position with consistent hours

• Opportunity to work across a large, diverse portfolio of 50+ domains

• Collaborative team environment with clear processes and internal tools

• Room to grow as we expand the team



How to Apply

To be considered, please send the following:



• Your CV or resume highlighting relevant SEO experience

• A brief overview of your SEO background and the types of sites you have worked on

• Confirmation of whether you have an active SEMrush account

• Any examples of audits, keyword maps, or content work you have completed (optional but encouraged)

Answer to this question: Walk me through the last WordPress site you built or worked on. What was the niche, what page builder or theme did you use, and what was one specific SEO or technical issue you ran into on that site and how did you personally fix it?

title: TikTok Video Editor / Researcher (Affiliate Marketing)
description:
Hello,



I am looking for a full-time TikTok video editor and researcher who can source and edit short-form content for affiliate marketing offers in niches like shopping, clothing, lifestyle, and deals.



Your job is to find raw clips, edit them in CapCut, and create clean, natural videos that are ready to post.



The goal is to create content that feels completely organic and native to TikTok, not like ads.



This is NOT traditional editing. You must understand TikTok-style content and how to make videos feel natural and realistic.



This is long-term work if you perform well.



Your task will be to recreate videos based on the examples provided. You will source your own clips and edit them to match the exact style shown. You should not reuse the same clips and must follow the structure and pacing from the examples.



Study the examples below carefully. This is EXACTLY the style you will be creating.



Google Drive Examples (copy and paste into your browser):

[
]



The folder includes raw clips (original footage) and final edited versions showing exactly what I want the end result to look like.



Your main responsibility is sourcing clips and editing them correctly.



You will find clips of people shopping in stores, trying on clothes, browsing items, walking around stores, and showing hauls after purchase. The clips must feel natural and realistic. Raw clips should be at least 20 to 30 seconds long and must have enough screen time without text so they can be edited cleanly. The clips do not need to be viral.



You will edit all clips using CapCut. Your job is to remove all text using the split tool, remove dead time, and keep only the strongest usable 
nts.



Final videos must be 15 seconds or less and must have NO text on screen at any point. The final result should be fast-paced, clean, and feel completely natural.



Speed adjustments are important. You will often need to increase the speed of clips to improve pacing, but this is dependent on the clip. Some parts may be sped up more, while other parts should be slowed slightly if needed. Use judgment to keep the video smooth and natural.



Most videos will not come perfectly structured. You are expected to build the flow using multiple clips. For example, one clip may show an item, another clip may show someone trying it on, another may show browsing, and another may show proof.



You are allowed to combine clips from different videos as long as everything matches naturally. Avoid obvious differences between people and make sure the environment and store feel consistent. The final video must feel like one continuous clip and the viewer should not be able to tell it was made from multiple sources.



When possible, clips should follow a natural store flow such as entering the store, walking in, browsing items, trying items on, selecting items, and ending with proof. This is ideal but not always required.



Every video must end with some form of proof. This includes checkout at the register (payment terminal showing a price drop or discount), walking out with bags, showing purchased items, or haul clips.



When showing checkout from shopping clips, this refers to the payment terminal screen showing a discounted total or price drop (for example, a higher price reduced to a lower amount, or showing a completed payment). This is an important form of proof.



Haul clips can be used as standalone content or as part of the natural flow, but should not be forced if they do not fit.



You will also create checkout-style screen recordings later on. These involve showing discounts using cart and checkout pages. Training and examples for this will be provided after hiring, so this is not required for the initial test.



Editing must be simple. Use only the split tool. Do not add captions, effects, transitions, or over-edit. Your job is to keep the video clean, fast, and natural.



You must also keep clips organized so I can clearly see the original clip with its source and the final edited version.



You will be expected to produce multiple videos per day consistently.



Do not send overly edited videos, do not use clips with too much text, do not create content that feels like ads, and do not only choose viral clips.



Compensation is between $300 and $500 per month depending on experience and performance. This is long-term work for the right candidate, and higher pay opportunities may be available if you perform well.



Application Instructions:



Put “READY” at the top of your application.



Then send:



3 videos that match this style

the original TikTok link for each video

the fully edited version for each video



Make sure:



videos are 15 seconds or less

NO text on screen

clean and natural pacing



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.

title: Accommodation Solutions Manager (Finding Suitable Properties)
description:
Accommodation Solutions Manager



Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 09:00 to 17:30 CET with a 30 minute break

Reports to: Operations Manager / Managing Director



Role Purpose in One Sentence

To manage client accommodation requirements from initial enquiry through to secured property, while sourcing effectively, communicating professionally, and helping convert opportunities into confirmed business.



Role Summary

Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH is seeking a highly capable, experienced, and commercially minded Accommodation Solutions Manager to source and secure suitable accommodation for our clients across multiple locations and countries.



This role is responsible for managing accommodation requests from start to finish, liaising directly with clients to understand their requirements, keeping them updated throughout the process, sourcing suitable options, negotiating with landlords and agents, and presenting solutions professionally in order to help win business.



The successful candidate must be highly organised, proactive, confident in communication, and commercially aware. They must be able to work with minimal training beyond our systems and current processes, and be ready to take ownership of live requests quickly.



Core Purpose of the Role

To liaise with clients, understand their accommodation requirements, source and secure suitable properties, and manage the full sourcing process in a professional, efficient, and commercially effective manner.



Main Areas of Responsibility



1. Client Liaison and Requirement Management

1. Liaise directly with clients to understand their accommodation requirements clearly.

2. Gather key details such as location, travel time, budget, start dates, parking, number of people, and preferred apartment sizes.

3. Keep clients updated throughout the sourcing process with clear and professional communication.

4. Present suitable options confidently and help guide clients towards the best solution.

5. Sell the proposed accommodation and company service professionally to help convert opportunities into confirmed business.







2. Property Sourcing

1. Source suitable apartments, houses, apart hotels, and other accommodation options in line with client requirements.

2. Research relevant areas, project locations, travel routes, and local market conditions.

3. Contact landlords, agents, and providers to identify suitable options quickly and efficiently.

4. Build and maintain strong relationships with suppliers and accommodation contacts.

5. Think proactively and creatively when supply is limited or briefs are difficult.







3. Negotiation and Progression

1. Negotiate rates, terms, deposits, notice periods, utility arrangements, and other key commercial points.

2. Assess the suitability, value, and practicality of properties before presenting them.

3. Arrange viewings where required and verify property details carefully.

4. Progress properties through to approval, agreement, and handover.

5. Support extensions and renewals where required.



4. Systems and Internal Coordination

1. Keep all sourcing activity updated accurately in company systems and trackers.

2. Maintain clear records of client communication, property options, negotiations, and progress.

3. Communicate effectively with service, operations, finance, and management teams.

4. Escalate delays, risks, or issues early where necessary.

5. Use company systems and processes correctly, including Time Doctor and the company phone system app.







Experience Required

Applicants must have:

1. Proven experience in property sourcing, accommodation sourcing, lettings, serviced accommodation, relocation, hospitality, or a closely related field.

2. Strong experience liaising directly with clients and understanding their requirements.

3. Strong experience speaking with landlords, agents, and providers.

4. Experience negotiating terms confidently and professionally.

5. Experience managing multiple live requests at the same time.

6. Demonstrable experience and references that Kassoe Housing Switzerland GmbH can contact directly.







Essential Candidate Requirements

The successful candidate must:

1. Be highly organised and detail focused.

2. Be commercially aware and confident in selling solutions to clients.

3. Be proactive, persistent, and resourceful.

4. Be confident speaking with clients, landlords, agents, and providers.

5. Have excellent written and spoken English.

6. Have a clear and easily understandable accent, as strong verbal communication is imperative to the role.

7. Be capable of working with minimal training.

8. Be ready to take ownership of live sourcing activity within the first couple of weeks.

9. Be comfortable using company systems, including Time Doctor.

10. Be comfortable using the company phone system app provided.

11. Be able to work remotely while maintaining full availability during CET hours.

12. Treat this as their only role, strictly.







Working Hours

This is a full time remote role.

1. Working hours are 09:00 to 17:30 CET with a 30 minute break.

2. This equates to 40 paid hours per week, minimum guaranteed.

3. The successful candidate must be fully available and working during CET hours regardless of their country of residence.

4. The successful candidate must also be willing to work overtime where the role reasonably requires it.







Employment Conditions

1. This role is remote.

2. This role must be the employee’s only role, strictly.

3. Paid holiday entitlement is 20 days per year after successful completion of the three month probation period.

4. A sickness pay plan will apply after successful completion of probation.

5. Time Doctor software is used by the company.

6. A phone system app will be provided for business communication.

7. Training will be limited to company systems and current processes, as the successful candidate is expected to already have relevant experience.





Performance Expectations

The successful candidate will be expected to:

1. Learn the company’s systems and processes quickly.

2. Take meaningful ownership of live requests within the first couple of weeks.

3. Liaise with clients confidently and keep them updated throughout.

4. Source suitable accommodation options quickly and consistently.

5. Build strong relationships with clients, landlords, agents, and providers.

6. Present and progress solutions professionally in order to help win business.

7. Maintain high standards of communication, organisation, and follow through.

title: Talent Acquisition Management
description:
The Talent Acquisition Management is a hybrid role that leads recruitment coordination and

pipeline management while also supporting core HR operations such as onboarding,

employee engagement execution, HR documentation, inquiry management, and payroll data

accuracy. The role plays a key part in ensuring hiring processes and people operations run

smoothly, efficiently, and in alignment with organizational goals



Key Responsibilities:

1. Recruitment Coordination & Pipeline Management

? Serve as the primary point of coordination with third-party recruitment partners for

onsite and remote roles.

? Manage end-to-end recruitment coordination, including job postings, candidate

screening, interview scheduling, and candidate communications.

? Partner with hiring managers to align on role requirements, interview feedback, and

hiring decisions.

? Maintain visibility and ownership of candidate pipelines, progress, and hiring

timelines.



2. Recruitment Reporting & Quality Oversight

? Maintain accurate weekly recruitment pipeline and sourcing reports, including

third-party and platform-sourced candidates.

? Monitor candidate quality, volume, and turnaround time from recruitment partners

and platforms.

? Flag hiring risks, bottlenecks, or quality gaps to HR leadership and recommend next

steps.



3. Onboarding Coordination & Hiring Transition Support

? Coordinate onboarding logistics and hiring-related documentation for new hires.

? Ensure all onboarding deliverables are completed accurately and within defined

timelines.

? Support improvements to onboarding workflows, templates, and hiring transition

processes.



4. Employee Engagement & Employer Brand Support

? Execute and support weekly employee engagement activities in partnership with HR

leadership.

? Assist in creating internal engagement communications and recruitment-related

materials.

? Support distribution and collection of engagement, candidate, or new-hire feedback.



5. HR Documentation & Systems Support

? Maintain accurate HR records related to hiring, onboarding, and employee status

changes.

? Support upkeep of HR trackers, workflows, and systems.

? Ensure timely completion and tracking of HR administrative deliverables.



6. HR Inquiries & Escalation Support

? Assist in responding to HR-related inquiries, concerns, and escalations within defined

service timelines.

? Track inquiry resolution and ensure follow-through in coordination with HR

leadership.



7. Payroll & Benefits Data Coordination

? Support payroll and benefits processing by ensuring hiring and employee data is

accurate and submitted on time.

? Assist in resolving payroll or benefits-related discrepancies tied to onboarding or

employee changes.



8. Compliance & Process Execution Support

? Support audit readiness of hiring and HR documentation.

? Assist in policy acknowledgment tracking and compliance follow-through.

? Execute HR workflows and initiatives under the guidance of HR leadership.

title: Business Credit Funding Specilist
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for an experienced Business Credit & Funding Specialist who can help clients secure funding for their businesses and streamline the entire funding process from start to finish. The ideal candidate has a strong background in business credit building, lender relationships, and a proven track record of successfully obtaining funding for clients.

Key Responsibilities:

Assess client business profiles and determine funding readiness

Build and optimize business credit profiles (EIN, DUNS, tradelines, etc.)

Guide clients through the process of establishing and improving business credit

Leverage existing lender and funding partner relationships to secure capital (loans, lines of credit, credit cards, etc.)

Match clients with the best funding options based on their qualifications and needs

Manage and streamline the funding process to ensure efficiency and high approval rates

Track applications, approvals, and funding progress for each client

Maintain clear communication with clients regarding timelines, requirements, and expectations

Stay updated on lending guidelines, funding programs, and credit policies

Qualifications:

Proven experience in business credit building and business funding

Established network or connections with lenders, banks, or funding institutions

Demonstrated track record of successfully securing funding for clients

Strong understanding of business credit profiles, underwriting criteria, and funding requirements

Ability to structure deals and position clients for maximum approval potential

Excellent communication and client management skills

Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple clients simultaneously

Preferred Experience:

Experience working with startups, small businesses, or entrepreneurs

Familiarity with vendor tradelines, business credit bureaus, and funding platforms

Knowledge of compliance and ethical lending practices

Availability:

Flexible schedule with availability during standard business hours

Compensation:

Competitive pay based on experience

Performance-based incentives tied to successful funding outcomes

Start Date:

Immediate or based on candidate availability

Ideal Candidate:

A results-driven professional who not only understands business credit but also knows how to get deals funded efficiently. Someone who can bring both expertise and industry connections to help clients access the capital they need to grow.
