title: Growth Integrator (Tech + Operations Hybrid)
description:
Role Overview 



We are looking for a high-leverage Growth Integrator to support two fast-growing businesses 

across outbound growth and operational systems. This is a hybrid role combining technical 

execution, systems management, and operations ownership. 



You will act as the central operator, ensuring that both growth systems and operational 

infrastructure run smoothly, efficiently, and at scale. 



The candidate must speak in "workflows and tasks," taking high-level objectives and breaking 

them down into actionable steps to prevent miscommunication. 

This is not a task-based VA role — we are looking for someone who takes ownership, thinks in 

systems, and proactively solves problems without constant supervision. 



Key Responsibilities 



1. B2B Growth Execution (60%) 

• Execute and manage highly personalized, low-volume/high-touch executive outbound 

campaigns" (We want to filter out volume-based spammers).Work within tools such as 

Clay, Apollo, CRMs, and enrichment platforms  

• Manage inboxes, monitor replies, and handle initial lead qualification  

• Convert qualified leads into booked discovery calls  

• Maintain
 deliverability (domain setup, warm-up, inbox health)  

• Troubleshoot campaign issues and resolve technical problems independently  

• Support onboarding of new clients into outbound systems  





2. STR Operations & Systems (40%) 

• Manage and maintain property management systems and integrations  

• Oversee backend systems supporting Meta Ads and lead intake funnels  

• Coordinate onboarding workflows, contracts, and system setup  

• Oversee a fractional front-desk service (not direct 24/7 support)  

• Handle operational escalations (e.g., vendor coordination, backup dispatch) 



3. Cross-Business Responsibilities 

• Build, document, and maintain SOPs across both businesses  

• Ensure all systems run smoothly with minimal oversight, Act as your own project 

manager—breaking down abstract, high-level goals into defined workflows, sprints, and 

trackable tasks. 

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively implement improvements  

• Act as a reliable and discreet operator, maintaining confidentiality and integrity and 

maintain a shared operational lexicon (speaking strictly in "workflows and tasks") with 

the founder to eliminate miscommunication.



Required Qualifications (Must-Haves) 

• Strong experience with outbound systems (Clay, Apollo, CRMs, multi-inbox setups)  

• Deep understanding of
 deliverability (domains, warm-up, inbox health)  

• Experience managing and troubleshooting automation workflows  

• Excellent written English (client-facing communication)  

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail and system thinking  

• Ability to work independently without hand-holding  

• Experience managing inboxes and handling B2B lead responses  

• Comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms  

• High level of reliability, discretion, and integrity  

• Experience with Agile product/project management methodologies (sprints, backlogs, 

iterative execution). 

• Fluency in project management tools (Notion, Asana, ClickUp, or Jira) and the ability to 

self-assign and manage tasks without prompting. 

• Ability to translate abstract business ideas into structured, step-by-step operational 

workflows. 

• Understanding of complex, high-ticket B2B sales cycles.





Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-Have) 

• Experience in short-term rental or property management systems  

• Familiarity with Meta Ads backend and funnel management  

• Experience supporting agencies or consultants selling high-ticket B2B services  

• Experience creating SOPs and operational documentation  

• Exposure to tools like GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, or similar automation platforms  

• Ability to understand and speak Portuguese.



Success Metrics (KPIs) 

• System uptime and reliability (minimal errors, consistent workflows)  

• Speed of execution (build and deployment turnaround time)  

• Lead flow continuity (no drop-offs in capture or follow-ups)  

• CRM accuracy (clean data, correct tagging, no duplicates)  

• Automation performance (triggers and sequences working properly)  

• Time saved through automation and system improvements  

• Issue resolution speed (identifying and fixing problems quickly)  

• SOP completeness and clarity  

• Inbox and lead handling efficiency (maintaining a < 15-minute response time during 

working hours)."System scalability across clients and properties



Hiring Process 2 interview | Initial and Client Interview 



If interested kindly send your resume/cv and an overview of your experience

title: M&A Associates (WFH)
description:
Job description



We help Americans unlock wealth and free themselves from the corporate day-to-day grind through acquisition. We're a rapidly growing firm and we're looking for an M&A Associate to join our lean, remote team to help our clients in processing deals.



We're fast growing and you'll have ample career growth opportunities as we continue to scale.

3) Partner
 Management - Organize and label
s, flag important messages for follow-up, and ensure no key correspondence is missed.

5) Broker Communication & Relationship Management - Maintain consistent, professional communication with brokers to gather information, follow up on inquiries, and track deal status.



6) Scheduling Broker Intro Calls - Schedule introductory calls between brokers and designated tea
mbers



You MUST Have:

You Should Have:

What We Offer:

- The opportunity to take part in equity and profit sharing in our growing firm



- Work from anywhere

title: Tech Support Assistant VA
description:
I’m looking for a Part-Time Tier 1 Tech Support Assistant to join my team and act as the first point of contact for our internal tech ticketing process. I need someone organized and service-oriented to ensure every request is reviewed, acknowledged, and moved forward efficiently. You’ll report directly to me, and I’ll provide the training and guidance you need to master our internal systems and workflows.



Primary Responsibilities

• Review incoming internal tech support tickets and act as the first responder.

• Acknowledge requests promptly and follow up with requestors when you need more context.

• Triage issues based on type, urgency, and complexity to keep our workflow organized.

• Assign or escalate tickets to the right team members when necessary.

• Resolve basic or repeatable issues independently using our approved solutions.

• Maintain clear notes, updates, and status changes within the ticketing system.

• Partner closely with me to learn our best practices as your responsibilities grow.



Other Duties

• Monitor and review ticket queues to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

• Help create a smooth, professional support experience for our internal team.

• Gradually take on more direct issue resolution as you become familiar with our business and documented workflows.



Qualifications

• Previous experience in tech support, help desk, customer service, or administrative operations.

• Experience working within a ticketing or request-management system.

• Strong written communication skills with a focus on diligent follow-up.

• The ability to stay organized while managing multiple moving parts.

• Comfort learning new systems and following documented technical processes.

• Experience with CRM platforms or other business systems is a major plus.

• Previous experience working in a remote environment is preferred.

• A dependable, detail-oriented mindset with the judgment to know when to solve an issue and when to escalate it.



Work Schedule

• This is a part-time role averaging 20 hours per week.

• My preferred schedule is 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday, to ensure consistent coverage.

• We can adjust the exact hours based on team overlap, but I’ll need you to have intentional overlap with me during your onboarding for training and support.



Apply via this link: https://recruitcrm.io/apply/17743651178330099728edU

mbers on how to effectively use AI tools.

?

mbers already

What will you do:

- Answer customer
s about orders, shipping and returns

- Handle complaints and refund requests in a professional way

- Actively try to avoid refunds by offering solutions

- Manage Klarna orders and cases correctly

- Follow up on previous conversations and responses



Important:

You must have experience with fashion dropshipping and understand customer behavior such as sizing issues, expectations and return requests



When customers ask for a refund, we expect you to:

- Offer solutions first using discounts

- Work step by step with offers such as 10 percent, 20 percent, 30 percent, 40 percent and 50 percent

- Only proceed with a refund as a last option



Working hours:

Morning about 1 hour to check and answer
s

Evening about 1 hour to follow up and respond



What we expect from you:

- Proven experience in fashion dropshipping is required

- Experience with Klarna is very important

- Strong communication and persuasion skills

- Solution oriented and commercially minded

- Able to work independently and responsibly



What we offer:

- Flexible remote work

- Opportunity to work with a growing brand

- Bonuses based on performance and correct handling of customer cases

- Possibility for long term collaboration



Interested:

Send a message with your experience especially in fashion and Klarna and explain why you are a good fit!

title: Business Central Project Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



TGI Direct is looking for a highly organized and results-driven Business Central Project Manager to lead the implementation, optimization, and ongoing management of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. 



This role is responsible for aligning Business Central with our operational, financial, and production workflows to improve efficiency, visibility, and scalability across the organization. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, understands both systems and business operations, and can drive structure, accountability, and process improvements across teams. 



 

KEY RESPONSIILITIES

- Lead end-to-end implementation and optimization of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central  

- Manage project timelines, deliverables, and cross-functional coordination  

- Collaborate with internal teams (operations, finance, sales, production) to gather requirements and translate them into system workflows  

- Ensure proper configuration, data structure, and process alignment within Business Central  

- Oversee integrations between Business Central and other systems (e.g., CRM, PrintVis, third-party tools)  

- Identify inefficiencies and drive process improvements and automation  - Ensure data accuracy, reporting reliability, and system integrity  

- Coordinate testing, deployment, and system updates  

- Document processes, workflows, and system configurations  

- Provide training and guidance to internal teams to ensure proper system adoption  

- Act as the main point of contact for Business Central-related initiatives  





What Success Looks Like 

- Business Central is fully aligned with operational and financial workflow  

- Clear visibility into business data, reporting, and performance  

- Seamless integration between systems (CRM, production, finance)  

- Reduced manual processes through automation and system improvements  

- High adoption and correct usage of Business Central across teams  

- Improved coordination between departments through structured workflows  



 

Requirements 

- Proven experience managing Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central projects 

- Strong understanding of ERP systems, business processes, and data structures  

- Experience in project management, system implementation, or operations  

- Experience managing cross-functional stakeholders and teams  

- Familiarity with integrations (APIs, third-party systems)  

- Strong problem-solving and process improvement mindset  

- Excellent communication and organizational skills  

- Ability to translate business needs into system solutions  

- Self-starter who takes initiative and ownership  



Nice to Have 

- Experience with PrintVis or production-related systems  

- Familiarity with CRM platforms (e.g., HubSpot, Planner etc.)  

- Experience with Power Platform (Power Automate, Power BI)  

- Background in finance, operations, or supply chain  

- Experience in production, print, or operations-heavy environments  





What We’re Looking For 

- Someone who can bridge the gap between systems and business operations  

- Someone who brings structure, clarity, and accountability to projects  

- Someone who proactively identifies gaps and drives solutions  

- Someone who can manage complexity and simplify processes  

- Someone comfortable working with US-based teams and overlapping hours  



 



How to Apply 

Please submit your application by sending: 

- A link to your resume  

- A brief summary of your experience with Business Central or ERP implementations  





Bonus (optional but highly encouraged): 

Briefly describe a Business Central or ERP project you managed and the impact it had on the business.
salary: Compensation will be based on experience

title: Brand & Marketing Specialist
description:

Employment Type: Full-Time 





ABOUT THE ROLE 

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Brand & Marketing Specialist to own and elevate our brand presence across all touchpoints.  



This role is responsible for ensuring that everything we put out, from presentations to campaigns, is on-brand, polished, and strategically aligned.  



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, brings structure to creative work, and proactively improves how our brand is represented.

title: Print Estimator
description:
About the Role 



TGI Direct is looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Print Estimator to support accurate and timely job costing for print and production projects. 



This role is responsible for evaluating project specifications, calculating costs, and ensuring that estimates are aligned with production capabilities and business goals. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, understands production workflows, and ensures that pricing is both competitive and profitable while supporting smooth execution. 



 



Key Responsibilities 

- Prepare accurate and timely cost estimates for print and production jobs  

- Review project specifications including materials, quantities, timelines, and production requirements  

- Collaborate with sales, production, and operations teams to clarify job details and requirements  

- Ensure estimates align with actual production processes and capabilities  

- Identify cost-saving opportunities and recommend alternative approaches when needed  

- Maintain and update pricing structures, cost models, and vendor rates  

- Work closely with vendors and suppliers to obtain pricing and availability  

- Support job setup accuracy by ensuring all details are complete before production handoff  

- Assist in improving estimation processes and standardizing workflows  

- Maintain documentation of estimates and costing assumptions  





What Success Looks Like 

- Accurate and consistent job costing with minimal pricing errors  

- Estimates aligned with real production capabilities and timelines  

- Improved profitability through well-calculated pricing  

- Reduced back-and-forth between sales and production due to incomplete or unclear estimates  

- Faster turnaround time for quotes and proposals  

- Strong collaboration between sales, production, and operations teams  





Requirements 

- Proven experience as a print estimator or in a similar role  

- Strong understanding of print production processes and materials  

- Ability to interpret job specifications and translate them into accurate cost estimates  

- Strong analytical and numerical skills  

- High attention to detail and accuracy  

- Experience working with production, sales, or operations teams  

- Strong communication and collaboration skills  

- Self-starter who takes initiative and ownership  





Nice to Have 

- Experience with PrintVis or other print/ERP systems  

- Familiarity with Microsoft Dynamics Business Central  

- Experience in direct mail or production-heavy environments  

- Experience working with vendors and supplier pricing  

 



What We’re Looking For 

- Someone who understands both pricing and production realities  

- Someone who catches missing details before they become issues  

- Someone who brings structure and consistency to estimation processes  

- Someone who can balance speed, accuracy, and profitability  

- Someone comfortable working with US-based teams and overlapping hours  





How to Apply 



Please submit your application by sending: 

- A link to your resume  

- A brief summary of your experience with print estimation  





Bonus (optional but highly encouraged): 

Briefly walk us through how you would estimate a complex print job and what factors you consider.
salary: Compensation will be based on experience

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Location: Remote 

Employment Type: Full-Time 



 



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are looking for a proactive and results-driven Sales Development Representative (SDR) to support our sales pipeline by identifying, engaging, and qualifying potential clients in the print, direct mail, and marketing operations space. 



This role is responsible for generating high-quality opportunities by connecting with businesses that rely on print and direct mail campaigns, understanding their needs, and positioning our services as a solution. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of pipeline generation, applies a consultative approach to outreach, and creates a positive and professional first impression for potential clients. 



 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Conduct outbound prospecting through
, LinkedIn, and other channels  

- Qualify inbound leads and ensure alignment before passing to the sales team  

- Research target accounts and identify key decision-makers

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

- Clean, accurate, and up-to-date CRM data  

- Professional and positive experience for all prospects  

- Strong alignment with sales and marketing teams  





REQUIREMENTS:

- 2–3 years of experience in sales, lead generation, or customer-facing roles  

- Strong verbal and written communication skills  

- Experience with outbound prospecting 
, LinkedIn, cold outreach)  

- Ability to build rapport and maintain relationships with prospects  

- Strong organizational and follow-up skills  

- Ability to manage multiple conversations and priorities simultaneously  

- Results-driven with a focus on meeting targets  

- Ability to take a consultative, problem-solving approach to conversations  

- Self-starter who takes initiative and ownership 



NICE TO HAVE (But not required):

- Familiarity with HubSpot or similar CRM platforms

WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR:

- Someone who is proactive and consistent in building pipeline  

- Someone who can quickly understand client needs and position solutions

HOW TO APPLY:

title: Business Development Associate
description:
Business Development Associate (Healthcare / Medical Education)



Join a physician-founded digital platform advancing surgical education, used by 30,000+ surgeons globally. We are expanding institutional and professional adoption across academic, healthcare, and industry organizations and are seeking a Business Development Associate to support this growth.



This role focuses on execution and pipeline development, working closely with leadership who lead strategic conversations and partnerships. It is not an administrative or virtual assistant position.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Identification & Research – Identify and research relevant institutions, professional organizations, pharmaceutical and medical device companies, and individual healthcare professionals (e.g., physicians, educators, program leaders) to support platfor
mbership growth.

Structured Outreach – Execute targeted outreach campaigns via
, LinkedIn, and other professional channels.

Pipeline Development – Qualify and organize leads to support structured membership expansion efforts.

CRM Management – Maintain accurate records of outreach, engagement activity, and pipeline status using CRM tools.

Market & Institutional Research – Analyze institutional structures, identify decision-makers, and support outreach strategy with relevant insights.

Collaboration with Leadership – Work closely with internal stakeholders to refine messaging and improve outreach effectiveness.

Required Qualifications

Experience in business development, lead generation, institutional outreach, or similar growth-focused roles.

Familiarity with healthcare, medical education, academic institutions, or digital education platforms strongly preferred.

Ability to independently research organizations and identify relevant contacts and stakeholders.

Experience using CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) to track outreach and engagement.

Strong written and verbal communication skills in a professional setting.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a structured, metrics-driven environment.

Success in This Role



Success is measured by:



Consistency and quality of outreach execution

Accuracy and relevance of lead identification

Development of a clean, organized, and actionable pipeline

Role Details

Part-time (approximately 4 hours per day)

Remote, flexible work structure

Potential for expanded scope and increased responsibility based on performance

Direct contribution to expanding access to peer-reviewed surgical education globally
